No model can be affected by more than one instance of the same Battle Rune Bound Spell simultaneously.

Name: Shooting Phase
Description:
There are many kinds of shooting used by the armies of the 9th Age, from bows, guns and thrown weapons to arcane devices and grand artillery machines. With the exception of magical spells, the Shooting Phase is your chance to unleash all of your ranged attacks at the foe, thinning their forces without the risks of close melee. But of course the enemy may not make it easy, taking cover behind any battlefield shelter they can find to foil your attempts at a clear shot.
The Shooting Phase consists of the following steps:
1 -     Choose one of your units and perform a Shooting Attack with it.
2 -     Select the target of the attack and which models in the unit will shoot. Each model must have Line of Sight to at least one model in the target unit and be within its effective range.
3 -     Resolve the shooting attack.
4 -     Repeat steps 1 to 3 with a different unit that has not yet performed a Shooting Attack during this phase, if desired.
When all units that can and want to shoot have done so, the Shooting Phase ends.
/section{choose_a_unit_and_a_target}/section{who_can_shoot}/section{shots_and_aim}

Name: Trained Ferocity
Description: While Engaged in the same <u><link="rulebook-combined_combats">Combined Combat</link></u> as another friendly unit, the model part benefits from +1 Att and <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u>).

Name: Meeting of Minds (EoS)
Description: The model may give one additional <u><link="eos-imperial_authority">Order</link></u>.

Name: First Knight
Description: While the model is joined to a unit of Knightly Orders or Electoral Cavalry, the unit benefits from <u><link="eos-parent_unit">Parent Unit</link></u>.

Name: Blessings
Description: A unit containing Blessings gains First Strike (Hatred). Model parts with Mount are not affected. The model can cast the following three Bound Spells (3+), with Type: Caster, and Duration: One Turn. Blessings: Effects: • Ullor's Blessing The target's unit gains Aegis (5+, against Melee Attacks). • Sunna's Blessing The target's unit gains Flaming Attacks. Each enemy unit in contact with the target's unit when the spell is cast, suffers D6 hits with Str 4, AP 0, Flaming Attacks, and Magical Attacks. • Volund's Blessing The target's unit gains Zeal.

Name: Holy Relic
Description: Friendly units within 8" of the model gain First Strike (Hatred). Model parts with Mount are not affected. Blessings Bound Spells cast by the rider have their Range set to 8" and gain Types: Augment and Aura.

Name: Aura of Power
Description: Units within 8" of one or more friendly models with Aura of Power benefit from +2 Def and +2 Off. Model parts with Mount are not affected.

Name: Master Artificer
Description:
The model gains <u><link="eos-imperial_authority">Imperial Authority</link></u>, but is limited to the Order <u><link="eos-ready_aim_fire">Ready! Aim! Fire!</link></u>.
In addition, for the purpose of this rule, any unit of Reiters the model has joined is considered to be a <u><link="eos-parent_unit">Parent Unit</link></u>.

Name: Silver Shots
Description: Shooting Attacks made by the model part with <u><link="eos-brace_of_pistols">Brace of Pistols</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-crossbow">Crossbow</link></u>, or <u><link="eos-repeater_pistol">Repeater Pistol</link></u> gain <u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-zeal">Zeal</link></u>.

Name: Support Unit
Description:
A unit containing a model with this rule is referred to as a 'Support Unit'.
Support Units within 8" of a <u><link="eos-parent_unit">Parent Unit</link></u> gain <u><link="eos-esolute">Resolute</link></u>.
During the opponent’s <u><link="rulebook-charge_phase">Charge Phase</link></u>, <u><link="eos-suppport_unit">Support Units</link></u> may perform one of the following actions:

1. Supporting Fire: the Support Unit may perform an out of sequence <u><link="rulebook-shooting_attack">Shooting Attack</link></u> towards an enemy unit that has successfully performed a <u><link="rulebook-charge_move">Charge Move</link></u> against a friendly <u><link="rulebook-parent_unit">Parent Unit</link></u> within 8″.
Apply the normal rules for <u><link="rulebook-shooting_attack">Shooting Attacks</link></u>, ignoring the <u><link="eos-parent_unit">Parent Unit</link></u> for <u><link="rulebook-cover">Cover</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-line_of_sight">Line of Sight</link></u> purposes.

2. Counter Charge: after enemy units finish their <u><link="rulebook-charge_move">Charge Moves</link></u>, Support Units within 8″ of a successfully charged friendly <u><link="rulebook-parent_unit">Parent Unit</link></u> may choose one enemy unit that has <u><link="rulebook-charge">Charged</link></u> the <u><link="eos-parent_unit">Parent Unit</link></u> and declare a <u><link="rulebook-charge">Charge</link></u>, applying the normal rules for <u><link="rulebook-charge">Charging</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-line_of_sight">Line of Sight</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-front_arc">Front Arc</link></u>, rolls for <u><link="rulebook-charge_range">Charge Range</link></u>, etc.).
A Support Unit that performs a <u><link="rulebook-charge">Counter Charge</link></u> is considered to have at most one <u><link="rulebook-proper_ranks">Proper Ranks</link></u> for the purpose of inflicting <u><link="rulebook-surrounded">Surrounded</link></u>, with Duration: <u><link="rulebook-round_of_combat">Round of Combat</link></u>.

Name: A Koelhund's chase
Description: Rolls for Charge Range and Pursue Distance by the model’s unit gain Maximized.

Name: Gregor's Holy Hammer
Description:
Hand weapon, +1 Str +1 AP, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link></u> (2, against <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> or <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u>*).
*Including against models with <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> or <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u> Saves with conditional applications.

Name: Divine Jurisdiction
Description:
All Inquisitors may give <u><link="eos-steady_men">Steady, Men!</link></u> Order to their own Units.
In addition, an Army List containing Heinrich Falkenbach changes the following Orders:

• <u><link="eos-brace_for_impact">Brace For Impact!</link></u> changes into: <u><link="eos-cut_the_head_of_the_snake">Cut the head of the Snake!</link></u>: The target gains <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u> (against Characters) and <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u> (Units containing a Character).

• <u><link="eos-ready_aim_fire">Ready! Aim! Fire!</link></u> changes into <u><link="eos-aim_for_the_weak_spot">Aim for the Weak Spot!</link></u>: If an attack with Aim for the Weak Spot! wounds with a to-wound roll of ‘6’, neither <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> nor <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u> Saves can be taken against it.

Name: Cut the head of the Snake!
Description: The target gains <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u> (against Characters) and <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u> (against units containing a Character)

Name: Aim for the Weak Spot!
Description: If an attack with Aim for the Weak Spot! wounds with a to-wound roll of '6', neither <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> nor <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u> Saves can be taken against it, including against models with <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> or <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u> Saves with conditional applications.

Name: Fanatical Devotion
Description: Models in a Unit containing Brother Tomaz benefit from Regeneration (6+) and Model Parts without Mount benefit from Hatred.

Name: Officially Not A Miracle
Description: The Rank-and-File Health Pool Brother Tomaz is joined to <u><link="rulebook-raise">Raises</link></u> 1 HP at the start of each friendly Magic Phase.

Name: Repent!
Description: +1 Attack, <u><link="rulebook-crush_attack">Crush Attack</link></u>.

Name: Shepherding the Flock
Description: Brother Tomaz can join Flagellants as if <u><link="rulebook-unstable">Unstable</link></u>. As long as he is joined to Flagellants he is <u><link="rulebook-unstable">Unstable</link></u>.

Name: Handgun
Description: Range 24", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-unwieldy">Unwieldy (1)</link></u>.

Name: Pistol
Description: Range 12", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>.

Name: Parent Unit
Description:
A unit containing a model with this rule is referred to as a 'Parent Unit'.
Parent Unit gains <u><link="rulebook-fight_in_extra_rank">Fight in Extra Rank</link></u> while there is at least one <u><link="eos-support_unit">Support Unit</link></u> engaged in the same combat.

Name: Wilderness Guides
Description: At the beginning of 'Vanguard Units' (Battle Setup, step 3.F), choose one friendly Parent or Support Unit within 8" of a unit containing Wilderness Guides: the chosen unit gains Vanguard (3 Mob).

Name: Brace of Pistols
Description: Aim X+, Range 12", Shots 2, Str 4, AP 2, Counts as Paired Weapons when Engaged in Combat, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>

Name: Fire on Impact!
Description: The model part gains <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge</link></u> (always Str 4, always AP 2, always Agi 10).

Name: Imperial Rocketeer
Description: Aim 5+, Range 48", Shots 3, Str 6, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (2)</link></u>

Name: Steam Powered
Description: The model’s rolls for Random Movement gain Maximised. The model may choose not to move despite having Random Movement. The model cannot choose to Pursue, unless it is its First Round of Combat and it is Charging. In that case it, must Pursue (including Overrun).

Name: Steam Cannon
Description: Aim 3+, Range 36", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 10, AP 4, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3+1)</link></u> ), <u><link="rulebook-unwieldy">Unwieldy (1)</link></u>

Name: Armour Saves
Description:
The defender rolls <u><link="armour_saves">Armour Saves</link></u>, by rolling a D6 for each wound, and comparing the result with the <u><link="model">model’s</link></u> Armour Value, reduced by the <u><link="attacks">Attack's</link></u> Armour Penetration.
The modified Armour Value describes the number of sides on a D6, counting down from the highest value, that will result in a successful roll, see tables below. If the Armor Save is successful, the wound is ignored. However, a natural roll of ‘1’ is considered a failure.
Arm - AP    Armour Save Roll
5 or above    2+
4    3+
3    4+
2    5+
1    6+
0    Cannot be passed  

AP 0    AP 1    AP 2    AP 3    AP 4    AP 5    AP 6
Arm 0    N/A    N/A    N/A    N/A    N/A    N/A    N/A
Arm 1    6+    N/A    N/A    N/A    N/A    N/A    N/A
Arm 2    5+    6+    N/A    N/A    N/A    N/A    N/A
Arm 3    4+    5+    6+    N/A    N/A    N/A    N/A
Arm 4    3+    4+    5+    6+    N/A    N/A    N/A
Arm 5    2+    3+    4+    5+    6+    N/A    N/A
Arm 6    2+    2+    3+    4+    5+    6+    N/A  

For example, Armour 3, means that ‘6’, ‘5’, and ‘4’ would be successful Armour Save rolls. If the <u><link="model">model</link></u> is attacked by Armour Penetration 1, its Armour is reduced to Armour 2, which now means that ‘6’ and ‘5’ are successful Armour Save rolls. 
This is equivalent with using the formula below to determine the required roll to negate the wound:
7 - (Defender’s Armor)
+ (Attacker’s Armour Penetration)

Combined Armour
Each <u><link="model">model</link></u> has a base Armour value in its profile, and some <u><link="model">models</link></u> may have additional equipment, rules, or are under the effect of <u><link="spells">spells</link></u> that modify the Armour values. Different sources of Armour can be combined, adding up to the total combined Armour.
For example, a <u><link="model">model</link></u> with a base Armour of 3 that is under the effect of a spell that grants +1 Armour, has a combined Armour of 4. When wounded by an attack with Armour Penetration 1, the Armour Save roll would be ‘4’, ‘5’, or ‘6’ (or 4+).

Name: Ancient Allies
Description:
Units marked <u><link="ancient_allies">Ancient Allies</link></u> count toward this category.The sum of the 1 per 1500 Army Points (round fractions up)
For example, at 4000 Army Points the Army List is restricted to <u><link="ancient_allies">Ancient Allies(3)</link></u>.
values stated in brackets of all models in the army is restricted to .

Name: Meeting of Minds (HE)
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-resistance">Resistance</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Master of Spellcrafting
Description: The Wizard's Learned Spells have their Casting Value reduced by 1, to a minimum Casting Value of 6.

Name: Lance
Description:
Description: Only models with <u><link="rulebook-centauroid">Centauroid</link></u> or <u><link="rulebook-mount">Mount</link></u> can use a Lance.

Characteristics Modifiers: <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge</link></u> (+2 Str, +2 AP, +1 Agi)

Name: Longbow
Description: Range 30", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 0, <u><link="rulebook-shoot_in_extra_rank">Shoot in Extra Rank</link></u>.

Name: Frost Phoenix
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict</link></u> (−2 Def, −2 Off, and −2 Agi), <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-supernal">Supernal</link></u>.

Name: Fire Phoenix
Description: The Phoenix model part gains Flaming Attacks, Grind Attack (D6 hits, Str 4, AP 1, Flaming Attacks, Unmodifiable), and Sweeping Attack ((XD3*)+1 hits, Str 4, AP 1, Flaming Attacks). * ‘X’ is the number of Ranks in the targeted unit.

Name: Rebirth
Description:
When the model loses its last Health Point, unless it is a Summoned model, the owner must roll a D6: on a 5+, it is a success ; apply the following effects:

• Before removing the model as a casualty, mark the centre of its final position.

• At the start of the next friendly Movement Phase, <u><link="rulebook-summoned_units">Summon</link></u> a new Phoenix within 3" of the marked point. The Summoned model has the same upgrades as the original Phoenix. Immediately after being Deployed, the model loses 4 Health Points, which cannot be prevented or <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recovered</link></u> in any way.

If the roll fails, the model is removed as a casualty as normal.

Name: Sword Sworn
Description:
Attack Attribute - Melee.
<u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u> with a <u><link="rulebook-great_weapon">Great Weapon</link></u> ignore <u><link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-parry">Parry</link></u>.

Name: Valiant
Description: A unit containing <u>Valiant</u> automatically passes <u><link="rulebook-panic_tests">Panic Tests</link></u> caused by <u><link="rulebook-terror">Terror</link></u>.

Name: Lion's Fur
Description: If the model is without Mount, it gains +1 Arm, which is improved to +2 Arm against Shooting Attacks.

Name: Dragonforged Armour
Description: The wearer gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (6+)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-resistance">Resistance</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>)

Name: Elven Bolt Thrower
Description:
This Shooting Weapon can be fired in two ways:

• Aim 3+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 10, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×5)</link></u>, Direct Hit (Str 6, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3)</link></u>)

• Aim 3+, Range 48", Shots 6, Str 4, AP 2

Name: Flaming Attacks
Description: <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u> <u><link="saves">Saves</link></u> cannot be taken against <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>.

Name: Sky Reaper
Description: Aim X+, Range 24", Shots 4, Str 5, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_Fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>

Name: Moonlight Arrows
Description: Attack Attribute - Shooting. Can only be used with Longbows without Weapon Enchantments. The attack gains Flaming Attacks and Magical Attacks, and its Str is set to 4.

Name: Fae Miasma
Description:
Attack Attribute - Melee, Shooting.
Can only be used with Longbows and Paired Weapons.
When a unit suffers one or more wounds from attacks with Fae Miasma (before any saves are taken), all models in the unit suffer a -1 to-hit modifier (both for <u><link="rulebook-shooting_attacks">Shooting Attacks</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-melee_attacks">Melee Attacks</link></u>), with Duration: One Turn.

Name: Asfada Headmaster
Description:
The Headmaster's knowledge is so vast, he is a <u><link="rulebook-wizard_conclave">Wizard Conclave (8)</link></u> all by himself.
Note: he has a total of <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (3)</link></u>

 • <u><link="rulebook-altered_sight">Altered Sight</link></u> (Cosmology)
 • <u><link="rulebook-truth_of_time">Truth of Time</link></u> (Cosmology)
 • <u><link="rulebook-weal_and_woe">Weal and Woe</link></u> (Cosmology)
 • <u><link="rulebook-cosmic_scales">Cosmic Scales</link></u> (Cosmology)
 • <u><link="rulebook-foresight">Foresight</link></u> (Divination)
 • <u><link="rulebook-immortals_bane">Immortal's Bane</link></u> (Divination)
 • <u><link="rulebook-the_stars_align">The Stars Align</link></u> (Divination)
 • <u><link="rulebook-augury_of_despair">Augury of Triumph</link></u> (Divination)
 • <u><link="he-favour_of_meladys">Favour of Meladys</link></u> (Hereditary Spell)

Name: Commander of the Veil
Description:
Acadnah is equipped with the following Magic Items:
<u><link="special-obsidian_rock">Obsidian Rock</link></u>, <u><link="special-potion_of_power_preservation">Potion of Power Preservation</link></u>, and <u><link="special-scroll_of_power"></link>Scroll of Power</u>.
These Magic Items cannot be used by other friendly models.

Name: Shroud Seekers
Description: All Friendly units gain +1 Defensive Skill and +1 Offensive Skill, when in contact with an enemy unit containing a Magic Item.

Name: Rogue Heroine
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-frenzy">Frenzy</link></u>, and is unaffected by <u><link="rulebook-bacon_of_courage">Beacon of Courage</link></u>.

Name: Scourge of Fleets
Description: Balûruth gains <u><link="rulebook-grind_attack">Grind Attacks</link></u> (D6 hits, Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>).

Name: The Lance of Tears
Description:
Lance.
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict (-1 Dis)</link></u>, Dhaenala gains +1 Att, <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u>.
In addition, she loses 1 Attack at the end of every Game Turn in which she was NOT Engaged in Combat, with Duration: Permanent.

Name: Commanding Presence
Description:
Friendly <u><link="model">models</link></u> in units within 12" of a non-Shaken <u><link="model">model</link></u> with <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> set their Discipline to that <u><link="model">model’s</link></u> Discipline. (Ignore if their original value is higher.) Apply any <u><link="modifiers">modifiers</link></u> to the Discipline of the <u><link="model">model</link></u> with <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> first, then set any affected <u><link="model">models</link></u>' Discipline to that modified value.
If rules, <u><link="properties">properties</link></u>, unit names etc. are mentioned in brackets following this rule "(X)", it means that only units possessing these qualities can benefit from the <u><link="model">model’s</link></u> <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u>.

Name: Keys to the Citadel
Description:
The model must buy Weapon Enchantments for two of its mundane weapons.
The Point Cost of one of the Weapon Enchantments (the cheapest if applicable) is halved, rounding fractions up.

Name: Infernal Armour
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-resistance">Resistance</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Infernal Weapon
Description: +1 Str, +1 AP.

Name: Flintlock Axe
Description: Aim X+, Range 18", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 2, Counts as <u><link="rulebook-halberd">Halberd</link></u> when Engaged in Combat.

Name: Vassal Governor
Description: Friendly units entirely with Vassal within 12" of one or more models with <u><link="id-vassal_governor">Vassal Governor</link></u> gain +1" Mob.

Name: Firing Platform
Description: Shooting Attacks against the model's unit are all resolved against the Infernal Bastion. In addition, as long as the unit has at least one Proper Rank, apply the following to all models in the Infernal Bastion’s unit when they are shooting or casting spells: • May draw Line of Sight as if they were Height 5, and from any point of the Infernal Bastion’s Front Facing. • May measure their range from the Infernal Bastion. • A maximum of 20 models can shoot from the unit. They can shoot regardless of the rank they are positioned in.

Name: Crush Attack
Description: <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u>. When the <u><link="model">model</link></u> part allocates <u><link="attacks">Attacks</link></u>, it may choose to exchange all of its <u><link="standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u> for a single Standard Melee Attack, which has its Str set to 10, its AP set to 10, and gains <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds(D3)</link></u>. This cannot be done as a Restricted Attack.

Name: Unbranded
Description: The model cannot take any Army specific Magic Items, and can never cast <u><link="id-curse_of_nezibkesh">Curse of Nezibkesh</link></u>.

Name: Riddle of the Lamassu
Description:
During enemy Pre-game Selections, the opponent must choose Power or Wisdom.
-   Power: the model gains <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel</link></u>(1).
-   Wisdom: Immediately choose up to two units from the opponent's Army List. The chosen units begin the game with an <u><link="id-incendiary">Incendiary</link></u> Marker.

Name: Weakness
Description: <u><link="attacks">Attacks</link></u> allocated against the <u><link="model">model’s</link></u> Health Pool must reroll failed <u><link="towound_rolls">to-wound rolls</link></u>.

Name: Oil Flasks
Description: Attack Attribute – Melee, Shooting. After resolving all simultaneous attacks, any unit hit by at least one attack with Oil Flasks gains an Incendiary Marker.

Name: Chained Together
Description: The model's unit may never voluntarily change its number of files. After performing a March Move, the unit loses 1D6 HP.

Name: Defy Death
Description: Melee attacks against the model can never wound on better than 4+.

Name: Ghost Step
Description:
A unit entirely with <u><link="rulebook-ghost_step">Ghost Step</link></u> ignores <u><link="terrain">Terrain</link></u> Features and <u><link="open_terrain">Open Terrain</link></u> when moving. The unit must however follow the <u><link="unit_spacing">Unit Spacing</link></u> rule at the end of its move.
In <u><link="terrain">Terrain</link></u> Features, a Health Pool with <u><link="rulebook-ghost_step">Ghost Step</link></u> never fulfills the criteria for which <u><link="model">models</link></u> must take <u><link="dangerous_terrain">Dangerous Terrain</link></u> Tests (I.e. <u><link="dangerous_terrain">Dangerous Terrain</link></u> Tests from a <u><link="flee_move">Flee Move</link></u> through an enemy unit must still be taken).
If the unit ends a move inside <u><link="impassable_terrain">Impassable Terrain</link></u>, backtrack the move to the unit’s last legal position, unless as part of a <u><link="flee_move">Flee Move</link></u>, in which case the standard <u><link="flee_move">Flee Moves</link></u> rules apply.

Name: Theocratic Litigators
Description: The model's unit and enemy units in contact with the model's unit gain <u><link="rulebook-magic_resistance">Magic Resistance</link></u>(2), which is also applied to friendly spells. This <u><link="rulebook-magic_resistance">Magic Resistance</link></u> value cannot be increased.

Name: Volcanic Embrace
Description: Special Attack. The model part gains Grind Attack (X* hits, AP 4, Flaming Attacks, Magical Attacks, Unmodifiable, Zeal (towards Metal Armour)). * These hits always wound on a 4+.

Name: Vassal Slingshot
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 10, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×5)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 6, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3)</link></u>), <u><link="id-oil_flasks">Oil Flasks</link></u>.

Name: Naphtha Thrower
Description: Aim 2+, Range 12", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (3×5)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>

Name: Accurate
Description: The attack does not suffer the 1 to-hit modifier for shooting at Long Range.

Name: Higher Calibre
Description:
The Range of the model's Shooting Weapon is doubled.
Enemy units hit by the weapon suffer -1" Cha and -1" Mob, both to a minimum of 3", with Duration: One Turn.

Name: Rock Crusher
Description: The Chassis's Str is set to 6 and its AP is set to 3.

Name: Full Steam Ahead!
Description: The model cannot choose to Pursue, unless it is its First Round of Combat and it is Charging. In that case it must Pursue (including Overrun).

Name: Giant See, Giant Do (ID)
Description: The model gains <u><link="id-infernal_armour">Infernal Armour</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> (12", <u><link="rulebook-insignificant">Insignificant</link></u>), <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-stubborn">Stubborn</link></u>).

Name: Infernal Lash
Description: +2 Agi. Once per Melee Phase, during Combat Choices in a Combat within 6" of the wielder, you may activate the following ability: Select a single friendly unit within 6" of the wielder (which can be the wielder itself). The selected unit gains Flaming Attacks and Magical Attacks, with Duration: One Phase.

Name: Properties
Description:
Behold, a rare and unique quality.
Units, <u><link="attacks">attacks</link></u> and <u><link="spells">spells</link></u> can have key words called <u><link="properties">Properties</link></u> <u><link="rulebook-attached">attached</link></u> to them. <u><link="properties">Properties</link></u> describe the unit’s origin, allegiance, elemental effects of its <u><link="attacks">attacks</link></u>, or other defining attributes. <u><link="properties">Properties</link></u> can always be identified by their names being displayed in grey and italics.
<u><link="properties">Properties</link></u> are rules that do not possess any innate or direct effects. Instead <u><link="properties">properties</link></u> are only used as triggers for other rules. For example, a rule might restrict <u><link="characters">characters</link></u> from joining a unit unless it possesses the right Clan Property.

Name: Standard Melee Attacks
Description:
<u><link="standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u>
The most common type of attack in the <u><link="melee_phase">Melee Phase</link></u> is the Standard Melee Attack, which all <u><link="model">models</link></u> can perform provided they have an Attack Value on their profile (see <u><link="characteristic_profiles">Characteristic Profiles</link></u> in the <u><link="definitions_and_terminology">Definitions and Terminology</link></u> chapter). To resolve these <u><link="attacks">attacks</link></u>, roll a number of D6 equal to the Attack Value of the attacking <u><link="model">model</link></u> part. This roll is called a to-hit roll.
Compare the attacking <u><link="model">model</link></u> part's Offensive Skill with the target <u><link="model">model's</link></u> Defensive Skill and consult the table below for the needed <u><link="dice">dice</link></u> roll to score a successful hit. A natural roll of ‘1’ is always a failure, and a natural roll of ‘6’ is always a success. Both tables present the same relation, visualised in different ways.
Offensive Skill -
Defensive Skill    Needed roll to hit
4 or more    2+
1 to 3    3+
-3 to 0    4+
-4 or less    5+  
Once you have determined the number of hits, follow the <u><link="attack_sequence">Attack Sequence</link></u>, using the Strength, Armour Penetration, and on the profile of the attacking <u><link="model">model</link></u> part, potentially modified by things like Weapon, <u><link="spells">Spells</link></u> and <u><link="model">Model</link></u> Rules.

Non-<u><link="standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u>
Attacks that do not fall under the category of <u><link="standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u>, have their own specific rules for <u><link="determining_the_number_of_hits">determining the number of hits</link></u>, as well as the Strength, Armour Penetration, and additional rules to use.
Off 1    Off 2    Off 3    Off 4    Off 5    Off 6    Off 7    Off 8    Off 9    Off 10
Def 1    4+    3+    3+    3+    2+    2+    2+    2+    2+    2+
Def 2    4+    4+    3+    3+    3+    2+    2+    2+    2+    2+
Def 3    4+    4+    4+    3+    3+    3+    2+    2+    2+    2+
Def 4    4+    4+    4+    4+    3+    3+    3+    2+    2+    2+
Def 5    5+    4+    4+    4+    4+    3+    3+    3+    2+    2+
Def 6    5+    5+    4+    4+    4+    4+    3+    3+    3+    2+
Def 7    5+    5+    5+    4+    4+    4+    4+    3+    3+    3+
Def 8    5+    5+    5+    5+    4+    4+    4+    4+    3+    3+
Def 9    5+    5+    5+    5+    5+    4+    4+    4+    4+    3+
Def 10    5+    5+    5+    5+    5+    5+    4+    4+    4+    4+

Name: Clergy
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (5+, against <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Stand Behind
Description: <u><link="attachable_models">Attachable Models</link></u> with <u><link="stand_behind">Stand Behind</link></u> are not required to have their Front Facing as far forward as possible within their unit. Essentially this means that the <u><link="model">model</link></u> can be positioned anywhere within its unit. This rule cannot be used while the <u><link="model">model</link></u> has a mismatching base to its unit.

Name: Lance Formation
Description:
A unit entirely with Lance Formation only needs to have three Files to form Proper Ranks.
However, the unit is never considered to have more than one Proper Rank for the purpose of Rank Bonus. Moreover, when in a unit that has exactly three files, each model part on a model with Lance Formation gains two instances of <u><link="lance_fight_in_extra_rank">Fight in Extra Rank</link></u>.

Name: Forest Guide
Description: The model's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-forests">Forest</link></u>).

Name: Nobility
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (5+, against no Armour Save). This Aegis can only be used against attacks where the model cannot take an <u><link="rulebook-armour_saves">Armour Save</link></u>, or would automatically fail it.

Name: Traits of a Hero
Description: The Folk Hero must choose one or two different Heroic Traits.

Name: Quin
Description: The model is a Wizard Adept that chooses Witchcraft as its Path of Magic. If without Mount, the model gains Scout.

Name: Commonfolk
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (5+)</link></u> while Engaged in the same <u><link="rulebook-combined_combat">Combined Combat</link></u> as other friendly units.

Name: Braziers
Description: In each <u><link="rulebook-shooting_phase">Shooting Phase</link></u>, before selecting its target, the unit containing Braziers may choose to gain <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u> (Shooting), with Duration: One Phase.

Name: Ordo Minister
Description: Anytime during a friendly Magic Phase, before ‘Casting and Dispelling Spells’ (Magic Phase, step 5), each unit containing Ordo Minister may gain one of the following effects: • Raise 1 HP on a Rank-and-File Health Pool in the unit. • Discard 1 Blessing Token and Raise 1 HP on any model in the unit.

Name: Throwing Weapons
Description: Range 8", Shots 2, Str as user, AP as user, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>.

Name: The Quest
Description:
During Pre-game Selections, an army containing <u>The Quest</u> selects a unit entry from the opponent’s Army Book, which cannot be a Character mount (but can be a Character Entry).
All instances of the selected Unit Entry in the opponent's Army List are marked with a Quest Marker.
Model parts with The Quest benefit from <u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u> (against units containing a Quest Marker) and <u><link="rulebook-zeal">Zeal</link></u> (against units containing a Quest Marker).

Name: Bastard Sword
Description:
<u><link="rulebook-melee_weapons">Melee Weapon</link></u>.
Counts as a <u><link="rulebook-hand_weapon">Hand Weapon</link></u>, with the following additional rules: +1 Str, and <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge ">Devastating Charge (+1 AP)</link></u>.

Name: Fae Breasplate
Description: +1 Arm and <u><link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting (1)</link></u>.

Name: Feyforged Lance
Description: Lance. <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge (+2 Att)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-zeal">Zeal</link></u>.

Name: New Guard
Description:
Dukes cannot be taken in an Army List containing King Henry the Young.
In addition, friendly units containing a Folk Hero with Castellan benefit from +1 Mob.

Name: Our Brave King
Description: Combats containing a friendly unit where the Rank-and-File models contains Common folk within 12" of King Henry the Young gain a bonus to <u><link="rulebook-static_combat_score">Static Combat Resolution</link></u> equal to the number of unsaved wounds inflicted by King Henry the Young in the current Melee Phase. This does not apply to combats King Henry is a part of.

Name: 'Borrowed Steed
Description: Immediately before choosing a unit to join using the <u><link="rulebook-hidden">Hidden</link></u> rule, Hernaut may gain a “Destrier” mount for free, without any upgrades.

Name: Infuriating Wit
Description: Maximised (Charge Range rolls) towards any unit containing Hernaut.

Name: Leprechaun Companion
Description: Each <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attack</link></u> allocated against Hernaut that fails its to-hit roll is instead allocated to the attacking model’s Health Pool with <u><link="rulebook-automatic_hits">Automatic Hits</link></u>.

Name: Hand-and-a-Half
Description: The <u><link="model">model</link></u> part ignores <u><link="twohanded">Two-Handed</link></u>, and its <u><link="weapons">weapons</link></u> count as a <u><link="hand_weapon">Hand Weapon</link></u> for the purpose of <u><link="rulebook-shield">Shield</link></u> (while keeping other rules and modifiers).

Name: Stalwart Defence
Description: Enemy units in Contact with the model lose <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge</link></u>.

Name: Sacred Relic
Description:
A unit containing Sacred Relic benefits from <u><link="rulebook-fight_in_extra_rank">Fight in Extra Rank</link></u>.
In addition, when the unit is the target of an <u><link="koe-orisons">Orison</link></u> while <u><link="rulebook-engaged_in_combat">Engaged in Combat</link></u>, add one <u><link="rulebook-koe-orisons">Blessing Token</link></u> to the your pool. Ignore this effect if a Character with the <u><link="koe-faith">Faith</link></u> Knightly Principle is part of the model’s unit.
The 'Sacred Reliquary' model part gains all Weapons of the Rank-and-File models in the unit it is joined to, with Duration: Permanent.

Name: Scorpion
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 10, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×5)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 6, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3)</link></u>)

Name: Trebuchet
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 7, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (2×2)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (2)</link></u>)

Name: Champion of the Green Knight
Description:
The 'Fey Rider' model part gains a <u><link="bastard_sword">Bastard Sword</link></u>.

Place a Forest* underneath the model until the model is removed as a casualty. This Forest always extends up to the edges of the model’s Unit Boundary (and no further), even if the unit moves or changes its formation.
* You may place a marker next to the unit instead.

Name: Mindless
Description: A unit entirely with this rule automatically passes its <u><link="command_test">Command Tests</link></u> for Combat Reforming, and automatically fails its <u><link="command_test">Command Tests</link></u> for Redirecting Charges.

Name: Courtier of the Dawn
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-wizard_conclave">Wizard Conclave (1)</link></u>.
The unit selects its spells from the following:

• <u><link="rulebook-predators_instinct">Predator's Instinct</link></u> (Shamanism).

Name: Animal Master
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> (12", Sabretooth Tigers).

Name: Hunting Spear
Description: Aim X+, Range 12", Shots 1, Str User+1, AP User+1, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3, towards Height 5)</link></u>

Name: Touch of Frost
Description: An enemy units suffers -1 Agi (to a minimum of 1) for each unit containing <u>Touch of Frost</u> it is in contact with.

Name: It's a Trap!
Description: When an enemy unit performs any of the following actions, it suffers 2D6 hits with Str 4, AP, and Unmodifiable: • The enemy unit successfully Charges a unit containing It’saTrap! in contact with a Terrain Feature. • The enemy unit comes into contact (while it was not in contact earlier) with a Terrain Feature that is in contact with a unit containing It’s a Trap!. Resolve the hits at the end of the action that triggered them. No unit can be affected by It’s a Trap! more than once in each Player Turn (including from different units containing It’s a Trap!).

Name: Brace of Ogre Pistols
Description: Aim X+, Range 12", Shots 1, Str User +1, AP User +1, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3, towards Height 5)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>.

Name: Thunder Cannon
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 2, Artillery, Area Attack(1×3), Direct Hit(Str 10, AP 4, Multiple Wounds(D3+1))

Name: Scratapult
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (3×3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u>.

Name: Hand Cannon
Description: Aim 4+, Range 18", Shots 3, Str 5, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>.

Name: Ogre Crossbow
Description: Aim X+, Range 30", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×5)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit (Str 6, AP 2)</link></u>.

Name: Mountain Hide
Description: Attacks with <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (X)</link></u> against the model halve their 'X' value (rounding fractions up).

Name: Freezing Aura
Description: Enemy units within 12" of one or more Frost Mammoths suffer -3 Agi, to a minimum of 1.

Name: Dengrai's Ice Storm
Description: The model can cast <u><link="rulebook-veil_of_mist">Veil of Mist</link></u> (Druidism) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spell">Bound Spell (4+)</link></u>.

Name: Giant See, Giant Do (OK)
Description:
During step 1.2 of <u><link="rulebook-battle_preparations">Pregame Planning</link></u> ('<u><link="rulebook-build_an_army">Build an Army</link></u>'), choose one of the following <u><link="rulebook-model_rules_and_units">Model Rules</link></u>, and write your choice on the Army List:

• <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u>)
• <u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u>
• <u><link="rulebook-devastating_chage"></link>Devastating Charge (+1 Str,+1 AP)</u>.

Name: Been There, Done That.
Description:
Every friendly unit of Mercenary Veterans and Mercenary Gunners gains <u><link="rulebook-bodyguard">Bodyguard (Ganzorig)</link></u>.
In addition, when joined to one of these units, Ganzorig benefits from any Extraordinary Model Rule upgrades the unit has.

Name: Get the Job Done!
Description: One use only. During ’Calculate Final Combat Score’ (Round of Combat, Step 4.B), Ganzorig may <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recover</link></u> up to 2 Health Points and adds +2 Combat Resolution to his side.

Name: Young Mercenaries
Description: All Friendly Bruiser model parts in an army containing Ganzorig benefit from <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u>), as long as he is on the Battlefield.

Name: Eru's Secret Recipes
Description:
At the start of each Friendly turn, pick one of the following to affect the Chefling's Unit.
Duration: One Turn.

 • <u><link="ok-bluehoove_goat_stew">Bluehoove Goat Stew</link></u>: +2 Mob, <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u>.
 • <u><link="ok-trollbear_goulash">Trollbear Goulash</link></u>: <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration (6+)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recover</link></u> a single HP on a model in Valish's unit.
 • <u><link="ok-stonecold_soup">Stonecold Soup</link></u>: <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (1)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-courageous">Courageous</link></u>. and <u><link="rulebook-disciplined">Disciplined</link></u>.

Name: Bluehoove Goat Stew
Description: +2 Mob, <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u>.

Name: Trollbear Goulash
Description: <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration (6+)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recover</link></u> a single HP on a model in Valish's unit

Name: Stonecold Soup
Description: : <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (1)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-courageous">Courageous</link></u>. and <u><link="rulebook-disciplined">Disciplined</link></u>.

Name: Ghost Pepper
Description: During each friendly Shooting Phase, select a single model part in the Chefling’s unit: it gains <u><link="rulebook-breath_attack">Breath Attack (Str 3, AP 0)</link></u>. Duration: One Phase.

Name: Gone but not Forgotten
Description: If Valish is removed as a casualty, all friendly model parts with Ogre gain Hatred (against the unit that caused Valish to be removed as a casualty*). Duration: Permanent. * This includes all models joined to it.

Name: Dashers
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-light_troops">Light Troops</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-skirmisher">Skirmisher</link></u>.

Name: Goblin Cunning
Description: Immediately before taking any <u><link="rulebook-courage_tests">Courage Test</link></u>, that is not automatically passed, any unit consisting entirely of models with Goblin Cunning may choose to fail the <u><link="rulebook-courage_tests">Courage Test</link></u> instead of rolling for it.

Name: Creepy-Crawlies
Description: The model gains Ghost Step, and model parts with Mount gain Poison Attacks.

Name: Beastie Whisperer
Description: Immediately before choosing a unit to join using the Hidden rule, the model may gain a 'Beastie' mount without any upgrades for free. If the model joins a unit with at least one Rank-and-File model with Creepy-Crawlies, its mount also gains Creepy-Crawlies.

Name: Unprofessional Courtesy
Description: Each unit can only be chosen up to three times per Player Turn for the deployment of models with <u><link="rulebook-hidden">Hidden</link></u>, <u><link="ong-surprise">Surprise</link></u>

Name: Netter
Description: <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict (-3 Off)</link></u>

Name: Headhunter
Description: The model part with Goblin gains March and Shoot, Poison Attacks (Melee and Shooting), and gains Throwing Weapons (4+) with Shots 3.

Name: Mauler
Description: The model part with Goblin gains Fury, First Strike (Hatred), and gains a Great Weapon.

Name: Surprise
Description: The model cannot be deployed normally. Instead, at the start of any Player Turn, the owner may choose a friendly non-Shaken Unengaged unit of Goblin Rabble or Gogtuk Neophytes. Any unit can be chosen up to three times per Player Turn: deploy the model with Surprise within 3" of the chosen unit and more than 1" away from any Impassable Terrain and away from other units. If the model is not deployed by the end of Game Turn 4, it is removed as a casualty.

Name: Force of Destruction
Description:
Melee.
Charges cannot be declared against the model with <u>Force of Destruction</u>. This model is ignored by other units and ignores them for the purpose of <u><link="rulebook-unit_spacing">Unit Spacing</link></u>. It may come into contact and move through other units, and other units may come into contact and move through it (excluding <u><link="rulebook-ambush">Ambush</link></u>).
When model with <u>Force of Destruction</u> comes into contact with another unit, the other unit immediately suffers X hits with the model’s Strength and Armour Penetration, and the model with <u>Force of Destruction</u> is immediately removed as a casualty.
If several units come into contact simultaneously the model with Force of Destruction chooses which unit suffers the hits.
If the model was removed due to another unit moving into contact with it, that unit suffers an additional D6 hits. Health Point losses caused by <u>Force of Destruction</u> in the Charge Phase do not cause <u><link="rulebook-panic_tests">Panic Test</link></u>.

Name: Brood Rivalry
Description: Melee. The model part gains +1 Att while another friendly unit is Engaged in Combat, anywhere on the Battlefield. Only units containing a Rank-and-File model can benefit from this rule. Note: when Engaged in Combat, any non-Rank-and-File unit still counts as a unit Engaged in Combat for other units.

Name: Crude Weapons
Description: Melee. The model can never benefit from Parry. After the First Round of Combat, all of the model's Melee Weapons parts count as 'Hand Weapon' for all rules purposes, with Duration: End of Combat.

Name: Giant See, Giant Do (OnG)
Description: The model gains Unruly and Orc. In addition, the 'Giant' model part gains Brood Rivalry.

Name: Skewerer
Description:
Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 10, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×5)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 6, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3)</link></u>)
The model's base is changed to 60×60 mm.

Name: Poisoned Spear
Description: <u><link="rulebook-spear">Spear</link></u>. <u><link="rulebook-poison_attacks">Poison Attacks</link></u>.

Name: Green Tide
Description: Natural to-wound rolls of '1' with Melee Attacks from friendly units within 8" must be rerolled.

Name: Symbol of the Warborn Alliance
Description: The model can cast Guile and Fury (Hereditary Spell) as a Bound Spell (4+). Each time the model attempts to cast this Bound Spell, the owner must decide which of the two versions to cast: • Augment: cannot be cast by a Goblin. The target gains +1 to hit, and its Charge Range, Flee Distance, and Pursuit Distance are increased by 1". • Hex: cannot be cast by an Orc. The target suffers -1 to hit, and its Charge Range, Flee Distance, and Pursuit Distance are reduced by 1".

Name: Troll Toll
Description:
Each time a model with <u>Troll Toll</u> fails a <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration Save</link></u> against an enemy <u><link="rulebook-melee_attack">Melee Attack</link></u>, the model part with <u>Troll Toll</u>, may immediately perform a <u><link="rulebook-melee_attack">Standard Melee Attack</link></u> towards the Health Pool of the model that caused the wound.
This attack is resolved at the end of the same Agility Step, before any casualties are removed, and does not count against the number of attacks the model with </u>Troll Toll</u> can make due to Restricted Attacks.

Name: Still Kickin
Description:
At the beginning of any Player Turn when the Splendid Leader is not on the Battlefield (i.e. because he has been removed as a casualty), you can <u><link="summon">Summon</link></u> a new Splendid Leader using the <u><link="rulebook-hidden">Hidden</link></u> rule, with the following exceptions: you can select whether the new Splendid Leader will be mounted on a Beastie, the Splendid Palanquin or a Beastie Chariot before choosing the unit he appears in.
If the Splendid Palanquin is selected, ignore the Base Size limitation and select six Rank-and-File models in the unit to be joined instead of a single model. After choosing an eligible unit, remove the six Rank-and-File models so that the Splendid Leader is placed in the Front Rank, where the removed models were positioned.

Name: Communal Bond
Description: Courage and Command Tests taken by the model's unit are Minimised, and may use the Discipline from other units within 8", following the rules below: 1. Choose a single model in the unit to take the test for the whole unit as usual. 2. Determine the model with the highest Discipline value in any other friendly non-Shaken unit within 8" of the unit. 3. Set the Discipline value of the model chosen in step 1 to the value determined in step 2.

Name: Closely Guarded
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-attached">Attached</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive</link></u> (Caiman Elders, Tegu Guards, Tegu Warriors), <u><link="rulebook-stand_behind">Stand Behind</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-war_platform">War Platform</link></u>.

Name: Guardian Patu
Description: Counts has a Hand Weapon with the following additionnal rules: +1 Str, +1 AP, and Agi set to 0.

Name: Mentor
Description: No more than two models with <u><link="mentor">Mentor</link></u> can ever be joined to the same unit.

Name: Combat Artist
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-attached">Attached</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive (Skink Warriors)</link></u>, and and its base size is changed to 40×40mm.
The ‘Caiman Mentor’ model part gains <u><link="sa-tooth_and_claw">Tooth and Claw</link></u>.

Name: Poisoned Javelin
Description: Aim X+, Range 12", Shots 1, Str User, AP User, <u><link="rulebook-poison_attacks">Poison Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>

Name: Pack Hunter
Description: Units entirely with Pack Hunter must reroll failed Charge Range rolls if either or both of the following apply: • Its Charge is part of a Combined Charge. • Its Charge is Declared towards a unit that is already Engaged in Combat.

Name: Tooth and Claw
Description: +1 Att, +1 to hit. <u><link="rulebook-twohanded">Two-Handed</link></u>. This weapon cannot be enchanted with <u><link="rulebook-weapon_enchantments">Weapon Enchantments</link></u>

Name: Magnetic Short Bow
Description: Aim X+, Range 18", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 1, +1 to hit towards Metal Armour, Shoot in Extra Rank

Name: Salamander
Description: The model gains Resistance (Flaming Attacks), and the 'Weapon Beast' model part gains Breath Attack (Str 4, AP 0, Flaming Attacks). This Breath Attack does not have: One use only.

Name: Walking Mountain
Description: Enemy units do not gain any Combat Score bonus for Fighting in Flanks or Rear of this model, and the model can never be Surrounded. The model cannot benefit from Cover.

Name: Path of Destruction
Description: This model part can allocate Stomp Attack onto models of Height 4 or less (instead of 1 or 0). If the model part's Stomp Attack is allocated onto a unit entirely with Height (3-4), the total number of hits is halved (rounding fractions up).

Name: Meeting of Minds (SE)
Description: The model gains <u><link="se-tree_singing">Tree Singing</link></u>, and <u><link="se-elven_cloak">Elven Cloak</link></u>.

Name: Sylvan Beasts
Description: The sum of the <u><link="se-sylvan_beasts">Sylvan Beasts</link></u> values stated in brackets of all models in the army is restricted to 1 per 1500 Army Points, rounding fractions up.

Name: Tree Singing
Description: Once in your Magic Phase, immediately after Excess Magic, a single model with Tree Singing can move a Forest following the steps below. The owner may discard a Magic Dice to increase the range to the distances written in square brackets [X"]. 1. Choose a Forest not in contact with any unit and within 8" [24"] of a friendly model with Tree Singing. 2. Move this Forest in a straight line up to 4" [12"], or until just before moving into contact with any unit or Terrain Feature.

Name: Herald of Sura
Description: The model's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u>.

Name: Forest Dweller
Description: While the model's unit is within 3" of a Forest, the model gains <u><link="rulebook-stubborn">Stubborn</link></u>. If the model's unit already contains <u><link="rulebook-stubborn">Stubborn</link></u>, the unit is considered Steady when rolling Break Tests.

Name: Impaling Roots
Description:
Aim 3+, Range 12", Shots D6+1, Str 4[5], AP 1[2], <u><link="se-gnarled_and_knotted">Gnarled and Knotted</link></u>, ignores to-hit modifiers from Cover, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>

Gnarled and Knotted: If the target is within 3" of a Forest, use the Str and AP values in brackets.

Name: Sylvan Blades
Description: <u><link="rulebook-paired_weapons">Paired Weapons</link></u>, +1 AP.

Name: Elven Cloak
Description: For Shooting Attacks allocated against a Health Pool with Elven Cloak, a to-hit rolls of '1', '2', or '3' is always considered as a miss, instead of the usual '1'.

Name: Sylvan Bow
Description: Aim X+, Range 30", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>

Name: Heath Lancers
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-shield">Shield</link></u> and the 'Heath Rider' model part gains a <u><link="lance">Lance</link></u>.

Name: Dances of Cenyrn
Description: During Combat Choices, a unit entirely with Dances of Cenyrn must choose one of the following Dances, model parts with Elf gain its effects, with Duration: Round of Combat. • Dance of Bedevilments: Afflict (−1 Dis), and enemy units in contact cannot claim Combat Score bonus from their Proper Ranks. • Dance of Biting Wind: +1 AP and Lethal Strike • Dance of the Parting Mists: -1 Str, -1 AP, and Aegis (3+) • Dance of Whirling Blades: +1 Att The unit cannot choose a specific Dance again until after one or both of the following has happened: • The unit is not Engaged in Combat. • The unit has chosen a different Dance.

Name: Poisoned Thorn
Description: Aim 3+, Range 12", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-poison_attacks">Poison Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>

Name: Big Game Hunters
Description: Attack Attribute - Shooting. The attack gains +1 to hit and always wounds on at least 4+ when allocated towards a Health Pool with Height 4-5.

Name: Forest's Thorns
Description: The Attack's AP is set to at least 3. This can only be used with a Sylvan Bow.

Name: Undead
Description:
Units containing <u><link="rulebook-undead">Undead</link></u> can perform <u><link="march_move">March Moves</link></u> only if they benefit from a friendly <u><link="model">model’s</link></u> <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u>. For this purpose, <u><link="reform_move">Reform Moves</link></u> exceeding a unit's Mob count as a <u><link="march_move">March Move</link></u>.
<u><link="model">Models</link></u> with <u><link="rulebook-undead">Undead</link></u> have an additional characteristic called Resurrect (Rsr) on their statline.

Name: Undying Will
Description: Rank-and-File model parts with Skeleton in units containing Undying Will gain +2 Def, +2 Off, Magical Attacks, Lethal Strike, and replace their Shooting Weapons' Aim with (4+). Model parts with Mount are not affected by Undying Will.

Name: Autonomous
Description: Units entirely with Autonomous may perform March Moves as normal despite being Undead, even when outside the range of the Commanding Presence of any friendly models.

Name: Ensouled Statue
Description: Units entirely with <u>Ensouled Statue</u> reduce by 1 the number of HP lost due to <u><link="ud-dust_to_dust">Dust to Dust</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-unstable">Unstable</link></u>.

Name: Hierophant
Description: An Undying Dynasties army must include at least one model with Hierophant.

Name: Eternal Guardian
Description: Attacks with <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (X)</link></u> against the model halve the number of wounds they inflict (rounding fractions up).

Name: Tomb Harbinger
Description:
The model part gains <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u>.
In addition, it counts as a Rank-and-File model for the purposes of <u><link="ud-undying_will">Undying Will</link></u>.

Name: Aspis Arrows
Description: The model's Shooting Weapon always hits on a roll equal to or greater than its Aim.

Name: Death is Only the Beginning
Description:
Each time this model successfully casts a Learned Spell of Type Augment or Universal, choose one of the following effects, for a single targeted friendly unit:

• The Rank-and-File part of the target <u><link="rulebook-raise">Raises</link></u> a number of HP equal to its <u><link="rulebook-resurrect">Resurrected</link></u> value.

• A single model in the target <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recovers</link></u> a number of HP equal to its <u><link="rulebook-resurrect">Resurrected</link></u> value.
This effect cannot be applied more than twice on the same Health Pool in each Magic Phase.

Name: Sacred Ark
Description: Learned Spells cast by friendly Wizards within 12" of one or more models with <u>Sacred Ark</u> gain +6" Range (Aura spells gain +3" Range instead).

Name: Dust to Dust
Description: At the end of each of your Player Turns, if there are no friendly models with Hierophant on the Battlefield, each unit containing Dust to Dust loses X HP, where 'X' is equal to half their Resurrected value (rounding fractions up). These hits can only be allocated onto models with Dust to Dust.

Name: Curse of Phatep
Description: Spells cast by this model gain +12" Range.

Name: Great Aspis Bow
Description: Aim X+, Range 36", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 2, <u><link="ud-great_aspis_bow">Aspis Arrows</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-shoot_in_extra_rank">Shoot in Extra Rank</link></u>.

Name: Petrifying Gaze
Description: Aim Auto, Range 12", Shots 2, Str *, AP 10, Automatic Hits, Stand and Shoot, Unmodifiable, * To-wound rolls are set to 5+.

Name: Charnel Catapult
Description:
Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 7, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (2×2)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-Direct Hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-Multiple Wounds (2)">Multiple Wounds (2)</link></u>).

If this weapon causes any HP loss, the target must immediately take a <u><link="rulebook-panic_tests">Panic Test</link></u>.

Name: Awaken
Description: The model can <u><link="rulebook-raise">Raise</link></u> Health Points above a unit's starting size for the units stated within brackets (X). However, units cannot be increased beyond  the unmodified maximum unit size (that is written in their unit entry). A unit's starting size is the size of the unit as written on the Army List or the size of the unit when it is <u><link="rulebook-summoned_units">Summoned</link></u>.

Name: Autonomous
Description: Units entirely with <u><link="vc-autonomous">Autonomous</link></u> may perform March Moves as normal despite being Undead, even when outside the range of <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> of any friendly models.

Name: Unnatural Activity
Description: Friendly units within 6" of one or more models with <u>Unnatural Activity</u> benefit from +2 Off and +2 Agi.

Name: Vampiric
Description:
At the end of each Melee Phase, check and resolve the following effects for all models with <u>Vampiric</u>:

• <u>Character</u> (or <u><link="rulebook-attachable_models">Attachable Model</link></u>): if at least one attack with <u>Vampiric</u> made by the Character (or Attachable Model) caused any HP loss against enemy units,the model with <u>Vampiric</u> can make a single <u>Vampiric</u> roll.
If successful, the model <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recovers</link></u> a single HP.

• <u>Rank-and-File model</u>: if at least one attack with <u>Vampiric</u> made by a Rank-and-File model in the unit caused any HP loss against enemy units, the unit can make a single <u>Vampiric</u> roll.
If successful, the units Rank-and-File Health Pool <u><link="rulebook-raise">Raises</link></u> a single HP.

A <u>Vampiric</u> roll is successful if the D6 scores X+, where 'X' is the number stated within brackets. If a unit or Character has multiple model parts with this <u><link="rulebook-attack_attributes">Attack Attribute</link></u> that each caused a HP loss,use the best value.

Name: Meeting of Minds (VC)
Description: The model gains <u><link="vc-necromantic_aura">Necromantic Aura</link></u>.

Name: Chilling Shriek
Description:
When the model part allocates Attacks, it may choose to exchange all of its <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u> for a <u><link="rulebook-grind_attack">Grind Attack</link></u> (HP*, Str 9, AP 10, <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-psychic_attacks">Psychic Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u>)

* The number of hits is equal to the model's current number of HP.

Name: Chilling Howl
Description:
Aim Auto, Range 8", Shots HP*, Str 9, AP 10

Attack Attributes: <u><link="rulebook-automatic_hits">Automatic Hits</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-psychic_attacks">Psychic Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u>

* The number of shots is equal to the model's current number of HP.

Name: Gates of the Netherworld
Description: A Vampire Covenant army must include at least 1 Character with Gates of the Netherworld. • If the model has selected Evocation as its Path of Magic: whenever the model successfully casts the Hereditary Spell, the target of the spell is considered to have +1 Rsr. • If the model has seleted a different path than Evocation as its Path of Magic: the model knows the Apprentice Spell (#1) in Evocation in addition to its other spells.

Name: Necromantic Aura
Description: All friendly units within 6" of one or more models with <u>Necromantic Aura</u> reduce the number of Health Point losses caused by <u><link="vc-ashes_to_ashes">Ashes to Ashes</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-unstable">Unstable</link></u> by 1.

Name: No Rest for the Wicked
Description:
Friendly Rank-and-File models in units within 6" benefit from <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration (6+)</link></u>.

In addition:

• Ghasts benefit from Regeneration (4+).
• Models from 'Core' benefit from <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u> (+1, max. 5+))

Name: Soul Tether
Description: The model can cast <u><link="vc-arise">Arise!</link></u> as a Bound Spell (5+), with the following changes: Range is set to 6", and it gains Type: Aura.

Name: Wail of Woe
Description: Aim Auto, Range 8", Shots D6+2, Str 4, AP 1, March and Shoot, Magical Attacks, Hits Automatically, Unmodifiable

Name: Ghostly Form
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (3+, against non-<u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>) and <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (5+)</link></u>.

Name: Ashes to Ashes
Description: Units entirely with <u>Autonomous</u> may perform <u><link="rulebook-march_move">March Moves</link></u> as normal despite being <u><link="rulebook-undead">Undead</link></u>, even when outside the range of <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> of any friendly models.

Name: Unholy Appetite
Description: After a Round of Combat in which at least one attack with <u>Unholy Appetite</u> caused any HP loss, all attacks from the same unit with <u>Unholy Appetite</u> gain <u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u> until the end of the next Player Turn.

Name: Aura of Undeath
Description:
During its Shooting Phase, the model part can make a Shooting Attack that targets all enemy units within 12" of the model (including those Engaged in Combat and outside Front Arc and/or Line of Sight).
This attack can be used even if the Altar is Engaged in Combat.
Each target suffers D6 hits with a Strength equal to the current Game Turn number, Armour Penetration 2, and <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u>.

Name: Unholy Conduit
Description: Friendly units within 6" of the model benefit from <u><link="autonomous">Autonomous</link></u>.

Name: Arise!
Description:
Choose one of the following effects, for each target:
-   The Rank-and-File part of the target Raises HP equal to its Rsr value.
-   One Attachable Model in the target Recovers HP equal to its Rsr value.
The following models cannot Recover more than 2 HP from this spell each Magic Phase:

-   Height 4--5 models with Solitary
-   Attachable Models

Name: Wail of Woe
Description:
<u><link="wail_of_woe">Wail of Woe</link></u> - Shooting Weapon
NameAimRangeShotsStrAPAttack Attributes<u><link="wail_of_woe">Wail of Woe</link></u>--8"D6+241March and Shoot, Magical Attacks, Hits Automatically

Name: Callous
Description:
The model may use Shooting Attacks against enemy units <u><link="rulebook-engaged_in_combat">Engaged in Combat</link></u>, with the following rules and restrictions:

• Friendly units <u><link="rulebook-engaged_in_combat">Engaged in this Combat</link></u> are ignored for Cover purposes (but not for drawing <u><link="rulebook-line_of_sight">Line of Sight</link></u>).

• Roll to-hit as normal against the intended target. Immediately after determining the number of hits, roll a D6 for each hit. On a roll of 4+, the hit is distributed onto a randomly chosen friendly unit Engaged with the original target. Otherwise, proceed as normal.

Name: Imperator
Description: Other friendly within units range of the model’s <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> gain <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unstable">Unstable</link></u>.

Name: Pontifex Maximus
Description: The model may take (and pay the price for) one item from Artefacts or Potions and Scrolls, worth up to 50 pts, that is normally available to Vermin Swarm Characters.

Name: Girded by Acratos
Description: The model's Armour is set to 4, it gains Magic Resistance (2) and Metal Armour.

Name: Fetthis Fleshmaster
Description: The Charge Range rolls of units entirely with Mutant within 12" of at least one Fetthis Fleshmaster gain Maximised.

Name: Cutting Corners
Description: The model selects one Spell less than normal.

Name: Whispering Bell
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive</link></u> (Blackfur Veterans, Bloodfur Praetorians, Vermin Legionaries), <u><link="rulebook-musician">Musician</link></u>, and the Chassis Model part gains <u><link="rulebook-impact_hits">Impact Hits (D3+1)</link></u>.
Increase the ignored Health Points due to <u><link="vs-life_is_cheap">Life is Cheap</link></u> by two in Combats where at least one friendly Unit, with <u><link="vs-life_is_cheap">Life is Cheap</link></u> is within 12" of the <u>Whispering Bell</u>.
Remember that Unit Boundaries are frozen until after taking Break Tests.

Name: Life is Cheap
Description: When calculating Combat Score, ignore the first two Health Point losses of Health Pools with <u>Life is Cheap</u> in each Combat. Note: the number of ignored Health Point losses is not affected by the amount of Health Pools. Units containing <u>Life is Cheap</u> that are <u><link="rulebook-combat_formations">Steady</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-combat_formations">Solid</link></u> get +2 Dis while taking Break Tests.

Name: Cohort Coordination
Description:
While the unit has a Standard Bearer and the <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u> is on the Battlefield, it:

 • Gains <u><link="rulebook-Fight in Extra Rank">Fight in Extra Rank</link></u>.

 • May reroll a failed <u><link="rulebook-command_test">Command Test</link></u>. If it chooses to do so, and still fails the test, the unit loses its <u><link="rulebook-standard_bearer">Standard Bearer</link></u>, and you must remove one Rank-and-File model from the unit as a casualty (no saves allowed).

Name: Gladius
Description: The model part gains +1 Str when using a Hand Weapon.

Name: Furs on Fire!
Description: Immediately before the model is removed as a casualty as a result of an enemy <u><link="rulebook-melee_attack">Melee Attack</link></u>, it inflicts 1 hit with Str 3, AP 0, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u> towards the Health Pool of the model that caused the wound.

Name: Diseased
Description: For each <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attack</link></u> allocated against a model with <u>Diseased</u> that rolls a to-hit roll of '1', the attacking model's Health Pool suffers 1 hit with <u><link="rulebook-toxic_attacks">Toxic Attacks</link></u> at the end of the same Agility Step.

Name: Bloodfur Praetorian
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-bodyguard">Bodyguard</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-general"></link>General</u>), and the ‘Blackfur Veteran’ model part gains <u><link="rulebook-great_weapon"></link>Great Weapon</u>, and loses <u><link="rulebook-halberd">Halberd</link></u>.

Name: Bloodpox Blades
Description:
<u><link="rulebook-melee_weapon">Melee Weapon</link></u>.
<u><link="rulebook-paired_weapons">Paired Weapons</link></u>. <u><link="rulebook-poison_attacks">Poison Attacks</link></u>.

Name: Cannon Fodder
Description: Shooting Attacks against enemy units in contact with one or more models with <u>Cannon Fodder</u> gain +1 to hit.

Name: Sling
Description: Aim 4+, Range X", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 0, Attacks made at Long Range have their Str set to 3, Quick to Fire

Name: Drill Down!
Description: One use only. At the beginning of 'Vanguard Units' (Battle Setup, step 3.F), a unit including Drill Down! may choose to be removed from the Battlefield. If so, the unit gains Ambush (Terrain Feature with a friendly Tunnel Marker).

Name: Darkstone Generator
Description: Aim Auto, Range 12", Shots D3+1, Str D6+1, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-automatic_hits">Automatic Hits</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-lightning_attacks">Lightning Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-mManiacal_enthusiasm">Maniacal Enthusiasm (To-wound roll)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u>

Name: Jezail
Description: Aim X+, Range 36", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>, <u><link="vs-maniacal_enthusiasm">Maniacal Enthusiasm (To-hit roll)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unwieldy">Unwieldy (1)</link></u>

Name: Unit of Artillery
Description: If one model in this unit is affected by an <u><link="rulebook-engineer">Engineer</link></u>, all Rank-and-File models in this unit are affected by the <u><link="rulebook-engineer">Engineer</link></u>.

Name: Deepfire Grenades
Description:
Aim 5+, Range 8", Shots 2, Str 6, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>

When shooting at an enemy unit <u><link="rulebook-engaged_in_combat">Engaged in Combat</link></u> (using the <u><link="vs-callous">Callous</link></u> rule), hits are distributed onto a randomly chosen friendly unit Engaged with the original target on a roll of 5+ instead of 4+.

Name: Tracking Telescope
Description: The model gains +1 to hit towards targets with <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target</link></u> that are at Long Range.

Name: Rakachit Mauss Rifle
Description: Aim 5+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-lightning_attacks">Lightning Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 10, AP 4, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3+1)</link></u>)

Name: Skorchit Ordnance
Description: Aim 5+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack ">Area Attack (3×3)</link></u>

Name: Maniacal Enthusiasm
Description: When models in a unit make a dice roll of the type defined in brackets ('X'), after seeing the result(s) of all simultaneous rolls of 'X', and rolling eventual re-rolls, it may choose to add 2 to 'X' for all simultaneous rolls with this attribute. If this modifier is used, immediately roll a D6 and consult the table below: • 1-2: Oops: Change the target of all simultaneous Attacks or a spell with Maniacal Enthusiasm to a friendly unit within Range chosen by the controlling player (the model's own unit is always an eligible target). • 3-4: Room for Improvement : After fully resolving the simultaneous Attacks or a spell that triggered the roll on this table, the model's unit suffers 3 hits with Str 4 and AP 10 and Unmodifiable. • 5-6: Glorious Success!: No additional effect.

Name: Unstable Engines
Description: Immediately before the model is removed as a casualty, it inflicts D6 hits with Str 4, AP 0, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u> on all units, other than its own, within 6" of the model's unit.

Name: Darkstone Generator
Description:
Hits automatically.
<u><link="darkstone_generator">Darkstone Generator</link></u> - Shooting Weapon
NameAimRangeShotsStrAPAttack Attributes<u><link="darkstone_generator">Darkstone Generator</link></u>Auto12"D3+1D6+13March and Shoot, Lightning Attacks, <u><link="vs-maniacal_enthusiasm">Maniacal Enthusiasm(To-wound roll)</link></u>, Automatic Hits

Name: Manifestation
Description:
During Pre-game Selections, each 'Exalted Herald' model part must choose two different Manifestations from the list below and apply the effects during the game. The model must select two spells out of those indicated in the selecte Manifestations, <u><link="rulebook-wrath_of_god">Wrath of God</link></u> (Thaumaturgy), and <u><link="wdg-hellfire">Hellfire</link></u> (Hereditary Spell) (this replaces the normal rules for Spell Selection connected to being a Wizard Adept).

Manifestation		The Exalted Herald gains:		The Exalted Herald has access to:

 • Abiding Spirit		Hard Target (1).				Hand of Glory (Occultism).

 • Brand of the Dragon	Breath Attack (Str4, AP1, Flaming),	The Devouring Dark (Occultism)
				Fly, and Swiftstride.

 • Emissary of Chaos	Courageous and Stomp Attack (D6).	Pentagram of Pain (Occultism)

 • Sorcerer Immortal	Veil Walker.					Umbra Majesty (Occultism) and
										The Grave Calls (Occultism)

 • Unholy Avatar		+1 Str, + 1AP, and Divine Attacks.	Blood Curse (Occultism).

Name: Primal Legend
Description:
While the model is on the Battlefield, friendly units cannot use <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u> for <u><link="rulebook-move_manoeuvres">Move Manoeuvres</link></u> or <u><link="rulebook-charge_moves">Charge Moves</link></u>.
In addition, if the model is the <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u>, the maximum sum of 'Legendary Beasts' values in the army is increased by 1.

Name: Dying Embers
Description: After using this <u><link="rulebook-breath_attack">Breath Attack</link></u>, the model loses a Health Point (with no saves of any kind allowed).

Name: Gluttony
Description: Favour of Akaan, God of Gluttony. The first time a model with this Favour is on the winning side of a combat, its model parts with Path of the Favoured gain +1 Str. Duration: Permanent.

Name: Hell-Forged Armour
Description: The wearer's model gains <u><link="rulebook-resistance">Resistance</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-toxic_attacks">Toxic Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Meeting of Minds (WDG)
Description: When initiating a <u><link="rulebook-move_manoeuvre">Move Manoeuvre</link></u>, the model can choose to lose <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u> and gain +2 Mobility, with Duration: One Phase.

Name: Veil Walker
Description: The Caster gains +1 to cast Learned Spells with type: Damage

Name: Deeds not Words
Description: The model part benefits from Fury and Hatred while joined to one or more Rank-and-File models with Human.

Name: Envy
Description: Favour of Kuulima, Goddess of Envy. Charge Range and Pursue Distance rolls by units containing this Favour are Maximised.

Name: Writhing Mass
Description: When in the second rank and not in contact with any enemy model, the model can make <u><link="rulebook-grind_attack">Grind Attack</link></u> across models in the first rank directly in front of it.

Name: Release the Hounds
