Description: One use only. Duration: End of Turn. Can be activated at the start of any friendly Player Turn: the unit gains +2 Mob and Devastating Charge (+1 Att, +1 Str).

Name: Giant See, Giant Do (WDG)
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-courageous">Courageous</link></u>.

Name: Giant Club (WDG)
Description: +1 Str and +1 AP.

Name: Gateway
Description:
During Pre-game Selections, mark a point on the Battlefield with a <u>Gateway Marker</u>: it must be within 24" of your Deployment Zone, outside the opponent's Deployment Zone, and more than 1" from any Impassable Terrain.
There can never be more than 4 friendly Gateway Markers on the Battlefield.
If a Gateway Marker is removed, all units within 3" of the marker suffer 3D3 hits with <u><link="rulebook-toxic_attacks">Toxic Attacks</link></u>.
Remove all friendly Gateway Markers if there are no friendly Hellmaws or friendly models with a <u><link="wdg-veilgate_orb">Veilgate Orb</link></u> on the Battlefield, at the end of any phase.

At the start of each friendly Magic Phase, if this model was allowed to move during the preceding Movement Phase (ie. it is not shaken, did not Ambush, Fail Charge, is Unengaged etc.), you can apply one of the following effects:

• Mark a single point on the Battlefield within 24" of the model with a <u>Gateway Marker</u>, and more than 1" from any <u><link="rulebook-impassable_terrain">Impassable Terrain</link></u>. Before doing so, you may remove from the Battlefield a friendly <u>Gateway Marker</u> that was not placed during this Player Turn.

• Target a single friendly unit within 9" of the model, not containing any model of Height 5, and that was allowed to move in the preceding Movement Phase (i.e. it is not shaken, did not <u><link="rulebook-ambush">Ambush</link></u>, Fail Charge, is Unengaged etc.). Remove the unit from the Battlefield and immediately place it back on the Battlefield, in the same formation, with <u><link="rulebook-ambush">Ambush</link></u> (friendly <u>Gateway Marker</u>, that was not placed during this Player Turn).

Name: Altar of Nabh
Description: The model’s Charge Speed and Mobility are always 0". In addition, it gains Channel (2), Emplacement, Fearless, Solitary, Stubborn, and Unstable. When another friendly unit within 18" of the model suffers one or more HP slosses from an enemy attack, the Altar of Tila may cause 3 hits with Str 4, AP 2, and Unmodifiable onto the enemy unit that caused those losses. This effect can only be used once per phase.

Name: Altar of Tila
Description:
The model’s Charge Speed and Mobility are always 0".
In addition, it gains <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (2)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-emplacement">Emplacement</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stubborn">Stubborn</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-unstable">Unstable</link></u>.
When another friendly unit within 18" of the model suffers one or more HP slosses from an enemy attack, the Altar of Tila may cause 3 hits with Str 4, AP 2, and <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u> onto the enemy unit that caused those losses. This effect can only be used once per phase.

Name: Altar of Yema
Description: The model gains Attached, Exclusive (Height 1), War Platform, and a single 'Attendant' model part gains Petrifying Stare. Whenever a friendly unit within 12" of the Altar of Yema initiates any kind of move (see “Definition and Terminology” chapter in the Reference Handbook), the unit gains +1 Mobility and Devastating Charge (Strider), with Duration: End of Turn.

Name: Warlock Acolytes
Description: The unit gains Irresistible Will and Wizard Conclave (2). The 'Dread Acolyte' model parts gains Warlock. The unit selects its spells from: • Ice and Fire (Cosmology) • Whispers of the Veil (Evocation) • Illusory Paths (Witchcraft) • Curse of the Phantom Queen (Hereditary Spell)

Name: Academy Commander
Description: The model part gains Academy. Models with Academy in the model's unit gain Artistry of Death.

Name: Beastmaster
Description: The model part gains Slaver. Apply the following effects to units within range of this model’s Commanding Presence (friend or foe): • Friendly units containing Beast: Courage Tests gain Minimised. • Friendly units: rolls for the number of hits from Stomp Attacks gain Maximised. • Enemy units: rolls for the number of hits from Stomp Attacks gain Minimised.

Name: Colossal Kraken
Description: The model’s base size is changed to 100×150 mm, the number of its HP is set to 8, and it gains 2 additional Lashmasters.

Name: Extraordinary Specimen
Description: The Manticore gains <u><link="rulebook-stomp_attack">Stomp Attacks (D3)</link></u> and its base size is changed to 50×100 mm.

Name: Dancers of Yema
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (5+, against Melee Attacks)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-elven_finesse">Elven Finesse</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike (+1 Att)</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-weapon_master">Weapon Master</link></u>.
It also gains Great Weapon, Halberd, and Shield.

Name: Ruthless Efficiency
Description: The attack gains +1 to wound during the First Round of Combat.

Name: Height of Hubris
Description: <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (2)</link></u>).

Name: Transcendence
Description: For each HP loss the wielder inflicts with this weapon on enemy models, it gains +1 Str and +1 AP, up to a maximum of +2 each, with Duration: Permanent.

Name: Lacerating Touch
Description: +2 Att, +2 AP

Name: Mastery of Slaughter
Description:
+1 Str and +1 AP.
If the wielder causes one or more HP loss with this weapon, all attacks made by Rank-and-File models in its unit gain +1 to hit, with Duration: Round of Combat.

Name: Pride of Gar Daecos
Description: +1 Att, <u><link="rulebook-divine_attacks">Divine Attacks</link></u>.

Name: Seal of the Republic
Description: For each HP loss the wearer inflicts with <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u> on enemy models, it gains +1 Arm, with Duration: Permanent.

Name: Moithir's Mirror
Description: The bearer gains Aegis (5+, against Melee Attacks). If one or more Melee Attacks are allocated against the bearer, it gains Grind Attack(3 hits, Str 4, AP 2, Magical Attacks, Unmodifiable), with duration: Round of Combat. This Grind Attack is always resolved with Agi 0. Note that Attacks made at Agi step 0 can trigger this effect.

Name: Beastmaster's Vial
Description: One use only. Duration: End of Combat. May be activated at the start of any Round of Combat. One friendly unit entirely with Beast within 12" of the bearer gains Dying Blow.

Name: Ceinran's Scales
Description: The bearer can cast <u><link="rulebook-whispers_of_the_veil">Whispers of the Veil</link></u> (Evocation) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spells">Bound Spell (4+)</link></u>.

Name: Ring of the Obsidian Thrones
Description: Unless the wearer is Shaken, Break Tests and Panic Tests taken by friendly units within 6" of the wearer gain Minimised.

Name: Banner of Urlain
Description: Exclusive (Captain, Silent Assassin). The unit’s maximum size is changed to 15 models for units entirely with Height 1, and to 6 models for units entirely with Height 2. Rank-and-File model parts with Elf in the bearer’s unit gain Devastating Charge (+1 Att).

Name: Eye of the Gorgon
Description: The bearer’s unit gains Horror. During Combat Choices, select one Rank-and-File model part, or a model part on the bearer’s model, in the Front Rank of the bearer’s unit: that model part gains Petrifying Stare.

Name: Caedhren's Pennon
Description: While the bearer’s unit is part of a Combined Charge, that unit, as well as all other units that are Charging the same target, must reroll failed Charge Range rolls, and gain <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge</link></u>(<u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>).

Name: Big Brother (OnG)
Description: The model's HP are set to 9, its base size is changed to 75×100 mm, and its rolls for the number of hits for Stomp Attack is Maximised

Name: Beloved Mascot
Description: <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict (-2 Def)</link></u>.

Name: Giant Club (OnG)
Description: +1 Str, +1 AP.

Name: Armed to the Teeth
Description: The model gains Weapon Master and its Armour value is set to 2. At the start of each Round of Combat that the model is fighting, if the model is within 12" of one or more friendly models that are equipped with a Great Weapon, Paired weapons, and/or Shield, the 'Giant' model part gains the corresponding equipment, with Duration: Round of Combat.

Name: Gnasher Dashers
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-light_troops">Light Troops</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-skirmisher">Skirmisher</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-extra_support">Extra Support (2)</link></u>.

Name: Git Launcher
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str -, AP -, Artillery A unit hit by a Git Launcher suffers 2D6 hits with Str 4 and AP 2. On a to-hit roll of '6', you may instead place a Mad Git within 3" of the target and more than 1" away from any Impassable Terrain and from any other units, following the rules for Summoned Units.

Name: Goblin Gardens
Description: Duration: Permanent. During Pre-game Selections, you may choose any Terrain ('X') from: Field, Forest, Ruins, or Water Terrain. All Terrain Features following the rules for 'X' are treated as Dangerous Terrain (6+) instead of any other instance of Dangerous Terrain. In addition, friendly models with Goblin gain Strider (X).

Name: Spies
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-light_troops">Light Troops</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-vanguard">Vanguard</link></u>.

Name: Creepers
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-light_troops">Light Troops</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-scout">Scout</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-skirmisher">Skirmisher</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u>.

Name: Immense Bulk
Description: HP set to 8, its base size is changed to 100×150 mm, and the number of 'Rider' model parts is set to 8.

Name: Slithering Frame
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration (5+)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-random_movement">Random Movement (3D6")</link></u>.

Name: Scarred Carapace
Description: +2 Arm.

Name: Wicked Horns
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-frenzy">Frenzy</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-impact_hits">Impact Hits (D6)</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>.

Name: Orc Horde
Description: The model gains Fearless. Units entirely with Orc do not cause Panic Test on units entirely with Orc when making Flee Moves through them.

Name: Huntsman Spider
Description: The model gains <u><link="ong-creepycrawlies">Creepy-Crawlies</link></u>, and its base size is changed to 50×50 mm.

Name: Cave Troll
Description: The model's Armour is set to 3 and it gains Strider (Ruins).

Name: Bridge Troll
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-water_terrain">Water Terrain</link></u>).

Name: Forest Troll
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-magic_resistance">Magic Resistance (3)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-forest">Forest</link></u>).

Name: Big Wing
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-stomp_attack">Stomp Attack (D3+1)</link></u> and its base size is changed to 75×100 mm.

Name: Tribe Leader
Description: If the General is a Tribe Leader, apply the following changes to Army List creation: • Max. 10% of the Army Points may be spent on units entirely with Goblin. • The Rarity and Duplication Limits ‘Max. X items/army’ (i.e. ‘max. X units/army’, ‘max. X models/army’, and ‘max. X/army’) in the unit profiles of certain units entirely with Orc are modified, as indicated by ‘TL X’. For example, Uncommon (TL Regular) means that if the General is a Tribe Leader, the Rarity becomes Regular, whereas ‘max. 1 (TL 2) units/army’ means that if the General is a Tribe Leader, the Duplication Limit becomes ‘max. 2 units/army.’

Name: Darrmu
Description: If the General is a Darrmu, apply the following changes to Army List creation: • Max. 10% of the Army Points may be spent on units entirely with Orc. • The Rarity and Duplication Limits ‘Max. X items/army’ (i.e. ‘max. X units/army’, ‘max. X models/army’, and ‘max. X/army’) in the unit profiles of certain units entirely with Goblin are modified, as indicated by ‘D X’. For example, Uncommon (D Regular) means that if the General is a Darrmu, the Rarity becomes Regular, whereas ‘max. 1 (D 2) units/army’ means that if the General is a Darrmu, the Duplication Limit becomes 'max. 2 units/army'

Name: Headbashers
Description: Units containing Headbashers gain Bodyguard (Tribe Leader), and Rank-and-File model parts with Orc in the unit gain Lethal Strike. Additionally, units entirely with Headbashers that count towards 'Core' count towards 'Special' instead.

Name: War Cry!
Description: One use only. May be activated at the start of any friendly Player Turn, provided the General is on the Battlefield and not Shaken: apply the following effects, with Duration: One Turn. • Friendly units gain +1" Charge Speed and +1" Mobility. • If the General is a Goblin Demagogue or a Goblin Witch, friendly units entirely with Goblin gain Light Troops, as long as they are not Engaged in Combat. • If the General is an Orc Warlord or an Orc Shaman, friendly units entirely with Orc have their Charge Range rolls Maximised.

Name: Chosen Warlord
Description: Mokrog counts as an Orc Warlord for the purpose of <u><link="ong-war_cry">War Cry!</link></u>

Name: Guile and Fury
Description:
Can be cast in one of two versions:
Augment:
	Cannot be cast by a Goblin.
	The target gains +1 to hit, and its Charge Range, Flee Distance, and Pursuit Distance are increased by 1".

Hex:
	Cannot be cast by an Orc.
The target suffers -1 to hit, and its Charge Range, Flee Distance, and Pursuit Distance are reduced by 1".

Name: Omen of the Apocalypse
Description: +X Att, +X Str, and +X AP. 'X' is equal to the number of friendly units containing Orc that are Engaged in Combat anywhere on the Battlefield, up to a maximum of +3.

Name: Attack Gnasher
Description: The wielder gains 3 additional Standard Melee Attacks, whose Str is always 5 and AP is always 2.

Name: Tazrek's Guard
Description: The bearer’s model gains +1 HP and its Res is set to 6.

Name: Troll Hide
Description: Mobility is set to 6". The model's base is changed to 40×40 mm, the model gains Troll, and its Height is set to 3. The model's base size change cannot be ignored.

Name: Goga Cauldron
Description:
One use only.
May be activated at the start of any phase, or during Combat Choices: the bearer’s unit gains <u><link="rulebook-dying_blow">Dying Blow</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-unstable">Unstable</link></u>, with Duration: End of Turn.

Name: Skull Fetish
Description: During the 'Siphon the Veil' step of your Magic Phase, the wearer may gain Channel (D3), with Duration: One Phase. If a '3' is rolled for this, all units within 6" of the wearer, suffer the 'Witchfire' Miscast effect, as if 5 dice had been used.

Name: Monster Munch
Description: The bearer can cast <u><link="rulebook-totemic_summon">Totemic Summon</link></u> (Shamanism) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spell">Bound Spell</link></u> (6+).

Name: Pan of Protection Pinchin'
Description:
When successfully wounded, the wearer may choose to use the attacker's Armour value and/or its Special Save:

• Use the total Armour value that the attacking model would have against the attack that inflicted the wound (including conditional application, modifiers, etc..).
If so, the wearer cannot use its own Armour value (including any modifiers), if available.

• Use the Special Save that the attacking model would have against the attack that inflicted the wound (including conditional application, modifiers, etc..).
If so, the wearer cannot use its own Special Save (including any modifiers), if available.

Name: Gnasher Bait
Description: One use only Duration: End of Turn. Friendly Gnashers units within 18" gain Frenzy, and their Charge Range rolls are Maximised. Model parts with ‘Gnasher’ gain Fury.

Name: Moon Shrooms
Description:
One use only. Duration: End of Turn.
Cannot be activated at the same turn as <u><link="ong-war_cry">War Cry!</link></u>
The bearer's unit gains the effects of War Cry! as if the <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u> had used it this turn.

Name: Splatterer
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 7, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (2×2)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (2)</link></u>)

Name: Green Tide
Description: /subsection{green_tide}

Name: Omen of the Apocalypse
Description: /subsection{omen_of_the_apocalypse}

Name: Born in Fire
Description: During Combat Choices, Mokrog may gain Flaming Attacks. Duration: Round of Combat.

Name: The bigger the Axe…
Description: Great Weapon. During Combat Choices, Mokrog may choose to gain either Hatred or Multiple Wounds (2). Duration: Round of Combat.

Name: The Only King
Description:
All models in the Only King's unit benefit from <u><link="rulebook-dying_blow">Dying Blow</link></u>.
In addition, if The Only King is removed as a casualty, all friendly units lose <u><link="ong-brood_rivalry">Brood Rivalry</link></u>.
This effect persists for the Duration of One Turn after Mokrog is removed as a casualty.
This is an exception to the rule 4.C of the “Attacks” chapter: “Losing the Last Health Point”.

Name: Brilliant Agitator
Description: The Splendid Leader counts as a Goblin Demagogue for the purpose of <u><link="ong-war_cry">War Cry!</link></u>

Name: Higher Standards
Description: Rank and File units containing Troll in an Army List containing Lerrgog are upgraded with a Standard Bearer. Duration: Permanent. This affects Battle Preparations.

Name: Ironmaul Limb
Description: Each time <u><link="ong-troll_toll">Troll Toll</link></u>’s effect is triggered, Lerrgog performs two <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u> instead of a single one.

Name: Troll’s Bellow
Description: When you activate the War Cry!, all friendly model parts with Troll gain Fury. Duration: One Turn.

Name: Big Brother (ID)
Description: The model's HP are set to 9, its base size is changed to 75×100 mm, and the roll for the number of hits it does with its Stomp Attack is Maximised.

Name: Giant Club (ID)
Description: +1 Str, +1 AP.

Name: Tower Shield
Description: The model gains +1 Arm, <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-parry">Parry</link></u>.

Name: Walking Earthquake
Description: The model Mobility is set to 7" and it gains <u><link="rulebook-swiftstride">Swiftstride</link></u> and <u><link="id-volcanic_embrace">Volcanic Embrace</link></u> (D3+1).

Name: Walking Volcano
Description: The model gains <u><link="id-volcanic_embrace">Volcanic Embrace</link></u> (2).

Name: Prophet of Ashuruk
Description: During Pre-game Selections, regardless of its chosen Path of Magic, the model may exchange one of its spells for the Apprentice Spell  (#1) of either Alchemy, Pyromancy, Occultism.

Name: Prophet of Lugar
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u>(4+), <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u>(3+, against u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>), and -3 Arm, and loses Metal Armour and <u><link="id-infernal_armour">Infernal Armour</link></u>.
The model part gains u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>.

Name: Prophet of Nezibkesh
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-engineer">Engineer</link></u>(Gunnery Team, Infernal Artillery or Infernal Engine).

Name: Taurukh Ritual
Description: Apply the following to the model: • It gains Impact Hits (1 hit), Swiftstride, Centauroid, and its Height is set to 2. • Its Charge Speed and Mobility are both set to 7". • Its base size is changed to 25×50 mm.

Name: Blunderbuss
Description: Aim 5+, Range 12", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>

Name: Rocket Battery
Description: Aim 4+, Range 18", Shots 4, Str 6, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (2)</link></u>

Name: Titan Mortar
Description: Aim 4+, Range 18", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (3×3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>

Name: Incendiary
Description: Cummulative. Give one Incendiary Marker to the unit, with Duration: Permanent. A unit containing with one or more Incendiary Markers gains Weakness (Flaming Attacks). Remove one Incendiary Marker: • Immediately when the unit suffers one or more wounds (before saves are performed) from Ranged Attacks with Flaming Attacks. • At the end of a Round of Combat in which the unit suffers one or more wounds (before saves are performed) from Melee Attacks with Flaming Attacks. A Character leaving a unit affected by one or more Incendiary Markers is no longer affected, unless the Character was a single model unit when it gained Incendiary Markers: in that case, the Character keeps those Incendiary Markers.

Name: Airborne Legends
Description: All models with Fly share a common Max. 2 models/army restriction.

Name: Curse of Nezibkesh
Description:
The target gains <u><link="id-incendiary">Incendiary</link></u>, and suffers -1 Def and -1 Off.
In addition, for as long as the target contains an <u><link="id-incendiary">Incendiary</link></u> Marker, it suffers an additional -1 Def and -1 Off.

Name: Onyx Core
Description: Strength always 6. Flaming Attacks and Multiple Wounds (D3, towards Weakness (Flaming Attacks)).

Name: Flame of the East
Description: <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u> and <u><link="id-volcanic_embrace">Volcanic Embrace (D3+1)</link></u>.

Name: Eye of the Bull
Description: Affects both Shooting and Standard Melee Attacks. Attack Value is always 1, Strength is always 5, and Armour Penetration is always 10. Automatic Hits and Multiple Wounds (2, Melee).

Name: Kadim Binding
Description: <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (+1, against <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>, max. 3+) and <u><link="rulebook-handandahalf">Hand-and-a-Half</link></u>.

Name: Blaze of Protection
Description: The bearer’s Armour value is set to 6. At the end of Agility Step 0, each enemy model in contact with the bearer’s model that could have allocated attacks towards it, but chose not to, suffers 1 hit with Str 4, AP 0, Flaming Attacks, Magical Attacks, and Unmodifiable.

Name: Banner of the Twice-Branded
Description: Models in the bearer's unit gain <u><link="rulebook-shoot_in_extra_rank">Shoot in Extra Rank</link></u>.

Name: Banner of Shamut
Description:
Models in the bearer's unit gain +1 Off.
In addition, a unit containing a Banner of Shamut adds +1 to the Combat Score of its side.

Name: Their Master's Banner
Description: Apply the following effects while the bearer's unit is within range of a friendly model's Commanding Presence: • Model parts with Vassal gain Fury. • The bearer's unit must reroll failed Charge Range rolls in the Charge Phase.

Name: Mask of Ages
Description: The wearer gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (5+, against <u><link="rulebook-grind_attack">Grind Attack</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-impact_hits">Impact Hits</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stomp_attack">Stomp Attacks</link></u>), <u><link="rulebook-terror">Terror</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u>.

Name: Golden Idol of Shamut
Description: The bearer can cast Flaming Swords (Pyromancy) as a Bound Spell (4+). In addition, if the bearer’s model is Height 1, its Charge Speed is set to 4", its Mobility is set to 6", and it gains Ghost Step.

Name: Tablet of Vezodinezh
Description: When the bearer attempts to cast a Learned Spell using four or more Magic Dice, treat a single rolled ‘1’ or ‘2’ as a natural ‘3’.

Name: Lugar's Dice
Description:
A single model part of the bearer's model can reroll a single failed to-hit, to-wound, or Armour Save roll per Player Turn.
This cannot be used for <u><link="rulebook-crush_attack">Crush Attack</link></u>.

Name: Breath of the Brass Bull
Description:
The bearer's model gains +1 HP and <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-grind_attack">Grind Attack</link></u> (X, <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-toxic_attacks">Toxic Attacks</link></u>)).
'X' is equal to the number of models in contact with the bearer's unit's Front Facing.

Name: Ring of Desiccation
Description: During Combat Choices, each enemy unit in contact with the wearer's model gains an <u><link="id-incendiary">Incendiary</link></u> Marker.

Name: Bound or Broken
Description: /subsection{bound_or_broken}

Name: Unflame
Description: /subsection{unflame}

Name: The Riddle of Peace
Description: During Pre-game Selections, select a single Character on the opponent’s Army List. Any unit containing the selected Character suffers from Minimised (Charge Range Roll).

Name: Blivet Lance
Description:
Lance.
<u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge (+5 Agi)</link></u>. Attacks with the Blivet Lance ignore negative modifiers to to-hit rolls.

Name: Burning Armour
Description: Each time a <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attack</link></u> allocated against Ibat-Sokavum results in a to-hit roll of '1', the attacking model’s Health Pool suffers a hit with Str 4, AP 0, <u><link="rulebook-automatic_hits">Automatic Hits</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>.

Name: Helm of Kadim Command
Description: Model parts with Kadim in friendly units within 12″ of Ibat-Sokavum gain First Strike (Hatred (against Weakness (Flaming Attacks))).

Name: Daemonic Manifestations
Description: Daemonic Manifestations are Magic Items with the following exceptions: • They do not belong to any category. • They are not Legendary. • Models cannot be affected by more than one instance of each Daemonic Manifestation. • Unless specifically noted otherwise, the rules listed in each Daemonic Manifestation, including Characteristics modifiers and Attack Attributes, are applied to the entire model, including model parts with Mount. • A model can only have a single Daemonic Manifestation with Dominant.

Name: Favoured of Pride
Description:
Can only be taken in an army with an Omen of Savar as the <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u>.
The unit may select up to two <u><link="dl-daemonic_manifestations">Manifestations</link></u> instead of one.

Name: Favoured of Gluttony
Description:
Can only be taken in an army with a Maw of Akaan as the <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u>.
The unit gains <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u> and may select up to two <u><link="dl-daemonic_manifestations">Manifestations</link></u> instead of one.

Name: Favoured of Wrath
Description:
Can only be taken in an army with a Vanadra’s Scourge as the <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u>.
The unit gains <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u> and may select up to two <u><link="dl-daemonic_manifestations">Manifestations</link></u> instead of one.

Name: Favoured of Greed
Description:
Can only be taken in an army with a Miser of Sugulag as the <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u>.
The unit gains <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u> and may select up to two <u><link="dl-daemonic_manifestations">Manifestations</link></u> instead of one.

Name: Engine of Damnation
Description: The model’s base size is changed to 150×100 mm, its Height is changed to 5, its Health Points are set to 9, its Charge Speed is set to 5. In addition, it loses Attached, Exclusive and War Platform, and it gains Solitary, Stomp Attack (D6 hits), and Terror.

Name: Favoured of Sloth
Description:
Can only be taken in an army with a Sentinel of Nukuja as the <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u>.
The unit may select up to two <u><link="dl-daemonic_manifestations">Manifestations</link></u> instead of one.

Name: Firestarter
Description:
The unit can cast the spell stated in brackets as a Bound Spell (4+).
When casting the spell choose one Rank-and-File model to be the Caster.

Name: Wings
Description: The model’s Charge Speed and Mobility are both set to 7", and it gains Fly.

Name: Favoured of Envy
Description:
Can only be taken in an army with a Kuulima’s Deceiver as the <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u>.
The unit gains <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u> and may select up to two <u><link="dl-daemonic_manifestations">Manifestations</link></u> instead of one.

Name: Strixian Spirit
Description: The model’s Height is changed to 5. In addition, its HP are set to 7, its Charge Speed and Mobility are both set to 7", and it gains Fly, Light Troops, Solitary, Stomp Attack (D6 hits), and Terror.

Name: Favoured of Lust
Description:
Can only be taken in an army with a Courtesan of Cibaresh as the <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u>.
The unit gains <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u> and may select up to two <u><link="dl-daemonic_manifestations">Manifestations</link></u> instead of one.

Name: Rising Star
Description: Each time attacks made by the model kill an enemy model in a Duel, the model gains a +1 Combat Score modifier for the rest of the game.

Name: Elusive
Description: Units consisting entirely of models with Elusive may declare a Flee Charge Reaction despite being Fearless.

Name: Manifestation
Description: During Pre-game Selections, each Exalted Herald must choose two different Manifestations from the list below and apply the effects during the game. The model must select two spells out of those indicated for the chosen Manifestations, Wrath of God (Thaumaturgy), and Hellfire (Hereditary Spell). This replaces the normal rules for Spell Selection connected to being a Wizard Adept.

Name: Writhing Nightmares
Description: Enemy units in contact with one or more models with Writhing Nightmares suffer -1 Dis.

Name: Malodorous Swarm
Description: The unit is never considered to have more than one Proper Rank.

Name: Guiding Manifestations
Description:
<u><link="dl-daemonic_manifestations">Daemonic Manifestations</link></u> that have options for ‘Guiding Manifestations’ have two point costs: the 'Guided version' 's point cost and rules are written with [Dominant].
Guiding versions must be noted on your Army List.
Guiding Manifestations affect both the bearer and all Rank-and-File models in the bearer’s unit, as if the models themselves had the Daemonic Manifestation.
Note that Guiding and non-Guiding Manifestations are considered to be the same <u><link="dl-daemonic_manifestations">Daemonic Manifestations</link></u>.

Name: Hell Can Wait
Description:
One use only. Duration: One Phase.
May be activated just before the model’s unit rolls a Break Test.
That Break Test is automatically failed, and the HP loss suffered from <u><link="rulebook-supernal">Supernal</link></u> is halved, rounding fractions down.

Name: Chitinous Scales
Description: +2 Arm, to a maximum of 3.

Name: Centipede Legs
Description: +2" Mob.

Name: Unnatural Roots
Description: A unit containing Unnatural Roots gains <u><link="rulebook-resolute">Resolute</link></u>.

Name: Mark of the Eternal Champion
Description:
The unit or model knows (or gains) <u><link="dl-spear_of_infinity">Spear of Infinity</link></u> (Hereditary Spell) as an additional spell.
If the unit or model is not a Wizard, it instead gains <u><link="rulebook-wizard_conclave">Wizard Conclave (1)</link></u> that knows <u><link="dl-spear_of_infinity">Spear of Infinity</link></u> (Hereditary Spell).

Name: Clinging Ichor
Description: Enemy units in base contact with the model lose <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge</link></u>.

Name: Mirrored Scales
Description: Each Melee Attack allocated against the model that rolls a '1' to hit is instead allocated to the attacking model’s Health Pool, with <u><link="rulebook-automatic_hits">Automatic Hits</link></u>.

Name: Dark Hide
Description: At the beginning of 'Vanguard Units' (Battle Setup, step 3.F), you may remove any unit entirely with this Manifestation from the Battlefield and Deploy them again elsewhere, following the general Deployment restrictions.

Name: Hammer Hand
Description: +1 Att.

Name: Brimstone Secretions
Description: <u><link="rulebook-immune">Immune</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-divine_attacks">Divine Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Trampling Hooves
Description: Model parts without Mount or Construct gain Grind Attack (D3, Str 5 AP 2, Magical Attacks, Unmodifiable).

Name: Hellish Larynx
Description: The model part gains <u><link="rulebook-breath_attack">Breath Attack</link></u> (Str 3, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>).

Name: Kaleidoscopic Flesh
Description: <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>.

Name: Horrifying Visage
Description: One use only. Duration: One Phase. May be activated at the start of a friendly Charge Phase: when activated, the model gains Horror, and its Charge Range rolls gain Maximised.

Name: Venom Sacs
Description: <u><link="rulebook-poison_attacks">Poison Attacks (Melee & Shooting)</link></u>.

Name: Charged Tendrils
Description: <u><link="rulebook-lightning_attacks">Lightning Attacks</link></u>.

Name: Piercing Spike
Description: +1 AP.

Name: Unhinging Jaw
Description: <u><link="rulebook-zeal">Zeal (against Height 3-5)</link></u>.

Name: Digestive Vomit
Description: The first time a model with Digestive Vomit is on on the winning side of a Combat, it gains +1 Str and +1 AP, with Duration: Permanent.

Name: Unholy Appetite
Description: After a Round of Combat in which at least one attack with Unholy Appetite has caused a HP loss, all attacks with Unholy Appetite gain Hatred until the end of the next Player Turn.

Name: Smothering Coils
Description: <u><link="rulebook-zeal">Zeal (against Scoring)</link></u>.

Name: Segmented Shell
Description: Attacks with <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (X)</link></u> against the model reduce their 'X' by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

Name: Hot Blood
Description: <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge (+2 Agi)</link></u>.

Name: Mesmerising Plumage
Description: <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict (-1 Def, -1 Off)</link></u>.

Name: Hidden Knives
Description: <u><link="rulebook-melee Attacks">Melee Attacks</link></u> allocated by the model against an enemy unit's Flank or Rear Facing gain +1 Str and +1 AP.

Name: Horns of Hubris
Description: <u><link="rulebook-vanguard">Vanguard (3 Mob)</link></u>.

Name: Golden Helm
Description: Courage Tests taken by the unit gain Minimised.

Name: Bronze Backbone
Description: <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u>).

Name: All-Seeing Eye
Description: <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>.

Name: Torporous Tendrils
Description: <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict (-2 Agi)</link></u>.

Name: Sorcerous Antennae
Description: During the 'Siphon the Veil' step of your Magic Phase, gain one Magic Dice for each unit containing this Manifestation.

Name: Incendiary Ichor
Description:
<u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (3+, against <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>) and <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks (Melee & Shooting)</link></u>.
The model automatically fails all <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u> Saves.

Name: Whipcrack Tail
Description: <u><link="rulebook-melee_attacks">Melee Attacks</link></u> gain +1 to hit.

Name: Curved Tusks
Description: The model part’s Melee Attacks gain +1 Str and +1 AP. For each Melee Attack where a '1' is rolled to wound, the model with Curved Tusks suffers a hit that wounds automatically, with AP 10.

Name: Immortal Denizens
Description:
Casting Rolls made by a model with Daemon in this army using two or three Magic Dice gain a +1 modifier.
In games involving one or more Daemon Legions Army´s, the Active Player gains one additional Magic Dice, during the “Siphon the Veil” step in their Magic Phase (i.e. both players gain one additional Magic Dice in their Player Turn).

Name: Greater Dominion
Description: At the beginning of your Player Turn, choose a unit entirely with Daemon within 18" of the model. The chosen unit gains Disciplined, with Duration One Turn.

Name: Commander of the Steppes
Description: Duration: One Turn. At the start of each friendly Player Turn, you may select a friendly unit within 12" of Tergon Khan entirely with Mount. The selected unit gains Extra Support (+1) and Strider.

Name: Revoke the Mandate of Heaven
Description: Each Character or model with Dragon that either: • Breaks from a Round of Combat in which a unit containing Tergon Khan was Engaged, or • Selects Flee! as a Charge Reaction when a unit containing Tergon Khan declared a Charge, Suffers D3 hits with Str 6, AP 3, Magical Attacks and Zeal (against Dragon).

Name: Big Brother (BH)
Description: The model's HP are set to 9, and its base size is changed to 75×100 mm, and the roll for the number of hits it does with its Stomp Attack gains Maximised.

Name: Giant Club (BH)
Description: +1 Str, +1 AP.

Name: Beast Axe
Description: +2 Def, +1 Str, +1 AP, Agi always 0.

Name: Beer Barrel
Description:
The model gains <u><link="bh-looted_booze">Looted Booze</link></u>. One use only.
This weapon can be used as a Shooting Weapon with the following profile:
Aim 2+, Range 8", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 0, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (3×3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>
After this weapon has been used as a Shooting Weapon, the model loses <u><link="bh-looted_booze">Looted Booze</link></u>.

Name: Sober
Description: The model gains Light Troops and Vanguard. A unit that has been Sober at any point during the game is never considered Scoring.

Name: Drunk
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge (+1 Str, +1 AP)</link></u>.
Drunk units cannot choose to <u><link="rulebook-ambush">Ambush</link></u>.

Name: Hunting Call
Description: If the Army List includes a model with Hunting Call, the owner may reroll Ambush rolls of ‘1’ and ‘2’. If the owner has the second Player Turn, any unit containing Pack Tactics may choose to roll for its Ambush starting from Player Turn 1.

Name: Hawthorne Curse
Description: Devastating Charge (+2 Str, +2 AP). The weapon can be used as a Shooting Weapon (3+) with the following profile: Range 18", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 10, Area Attack (1×5) and Direct Hit (Str 6, Multiple Wounds (D3)). This Shooting Attack never suffers negative to-hit modifiers.

Name: Ancestral Carvings
Description: +2 Att, +2 Str, +2 AP, and <u><link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting (1)</link></u>.

Name: Twin Hungers
Description:
<u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u>.
Every time a <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u> made with this weapon rolls a '6' to wound and causes a HP loss, the wielder may <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recover</link></u> 1 HP at the end of the Agility Step (unless their model was removed as a casualty). Only 1 HP can be regained per phase with this item.

Name: Fatal Folly
Description: For each Standard Melee Attack allocated against the wielder's model that results inato-hit rollof '1', the wielder must perform a Standard Melee Attack at the end of the same Agility Step, before any casualties are removed. This overrides the normal restriction that Beast Axe attacks always strikeat Agility Step 0. This attack must be allocated towards the model’s Health Pool that rolled the '1' to hit, and it does not count against the number of attacks the wielder's model can make due to Restricted Attacks.

Name: Aaghor's Affliction
Description: +1 Res and Regeneration (4+). The model loses Light Armour and Metal Armour, and automatically fails all its Armour Saves.

Name: Trickster's Cunning
Description: <u><link="rulebook-resistance">Resistance</link></u>.

Name: Obscuring Fog
Description: <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict (-1 Agi)</link></u>.

Name: Wild Form
Description:
Duration: Round of Combat.
During Choose Equipment and Abilities, the bearer may gain either of the following:

• -1 Res, +1 Str, +1 AP
• +1 Res, -1 Str, -1 AP

Name: Banner of the Wild Herd
Description: One use only. Duration: One Phase. May be activated during Combat Choices. Rank-and-File model parts with Wildhorn in the bearer's unit have their Str set to 4 and their AP set to 1.

Name: Rain Augur Brew
Description: One use only. Duration: One Turn. If the bearer is on the Battlefield, this item is automatically activated at the start of the first Game Turn; if not it has no effect. All Ranged Attacks suffer −1 to hit.

Name: Spirit Caller’s Charm
Description: <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (2)</link></u>.

Name: Pillager Icon
Description: All friendly units of Raiding Chariots, Razortusks, and Razortusk Chariots, excluding Characters, within 12" of the bearer gain <u><link="rulebook-vanguard">Vanguard</link></u>.

Name: Seed of the Dark Forest
Description:
One use only. Duration: Permanent.
During Pre-game Selections, place a Forest:
• Touching your Deployment Zone.
• Not in contact with any Terrain Feature.
This Forest is a 10"x6" rectangle, that can not be chosen for Primary or Secondary Objectives.
Friendly units entirely with <u><link="bh-pack_tactics">Pack Tactics</link></u> treat this Forest as part of their Deployment Zone, for the purpose of where they can be Deployed.
A unit that starts the game in contact with this Forest cannot declare a Charge in the first Player Turn of the first Game Turn.

Name: Horn of Bragh
Description: The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-dying_blow">Dying Blow</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u>.

Name: Crown of Madness
Description:
The wearer gains <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike (Stubborn)</link></u>, and the wearer’s unit gains <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>.
In addition, all units entirely with <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u> within range of the wearer’s <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> (if applicable) gain <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike (Stubborn)</link></u>.

Name: Gnarled Hide Totem
Description: The target gains +1 Arm and <link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting (1)</link></u>.

Name: Blooded Horn Totem
Description: The target gains +1 Att and <link="rulebook-melee_attacks">Melee Attacks</link></u> gain +2 AP.

Name: Clouded Eye Totem
Description: The target gains Hard Target(1) and Magic Resistance(3).

Name: Black Wing Totem
Description: The target gains  +2" Cha and +3 Agi.

Name: Totem Bearers
Description: The unit gains a single Bound Spell chosen from the list below, which must be noted on the Army List. When casting the spell, choose one Rank-and-File model in the unit as the model casting the spell. The spell can only target the unit itself.

Name: Greater Totem Bearers
Description: The model gains all four Bound Spells from the list below, with Range 18".

Name: Crown of Horns
Description: /subsection{crown_of_horns}

Name: Giant See, Giant Do (BH)
Description: The model gains Drunkard and Strider (Forest). At the end of a friendly Movement Phase, if the model is in contact with a Forest, it may lose all its current weapons and gain Uprooted Tree, with Duration: Permanent.

Name: Cannon
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 10, AP 4, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3+1)</link></u>)

Name: Volley Gun
Description: Aim 4+, Range 24", Shots 4D6, Str 5, AP 3

Name: Mortar
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (3×3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>

Name: Irregulars
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-skirmisher">Skirmisher</link></u>.

Name: Great Tactician
Description: The model may give one additional Order.

Name: Imperial Prince
Description: The model part is equipped with a Hand Weapon enchanted with <u><link="eos-the_light_of_sonnstahl">The Light of Sonnstahl</link></u>, and can only take up to 50 pts of Magic Items.

Name: Zealot
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-dying_blow">Dying Blow</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive</link></u> (Flagellants), <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-unstable">Unstable</link></u>.

Name: Imperial Authority
Description:
At the start of each friendly Player Turn, each model with <u>Imperial Authority</u> may select one of the following effects, called 'Orders', and apply it to a single unit with duration: One Turn. The target unit must:

• Be a <u><link="eos-parent_unit">Parent</link></u> or <u><link="eos-support_unit">Support Unit</link></u>.
• Be the model's own unit or be within Range of the model's <u><link="rulebook-commading_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> or <u><link="rulebook-beacon_of_courage">Beacon of Courage</link></u> (if it has one of these rules).
• The chosen target cannot already be under the effect of an Order.

Orders			Effect:

• <u><link="eos-brace_for_impact">Brace For Impact!</link></u>	The target gains <u><link="rulebook-fight_in_extra_rank">Fight in Extra Rank</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-shoot_in_extra_rank">Shoot in Extra Rank</link></u>.
• <u><link="eos-on_the_double">On The Double!</link></u>		The target gains +1" Cha and +2" Mob.
• <u><link="eos-ready_aim_fire">Ready! Aim! Fire!</link></u>	The target gains <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>.
• <u><link="eos-steady_men">Steady, Men!</link></u>		The target gains <u><link="rulebook-disciplined">Disciplined</link></u>, and its <u><link="rulebook-courage_tests">Courage Tests</link></u> are Minimised.

Name: Long Rifle
Description: Aim 2+, Range 36", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (2, towards Height 1-2)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unwieldy">Unwieldy (2)</link></u>

Name: Repeater Gun
Description: Aim 4+, Range 24", Shots 3, Str 4, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-unwieldy">Unwieldy (1)</link></u>

Name: Repeater Pistol
Description: Aim 3+, Range 12", Shots 3, Str 4, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>

Name: Cavalry Pick
Description: +2 AP.

Name: State Detachment
Description: The unit replaces Parent Unit and Metal Armour with Support Unit and Light Armour. Its Arm is set to 1.

Name: Imperial Detachment
Description: The unit replaces Parent Unit with Support Unit.

Name: Liberal Magics
Description: During Pre-game Selections, if a Caster from the Empire of Sonnstahl either selects the Hereditary Spell or gains it by any other means, it must instead choose a single Path of Magic from the ones available to it other than its chosen Path: the Caster gains the Apprentice Spell (#1) from that Path as a Learned Spell.

Name: The Light of Sonnstahl
Description: Wounds automatically, AP is always 10.

Name: Death Warrant
Description: +1 Att, +1 Str, and +1 AP, for each friendly <u><link="eos-parent_unit">Parent Units</link></u> and <u><link="eos-support_unit">Support Units</link></u> of Height 1 Engaged in the same Combat, including the wielder’s unit if applicable.

Name: Hammer of Witches
Description: Att set to 5. In addition, the wielder benefits from +1 Str, and +1 AP when attacking a unit containing a model with a Learned Spell, or a unit that is under the effect of a spell with type Augment.

Name: Imperial Seal
Description: +1 Dis, Arm is set to 6. Fearless.

Name: Blacksteel
Description: Immune (Flaming Attacks). +1 Arm, and if the wearer is without Mount, it gains an additional +1 Arm.

Name: Witchfire Guard
Description: <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (4+, against <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Shield of Volund
Description: The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (3+, against <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>), <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (5+)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting (1)</link></u>, and automatically fails all <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u> Saves.

Name: War College Banner
Description: The bearer gains <u><link="eos-imperial_authority">Imperial Authority</link></u>.

Name: Banner of Unity
Description: Whenever the bearer's unit is targeted by an Order, it may immediately give that same Order (for free) to up to two <u><link="eos-support_unit">Support Unit</link></u> within 8" (of itself).

Name: Marksman's Pennant
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>.

Name: Locket of Sunna
Description: During Combat Choices, select one enemy Character in contact with the wearer’s unit. Choose a model part on the chosen Character: it suffers: −2 Att, −2 Off, −2 Str, and −2 AP, with Duration: <u><link="rulebook-round_of_combat">Round of Combat</link></u>.

Name: Winter Cloak
Description: The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u>(3+, against <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>), <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (5+)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting (1)</link></u>. The wearer automatically fails all <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u> Saves.

Name: Exemplar's Flame
Description: The bearer can cast <u><link="rulebook-corruption_of_tin">Corruption of Tin</link></u> (Alchemy) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spell">Bound Spell</link></u> (3+).

Name: Ullor's Horn
Description: Enemy units within 8" of the bearer lose the Charging Momentum Agility bonus as well as the +1 Combat Score bonus from 'Charging'.

Name: Scroll of Conquest
Description: One use only. Duration: End of Turn. Units within 6" of the bearer must reroll failed Charge Range rolls.

Name: Brace For Impact!
Description: The target gains <u><link="rulebook-fight_in_extra_rank">Fight in Extra Rank</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-shoot_in_extra_rank">Shoot in Extra Rank</link></u>.

Name: On the Double!
Description: The target gains +1″ Advance Rate and +4″ March Rate.

Name: Ready! Aim! Fire!
Description: The target gains <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>.

Name: Steady, Men!
Description: Discipline Tests taken by the target are subject to Minimised Roll. A unit that receives this Order and passes a Rally Test doesn’t become Shaken, and the Reform that is madeafter Rallying doesn’t prevent the unit from moving and/or shooting (but it still counts as having moved for shooting purposes).

Name: Warden's Bond
Description: The model gains +1 Discipline, Disciplined, and passes its Rebirth roll on 3+ instead of 5+. The Phoenix model part gains Mount, and the model gains an additional model part: Warden's Bond: Att 1, Off 6, Str 4, AP 1, Agi 6, Halberd, Elf

Name: Master of Canreig Tower
Description:
The model gains <u><link="he-master_of_spellcrafting">Master of Spellcrafting</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-wizard_conclave">Wizard Conclave (3)</link></u>.

The model has these spells available: 

• <u><link="rulebook-altered_sight">Altered Sight</link></u> (Cosmology),
• <u><link="rulebook-mind_fog">Mind Fog</link></u> (Witchcraft),
• <u><link="he-favour_of_meladys">Favour of Meladys</link></u> (Hereditary Spell),
• <u><link="rulebook-fountain_of_youth">Fountain of Youth</link></u> (Druidism),
• <u><link="rulebook-living_steel">Living Steel</link></u> (Alchemy),
• <u><link="rulebook-predators_instinct">Predator's Instinct</link></u> (Shamanism),
• <u><link="rulebook-whispers_of_the_veil">Whispers of the Veil</link></u> (Evocation).

Name: Queen's Cavalier
Description:
The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (+1 Att, +1 Off) and the bearer’s unit may reroll failed Charge Range rolls.
If the model has Height 5, Regal Dragon and Ancient Dragon replace their Ancient Allies (2) with Ancient Allies (1), and Phoenix replace Ancient Allies (1) with Ancient Allies (2).

Name: Fleet Officer
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-resolute">Resolute</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u> (Water Terrain).
If the models unit contains a model that already has <link="rulebook-resolute">Resolute</link></u>  from another source, the unit is considered to have two additional <link="rulebook-proper_ranks">Proper Ranks</link></u>  instead of one.
The bearer also gains <u><link="rulebook-lightning_attacks">Lightning Attacks</link></u> and, if using a Longbow, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>.

Name: Grandmaster of the Sword
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u>(+1 Def, +1 Off), and <u><link="rulebook-resistance">Sword Sworn</link></u>.
While joined to a unit containing Sword Masters, the model’s unit benefits from +1 Agi.

Name: High Warden of the Flame
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (4+)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u> and <u><link="he-sword_sworn">Stubborn</link></u>.

Name: Queen's Companion
Description: The model's Longbow Shots are set to 3, and the model's unit gains Accurate.

Name: Royal Huntsman
Description:
The model must take <u><link="rulebook-great_weapon">Great Weapon</link></u> and cannot take <u><link="rulebook-shield">Shield</link></u>.
The model gains <u><link="he-lions_fur">Lion's Fur</link></u>, <u><link="he-valiant">Valiant</link></u>, and the bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link></u> (2, towards Height 4-5). While joined to a unit containing Lion Guards, the model's unit benefits from <u><link="rulebook-swiftstride">Swiftstride</link></u>.

Name: Asfad Scholar
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel</link></u> (1).
The Range of the Wizard's Learned Spells is increased by 6".
Aura spells gain +3" Range instead, while spells with type 'Caster' are unaffected.

Name: Order of the Fiery Heart
Description: The model gains Flaming Attacks, Metal Armour, and the model part's Arm is set to 2. The model replaces its available Paths of Magic with 'Alchemy' and 'Pyromancy', and ignores the 'Missile', 'Damage' spell Types for Learned Spells when targeting units that are Engaged in Combat with itself.

Name: Nova Flare
Description: Devastating Charge (+1 Att), Divine Attacks, and Lethal Strike. One use only: may be used during Combat Choices: the wielder counts as Charging for the purpose of Devastating Charge, with Duration: Round of Combat.

Name: Sliver of the Blazing Dawn
Description:
+1 Str and +2 AP.
Each successful to-hit roll with this weapon causes two hits instead of one additional hit (usually this means it causes two hits in stead of one). This additional hit is allocated towards the same target.

Name: Cadaron's Heartwood
Description: Shots 3, Str as user +1, AP as user +1.

Name: Elemental Blade
Description:
+1 Att, +1 Str.
During Combat Choices, gain either <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u> or <u><link="rulebook-lightning_attacks">Lightning Attacks</link></u>, with Duration: Round of Combat.

Name: Gleaming Robe
Description: Aegis (3+). Armour is set to 1 and can never be improved beyond this. If the wearer Miscasts and suffers Witchfire, the number of hits is halved (rounding fractions up) for the wearer and its unit.

Name: Protection of Dorac
Description: +3 Arm, +3 Def, and Attached. The model’s Armour can never be improved beyond 5.

Name: Star Metal Alloy
Description: +1 Arm, which is improved to +2 Arm for models without Mount. The bearer can never be wounded on a roll better than 3+.

Name: Daemon's Bane
Description: +2 Arm against <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>.

Name: Navigator's Banner
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (5+)</link></u>).

Name: Banner of Becalming
Description: In each of the opponent's Magic Phases, immediately after Excess Magic, the opponent must discard 1 Magic Dice.

Name: War Banner of Rymâ
Description: A unit with one or more War Banners of Rymâ gains +1" Cha. In addition, Rank-and-File model parts with Elf in the unit gain Devastating Charge (+1 Str).

Name: Book of Meladys
Description: The first time in each Magic Phase that the bearer fails a Casting Roll for a Learned Spell cast with three Magic Dice, the bearer may reroll all Magic Dice.

Name: Scroll of the Pearl Throne
Description:
One use only. Duration: Round of Combat.
Choose a Magic Item from an enemy unit that is in contact with the bearer: this Magic Item is ignored.
Note: If it was an Enchanted Weapon or Enchanted Shield, the mundane effects of the Weapon or Shield can still be used.

Name: Diadem of Protection
Description: <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (+2, max 4+)</link></u>.

Name: Amethyst Crystal
Description:
Unless the bearer is <u><link="rulebook-shaken">Shaken</link></u>, Dispelling Rolls made by the bearer’s army gain a +1 modifier.
 If the target of an enemy spell is within 18″ of the bearer, that modifier is increased to +2.

Name: Favour of Meladys
Description:
The target  gains 2 Protection Tokens which are removed when the spell ends. When a friendly unit within 18" of the target suffers a wound, after <u><link="rulebook-armour_saves">Armour Saves</link></u> have been taken, but before any <u><link="rulebook-special_saves">Special Saves</link></u> are taken, the target may discard a Protection Token and ignore the wound applying the following rules:

• Rank-and-File models of Height 1 ignore up to 2 wounds per token (provided they are suffered simultaneously).

• Characters, and models of Height 4 or 5, can each only ignore a single wound per Phase.

• Wounds from attacks with <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link></u> are not ignored, they inflict one less wound instead.

Name: Flickering Lights
Description: Friendly units entirely with Height 1 and within 3" of the model are considered to be in <u><link="rulebook-cover">Soft Cover</link></u>.

Name: Hooded Men
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-skirmisher">Skirmisher</link></u>.

Name: Chosen of the Snow Childe
Description: When performing its <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u>, the 'Fey Rider' model part gains +1 Att for each enemy model in contact with it. Moreover, its <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u> ignore <u><link="rulebook-parry">Parry</link></u>.

Name: Warden of the Hooded Man
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-terror">Terror</link></u>.
The 'Fey Rider' model part gains a <u><link="rulebook-lance">Lance</link></u> and its <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u> gain <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (2, towards Height 4-5)</link></u>.

Name: Solemn Oath
Description: The model benefits from <u><link="rulebook-courageous">Courageous</link></u> while affected by a friendly model's <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u>.

Name: Knights Forlorn
Description: The model gains <u><link="koe-nobility">Nobility</link></u> and the 'Men-at-Arms' model part gains <u><link="koe-bastard_sword">Bastard Sword</link></u>.

Name: Ordo Wardens
Description: The model gains <u><link="koe-clergy">Clergy</link></u> and the 'Men-at-Arms' model part gains <u><link="rulebook-great_weapon">Great Weapon</link></u>.

Name: Castle Guard
Description: The model gains <u><link="koe-commonfolk">Commonfolk</link></u> and the 'Men-at-Arms' model part gains <u><link="rulebook-spear">Spear</link></u>.

Name: Courtier of the Dusk
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-wizard_conclave">Wizard Conclave (2)</link></u>.
The unit selects its spells from the following:

• <u><link="rulebook-fountain_of_youth">Fountain of Youth</link></u> (Druidism)
• <u><link="rulebook-stone_skin">Stone Skin</link></u> (Druidism)
• <u><link="rulebook-mind_fog">Mind Fog</link></u> (Witchcraft)
• <u><link="rulebook-shrouded_steps">Shrouded Steps</link></u> (Witchcraft).

Name: Knight Banneret
Description:
A unit containing a Knight Banneret adds +1 to the Combat Score of its side.
In addition, it can take a single <u><link="rulebook-banner_enchantments">Banner Enchantment</link></u> and can only do so from the list of Army Specific Magic Items.

Name: Prepared Position
Description: When Deploying the unit, you may place a Wall fully within 1" of the unit’s Front Facing, and not in contact with any other Terrain Features. This Wall cannot be wider than 8". It follows the normal rules for Walls, with the exception that it is <u><link="rulebook-covering_terrain">Covering Terrain (Height 1)</link></u> instead of (Height 3).

Name: Sainted
Description: The model part gains +1 Att, and the model gains Fearless. The model is always considered to be under the effect of all Orisons (i.e. Dis set to 9, +2 Off, Aegis (5+), Magical Attacks, ignore Parry). This does not prevent the model’s unit from being the target of an Orison, although the model itself does not benefit from this additional Orison.

Name: Beloved
Description: While the model is joined to a unit with at least one Full Rank, it gains Stand Behind.

Name: Expert Bowmen
Description: Unless making a Stand and Shoot Charge Reaction, the model gains Accurate if it did not move during this Player Turn.

Name: Archery Drills
Description: During a Player Turn in which the model has not moved, if the model's unit has at least one Full Rank, the model gains two instances of Shoot in Extra Rank.

Name: Band of Brothers
Description: Unless Charging out of the unit, Characters joined to units with one or more Knights of the Courts gain Devastating Charge(+1" Cha).

Name: Bannerman
Description: The model becomes the <u><link="rulebook-battle_standard_bearer">Battle Standard Bearer</link></u>.

Name: Minstrel
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-musician">Musician</link></u> and is a <u><link="rulebook-wizard_apprentice">Wizard Apprentice</link></u> that uses Divination as its Path of Magic.

Name: Cleric
Description: The model gains Clergy, Ordo Minister, and Holy Vows, and loses Commonfolk.

Name: Castellan
Description: The model part gains <u><link="rulebook-aptain">Captain</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> (6", <u><link="koe-commonfolk">Commonfolk</link></u>).

Name: Excellence
Description: The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-zeal">Zeal</link></u>, and any <u><link="rulebook-melee_attacks">Melee Attacks</link></u> it allocates towards a Character gain +2 AP.

Name: Forbearance
Description: When using a Shield, the model gains <u><link="rulebook-distracing">Distracting (1)</link></u>.

Name: Generosity
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-attached">Attached</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive (Rank-and-File)</link></u>.
Rank-and-File models with <u><link="koe-nobility">Nobility</link></u> in the unit that the bearer is deployed in gain a <u><link="koe-bastard _sword">Bastard Sword</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-weapon_master">Weapon Master</link></u>, with Duration: Permanent.

Name: Justice
Description:
At the end of Agility Step 0, the model part performs X additional <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u>, where 'X' is equal to the number of HP losses suffered in the Round of Combat by Rank-and-File models in the bearer’s unit. X can never be greater than 3.
If the model is unable to perform the additional attacks granted by Justice, those attacks are lost.

Name: Valour
Description: The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u> and its <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u> gain <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link></u> (2, towards Res 5 or more).

Name: Honour
Description: The model's part gains Devastating Charge (+2 Att), and its unit's Charge Range rolls are Maximised.

Name: Faith
Description: The bearer gains Fearless and Holy Vows. Moreover, if its unit is the target of an Orison while Engaged in Combat, add one Blessing Token to your pool.

Name: The Blessing
Description:
Unit profiles in this Army Book contain an additional Characteristic: 'Aegis (Aeg)'. This gives the unit rule <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (X+)</link></u>, where X is the Aeg value.
Lack of an Aeg value does not prevent a unit from being affected by Aegis modifiers.

Name: Orisons
Description: During Pre-game Selections, a Kingdom of Equitaine army creates a pool of Blessing Tokens: one Blessing Token for each unit in your Army List with Holy Vows. There can never be more than 6 tokens in the pool. Blessing Tokens can be used in each Magic Phase, at any time before ‘Casting and Dispelling Spells’ (Magic Phase, step 5): discard a Token, choose a friendly unit anywhere on the battlefield, and grant one of the following Model Rules. All those effects have Duration: One Turn. • Orison of Discipline: Discipline is set to 9. • Orison of Shielding: Aegis (5+). • Orison of Striking: +2 Off, Magical Attacks, and ignore Parry. Model parts with Mount are not affected. No model can be affected by more than one of the above effects simultaneously unless specifically stated. Applying an Orison to a model cancels any Orisons previously applied to it, unless specifically stated that it can be affected by them simultaneously.

Name: Orison of Discipline
Description: Discipline is set to 9.

Name: Orison of Shielding
Description: <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (5+)</link></u>

Name: Orison of Striking
Description: +2 Off, <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>, and ignore <u><link="rulebook-parry">Parry</link></u>. Model parts with Mount are not affected.

Name: Breath of the Lady
Description: Add 2 Blessing Tokens to your Blessing Token pool.

Name: Divine Judgement
Description: If the wielder successfully completes a Charge, apply the following:+2 Str,+2 AP, with Duration: End of Combat.

Name: Tristan's Resolve
Description: +1 Att and +1 AP. After a successful to-hit roll, the attacker may discard one of the hits with this weapon and choose an Enchanted Weapon carried by the model the Attack was allocated against: at the end of the Agility Step, all Weapon Enchantments on it are ignored and the weapon ceases to be an Enchanted Weapon, with Duration: Permanent.

Name: Uther's Mettle
Description:
+X Att, where 'X' is equal to the number of ranks of a single enemy unit in contact with the wielder, up to a maximum of 4; if in contact with multiple units, use the unit with the most ranks.
These extra attacks can only be allocated towards Rank-and-File models; if the Attacks cannot be allocated towards Rank-and-File models, they are lost.

Name: Mortal Reminder
Description: +1 Str, +1 AP, and <u><link="rulebook-terror">Terror</link></u>.

Name: Prayer Etched
Description: +1 Arm and <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (+1, max. 4+)</link></u>.

Name: Percival's Panoply
Description: +2 Arm.

Name: Fortress of Faith
Description: The wearer gains Holy Vows, and all Armour Save rolls of a natural '1' made by the wearer must be rerolled.

Name: Oriflamme
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict (-1 Dis)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-horror">Horror</link></u>.

Name: Banner of Roland
Description:
The bearer’s unit gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (5+, against Ranged Attacks).
In addition, enemy units with <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u> cannot use this rule against the bearer’s unit.

Name: Lord's Arms
Description: The restriction on the maximum number of Proper Ranks  from Lance Formation is increased to three for the bearer's unit.

Name: Castellan's Crest
Description: One use only. May be activated immediately after failing a Charge Range roll with the bearer or the bearer’s unit in the Charge Phase: the bearer or the bearer’s unit must reroll its failed Charge Range roll. Other Characters Charging out of the bearer’s unit are not affected.

Name: Relic Shroud
Description: The bearer can cast <u><link="koe-breath_of_the_lady">Breath of the Lady</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-hereditary_spell">Hereditary Spell</link></u>) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spells">Bound Spell (5+)</link></u>.

Name: Lady's Favour
Description: One use only. May be activated when the bearer's unit is chosen as the target of an Orison. The bearer's unit gains the effects of all Orisons (i.e. Dis set to 9, +2 Off, Aegis (5+), Magical Attacks, ignore Parry), with Duration: One turn.

Name: Sacred Chalice
Description:
The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-magic_resistance">Magic Resistance (1)</link></u>.
In addition, each time the bearer’s unit is the target of an enemy Spell, the bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (1)</link></u> until the end of following Magic Phase.

Name: Black Knight's Tonic
Description:
One use only. Duration: One Phase.
The first time the bearer’s model suffers an unsaved wound from an attack with <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (X)</link></u>, the model gains <u><link="rulebook-immune">Immune</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link></u>).

Name: Wildheart
Description:
The minimum amount of Army Points that must be spent on 'Core' units is reduced to Min. 20%, and Mammoth Hunters become Common.
The Army List may not include the following units: Great Khans, Khans, Bruisers, Bombardiers, Mercenary Veterans, Mercenary Gunners with Brace of Ogre Pistols, or Thunder Cannons.

Name: Leader of the Pack
Description:
The Mammoth Hunter's base size is changed to 50×50 mm.
The model replaces <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive (Yetis)</link></u> with <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive (Sabretooth Tigers)</link></u>.
While joined to a unit of Sabretooth Tigers, the unit gains <u><link="rulebook-vanguard">Vanguard</link></u>, loses <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>, and the Mammoth Hunter counts as being  of the same Height as the unit for the purposes of allocating Ranged Attacks.

Name: Big Brother (OK)
Description: The model's HP are set to 9, its base size is changed to 75×100 mm, and the roll for the number of hits it does with its Stomp Attack is Maximised.

Name: Giant Club (OK)
Description: +1 Str, +1 AP.

Name: Iron Fist
Description: +1 Arm against <u><link="rulebook-melee_attacks">Melee Attacks</link></u>, +1 Att, and <u><link="rulebook-parry">Parry</link></u>.

Name: Big Names
Description: Each Character can take a single <u>Big Name</u>. Big Names follow the general rules of Magic Items.

Name: Trolleater
Description: <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link></u> (2, towards Height 3) and <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration (5+)</link></u>.

Name: Hoardmaster
Description:
+1 Arm, <u><link="rulebook-weapon_master">Weapon Master</link></u>, and may not take any <u><link="rulebook-weapon_enchantment">Weapon Enchantment</link></u>.
In addition, the bearer gains the following weapons: <u><link="rulebook-great_weapon">Great Weapon</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-halberd">Halberd</link></u>, <u><link="ok-iron_fist">Iron Fist</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-paired_weapons">Paired Weapons</link></u>.

Name: Headhunter
Description: At the end of any Round of Combat where the model part has caused a HP loss on enemy models and did not break from combat, roll a D6: on 3+, the model <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recovers</link></u> 1 HP.

Name: Godspeaker
Description:
<u><link="rulebook-attached">Attached</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>.
The model's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-unstable">Unstable</link></u> (the model may join units without Unstable during Deployment despite being Unstable).

Name: Firebrand
Description:
<u><link="rulebook-breath_attack">Breath Attack</link></u> (Str 4, AP 0, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>), <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-resistance">Resistance</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>),and automatically fails all <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration Saves</link></u>.
The model can cast <u><link="rulebook-dragons_roar">Dragon's Roar</link></u> (Pyromancy) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spell">Bound Spell</link></u> (5+).

Name: Gut Roarer
Description: <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (1)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-horror">Horror</link></u>.

Name: Spinesplitter
Description: The bearer part gains <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge</link></u> (+1 Att, +1 Str, +1 AP)

Name: Rottenjaw
Description: Immune (Poison Attacks) and Poison Attacks. Friendly Kin-Eater units may reroll failed Ambush rolls while the model is on the Battlefield.

Name: Scraplord
Description: Commanding Presence (12", Scrapling). Units with Scrapling property lose Unruly as long as the bearer is on the Battlefield. As long as the model is joined to a unit of Scraplings, its model counts as being of the same Height as its unit for the purposes of allocating Ranged Attacks.

Name: Children of Umi
Description: All Melee Attacks allocated against the target suffer -1 to wound.

Name: Khagadai's Legacy
Description: <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3)</link></u>.

Name: Viper's Curse
Description: Poison Attacks (Melee & Shooting). Shots set to 4, Str 4, AP 2 and always hits on 4+. It cannot benefit from Area Attack, Direct Hit.

Name: Heart-Ripper
Description: +1 AP, Lethal Strike and always hits at least on 3+.

Name: Ritual Bloodletter
Description:
+1 Att.
While the wielder's unit is <u><link="rulebook-engaged_in_combat">Engaged in Combat</link></u>, the wielder can cast <u><link="rulebook-hand_of_glory">Hand of Glory</link></u> (Occultism) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spell">Bound Spell (4+)</link></u>.

Name: Wrestler's Belt
Description: +1 Arm, +1 Str and <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge (+1 Arm)</link></u>.

Name: Mammoth-Hide Cloak
Description: +1 Arm. Attacks against the wearer can never have Str above 5.

Name: Aurochs Resilience
Description: +1 Res, <u><link="ok-mountain_hide">Mountain Hide</link></u>. The model automatically fails all <u><link="rulebook-special_saves">Special Saves</link></u>.

Name: Yeti Furs
Description: <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-touch_of_frost">Touch of Frost</link></u>.

Name: Banner of the Gyengget
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (re-roll natural to-hit and to-wound rolls of '1').

Name: Pennant of the Great Grass Sky
Description: The bearer's unit's Charge Range rolls are Maximised, and its Flee Distance rolls are Minimised.

Name: Skull of Qenghet
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-terror">Terror</link></u>.

Name: Lygur's Tongue
Description: <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict (-2 Off)</link></u>.

Name: Rampager's Chain
Description: The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-stomp_attack">Stomp Attack (D3+1)</link></u>, and all models in the bearer's unit must reroll failed to-wound rolls with <u><link="rulebook-stomp_attack">Stomp Attack</link></u>.

Name: Rex
Description: The model's base size is changed to 100×150 mm and its HP are set to 8.

Name: Combat Master
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-attached">Attached</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive (Tegu Warriors)</link></u>.
The 'Caiman Mentor' model part gains <u><link="rulebook-weapon_master">Weapon Master</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-great_weapon">Great Weapon</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-halberd">Halberd</link></u>, and <u><link="sa-tooth_and_claw">Tooth and Claw</link></u>.

Name: Combat Legend
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive (Caiman Elders)</link></u>.
The 'Caiman Mentor' model part gains <u><link="rulebook-weapon_master">Weapon Master</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-great_weapon">Great Weapon</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-halberd">Halberd</link></u>, and <u><link="sa-tooth_and_claw">Tooth and Claw</link></u>.
While the 'Caiman Mentor' model part is using a <u><link="rulebook-melee_weapons">Melee Weapon</link></u> without a <u><link="rulebook-weapon_enchantments">Weapon Enchantment</link></u>, add the following rules to the weapon, depending on the weapon used:

• <u><link="rulebook-great_weapon">Great Weapon</link></u>:+2 Att, +1 to-wound.
• <u><link="rulebook-halberd">Halberd</link></u>:+2 Att, Distracting (1).
• <u><link="sa-tooth_and_claw">Tooth and Claw</link></u>:+3 Att.

Name: Hunt Leader
Description:
The model becomes an <u><link="rulebook-attachable_models">Attachable Model</link></u> and gains <u><link="rulebook-exclusive"></link>Exclusive (Raptor Pack, Raptor Riders)</u>.
While the model is joined to a unit of Raptor Packs or Raptor Riders, the model gains <u><link="sa-pack_hunter">Pack Hunter</link></u>. Model parts with Magnasaur in the model's unit gain <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u>.
No more than a single model with Hunt Leader can ever be joined to the same unit.

Name: Corrosive Spitter
Description:
One use only. Choose one of the effects below to apply, with Duration: End of Turn.
All models in the unit must choose and activate the same effect simultaneously: 

• May be activated during Combat Choices:
