The model gains <u><link="rulebook-grind_attack">Grind Attack</link></u> (1, Str 2, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u>); if it is in the second rank and not in contact with any enemy model, the model can make its Grind Attack across models in the first rank directly in front of it.

• May be activated in the Shooting Phase:
The model gains the following Shooting Weapon:

Aim 1+, Range 6", Shots 2, Str 2, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>

Name: Master Strategist
Description: While joined to a unit consisting entirely of Height 1 Skinks, the unit gains Feigned Flight, Hit and Run, and Vanguard.

Name: Great Protector
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive (Tegu Warriors)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-war_platform">War Platform</link></u>, and it loses <u><link="rulebook-stubborn">Stubborn</link></u>.
In addition, all Rank-and-File models in its unit benefit from <u><link="rulebook-parry">Parry</link></u>.

Name: Venomous Fortress
Description: The model's base size is changed to 60×100 mm, and it gains 6 additional Skink Riders. The rule Exclusive (Tegu Warriors) is replaced with Exclusive (Skink Warriors, Skink Hunters). Model parts with Skink in the bearer’s unit benefit from First Strike (Hatred), Poison Attacks.

Name: Spearback
Description:
The 'Weapon Beast' model part gains <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u>) and the following Shooting Weapon:

Shoot Spikes: Aim 3+, Range 12", Shots 4, Str 5, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>.

Name: Chameleon
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-ambush">Ambush (Table Edge)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-scout">Scout</link></u>.

Name: Enclave Wizard
Description:
The model is a <u><link="rulebook-wizard_apprentice">Wizard Apprentice</link></u> with access to Druidism, Shamanism, Evocation.
It can select its spells from the Apprentice Spell and Adept Spells (#1-#4) from its chosen Path.
This replaces the normal rules for Spell Selection connected to being a Wizard Apprentice.

Name: Blowpipe
Description: Aim X+, Range 12", Shots 2, Str 2, AP 0, <u><link="rulebook-poison_attacks">Poison Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>

Name: Farseeing Mastery
Description: Learned Spells cast by the model gain +6" Range (spells with Type "Aura" gain +3" Range instead).

Name: Forbidden Mastery
Description: Select either Occultism or Pyromancy: the model knows one additional spell from the selected Path, which must be selected from the Apprentice Spell and Adept Spells (#1-#4).

Name: Eternal Mastery
Description: The model's Casting Rolls for Learned Spells gains a +1 modifier.

Name: Veil Mastery
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (2)</link></u>.

Name: Guiding Mastery
Description: At the start of each friendly Player Turn, the model may choose a friendly unit entirely with Magnasaur with in 12": the unit must reroll failed Charge Range rolls and loses Frenzy (if it has it), with Duration: One Turn.

Name: Maddening Mastery
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-horror">Horror</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-musician">Musician</link></u>.

Name: Invasive Mastery
Description: Once per friendly Magic Phase, the model may choose a Learned Spell that was successfully cast by an enemy Wizard in the previous Magic Phase: the model knows the chosen spell, with Duration: One Phase. Hereditary Spells cannot be chosen.

Name: Mystifying Mastery
Description: Your first failed Dispell Roll during each enemy Magic Phase must be rerolled.

Name: Warden
Description: Warden

Name: Apex Predator
Description: The model gains Devastating Charge(+2" Adv) for Charges against units consisting entirely of models with Towering Presence.

Name: Cantrips
Description:
During Step 5 of your Magic Phase (when Casting and Dispelling Spells), a unit containing Cantrips may discard a Magic Dice to gain the rules listed below. Which rules are used depends on X (Preservation, Projection or both). The effects have Duration: One Turn, and affect all models with Cantrips in the unit.	
		
  •  Preservation: Regeneration(5+).
		
  •  Projection: Chi Strike -- Shooting Weapon:
	

	
	NameAimRangeShotsStrAPAttack AttributesChi Strike118"120

Name: Feeding Frenzy
Description: While Engaged with one or more enemy units marked with , the model part gains +2 Attack Value and must reroll failed to-hit rolls with Close Combat Attacks. In addition, the model cannot benefit from Communal Bond when taking Frenzy Tests.

Name: Marking Bolas
Description: Range 12", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 1, , Quick to Fire.

Name: Shoot Spikes
Description: Range 12", Shots 4, Str 5, AP 2, Quick to Fire.

Name: Howdah Devices
Description:
All models in a unit must choose thes same Howdah Device.

• <u><link="sa-lodestone_shield">Lodestone Shield</link></u>
• <u><link="sa-magnetic_great_bow">Magnetic Great Bow</link></u>
• <u><link="sa-monolith_of_vitalism">Monolith of Vitalism</link></u>
• <u><link="sa-carved_wisdom">Carved Wisdom</link></u>
• <u><link="sa-suncatcher_crystal">Suncatcher Crystal</link></u>

Name: Monolith of Vitalism
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-beacon_of_courage">Beacon of Courage (12")</link></u>.

Name: Suncatcher Crystal
Description: The model gains an additional model part: Att 2, Off 3, Str 6, AP 3, Agi 2, Flaming Attacks, Construct

Name: Lodestone Shield
Description: Friendly units within 8" of the model benefit from <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (5+, against Ranged Attacks).

Name: Magnetic Great Bow
Description: Aim 4+, Range 18", Shots 3, Str 6, AP 3, +1 to hit against Metal Armour, Accurate, March and Shoot, Quick to Fire

Name: Carved Wisdom
Description:
Select one of the following spells as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spell">Bound Spell</link></u>, each can only be selected once.
It may not be changed during Pre-Game Selections.

• <u><link="rulebook-silver_spike"></link>Silver Spike</u> (Alchemy) (4+),
• <u><link="rulebook-fates_judgement">Fate's Judgement</link></u> (Divination) (4+),
• <u><link="rulebook-the_devouring_dark">The Devouring Dark</link></u> (Occultism) (4+),
• <u><link="rulebook-swarm_of_insects">Swarm of Insects</link></u> (Shamanism) (5+).

Name: Lodestone
Description: <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-immune">Immune</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Astral Union
Description: The target gains Regeneration(6+) and Regeneration(+1, max. 3+).

Name: Glory of the Dawn Age
Description: The wielder benefits from an increase to: Str, AP and Att by 1 for every spell with ‘Duration: One Turn’ currently affecting the wielder's model and/or enemy units in contact with the wielder. Note: The number of spells is determined at the start of the wielder's Agility Step.

Name: Serpent's Nest Charm
Description: Attack Value is set to 6, Poison Attacks.

Name: Alchemical Arrows
Description: Shots 4. All Magnetic Short Bows in the wielder's unit have their Strength set to 4.

Name: Vital Essence
Description: +1 HP, <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration (4+)</link></u>.

Name: Imbued Jade
Description: <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (+1)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration (5+)</link></u>.

Name: Starfall Lodestone
Description: <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-immune">Immune</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Koru Stone
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-beacon_of_courage">Beacon of Courage (12")</link></u>.

Name: Obelisk of Collaboration
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="sa-pack_hunter">Pack Hunter</link></u>.

Name: Te Aupouri Smokestone
Description: One use only. Duration: End of Turn. May be activated when a friendly unit fails a Break Test (after any rerolls): enemy units within 18" of the bearer have their Charge Range, Pursuit Distance, and Overrun Distance rolls Minimised.

Name: Ancient Plaque
Description: The first time in each Magic Phase that the bearer fails a Casting Roll for a Learned Spell, it may reroll all Magic Dice for this Casting Roll, provided no other friendly Wizard has made a Casting Roll during this phase.

Name: Stampede Resonator Crystal
Description: One use only. Duration: End of Turn. May be activated at the start of any Charge Phase. Select a single friendly unit containing models with Height 4-5 within 18": all model parts with Height 4-5 in the selected unit lose Stomp Attack and gain Impact Hits (X hits), where 'X' is equal to the amount of hits from its Stomp Attack (if a model part already had Impact Hits, increase the number of hits by its amount of Stomp Attack instead).

Name: Carved Tablet
Description: <u><link="sa-carved_wisdom">Carved Wisdom</link></u> (see Howdah Devices).

Name: Greater Guiding Mastery
Description: Friendly models containing Magnasaur in units within 12" of Anurarch Destined benefit from Pack Hunter.

Name: Like the Tyrants of Old
Description:
Anurarch Destined is both <u><link="rulebook-general">General</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-battle_standard_bearer">Battle Standard Bearer</link></u>.
In addition, an Army List containing Anurarch Destined cannot include any other Character, neither the <u><link="sa-monolith_of_vitalism">Monolith of Vitalism</link></u> nor a <u><link="sa-koru_stone">Koru Stone</link></u>.

Name: Utterly Ruthless
Description: The first time each turn Anurarch Destined performs The Sacrifice and inflicts Health Point losses with it, she <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recovers</link></u> 1 HP.

Name: Storm Crystal
Description: Aim Auto, Range 12", Shots D3+1, Str 6, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-automatic_hits">Automatic Hits</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-lightning_attacks">Lightning Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u>

Name: Balance of Nature
Description: <u><link="rulebook-wizard_conclave">Wizard Conclave (3)</link></u>. Instead of the usual Spell Selection (including Spell Swapping), Shade and Stone must select one spell from Druidism Apprentice and Adept spells, one spell from Shamanism Apprentice and Adept spells, and must always select the Hereditary Spell.

Name: Harmony of the Sun
Description: All other friendly models in units within 8" of Shade and Stone benefit from <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration (+1, max. 4+)</link></u>.

Name: Violence of the Storm
Description: The Conjuring Shade model part is always considered affected by Awaken the Beast (Shamanism).

Name: Clearing Spirits
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target(1)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-light_troops">Light Troops</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-skirmisher">Skirmisher</link></u>.

Name: Heath Hunters
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-feigned_flight">Feigned Flight</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-hit_ and_run">Hit and Run</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-light_troops">Light Troops</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-vanguard">Vanguard</link></u>, and the 'Heath Rider' model part gains a <u><link="rulebook-light_lance">Light Lance</link></u> and <u><link="se-sylvan_bow">Sylvan Bow (3+)</link></u>.

Name: The Forest Follows
Description:
During Pre-game Selections, you may place a single Forest on the Battlefield, so that it is not inside either Deployment Zone and not in contact with any other Terrain Feature.
This Forest has the dimensions of a 10"×6" rectangle.
In addition to the normal <u><link="rulebook-forests">Forest</link></u> rules, it is <u><link="rulebook-dangerous_terrain">Dangerous Terrain (6+)</link></u>, and can never be chosen for <u><link="season-primary_objectives"></link>Primary</u> or <u><link="season-secondary_objectives"></link>Secondary Objectives</u>.

Name: Shapeshifter
Description:
The model gains +2″ Cha and +2″ Mob, as well as <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge (Height is set to 3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-vanguard">Vanguard</link></u>.
The model part gains <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (2, towards Height 4-5)</link></u>.

Name: Wild Hunter
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-frenzy">Frenzy</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-light_troops">Light Troops</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>.
In addition, the model part gains <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge(+1 Att)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u>.

Name: Pathfinder
Description: The model gains Forest’s Thorns, Scout, Stand and Shoot, and Vanguard. A Sylvan Bow wielded by the model has its number of Shots set to 3 if the wielder is a Chieftain with Captain, to 5 otherwise.

Name: Forest Guardian
Description: The model gains Vanguard. Moreover, the model, as well as any Elf Rank-and-File model part in its unit, benefits from First Strike (Hatred).

Name: Blade Dancer
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (6+)</link></u>, <u><link="se-dances_of_cenyrn">Dances of Cenyrn</link></u> (see Blade Dancer unit), <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive (Blade Dancer Kindred, Blade Dancers)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-magic_resistance">Magic Resistance (1)</link></u>.
In addition, the model's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-fly"></link>Fly</u>) and <u><link="rulebook-swiftstride">Swiftstride</link></u>.

Name: Scarred Bark
Description: Every model part with Sylvan Spirit in the model’s unit benefits from First Strike (Hatred).

Name: Entangling Vines
Description:
The model part gains <u><link="se-impaling_roots">Impaling Roots</link></u> (if it did not already have it).
In addition, the model gains the following model rule, with Duration: Round of Combat.
During Combat Choices, select a single enemy Character model in contact with the wielder:
<u><link="rulebook-melee_attacks">Melee Attacks</link></u> from the selected model must reroll successful to-hit rolls against the wielder.

Name: Toxic Spores
Description: Every Standard Melee Attacks performed by a model’s part with Sylvan Spirit, in a unit containing Toxic Spores benefits from Lethal Strike.

Name: Oaken Crown
Description: The wearer gains <u><link="rulebook-disciplined">Disciplined</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-magic_resistance">Magic Resistance (2)</link></u>.

Name: Verdant Rebirth
Description:
This model Recovers 1 HP the first time each Magic Phase that it successfully casts a Learned Spell that targets a friendly unit.
It cannot Recover more than 1 HP in total per Magic Phase from this spell or Fountain of Youth (Druidism).

Name: Gnarled and Knotted
Description: If the target is within 3" of a Forest, use the Strength and Armour Penetration values in brackets.

Name: Spirit Arrows
Description:
When attacking with this weapon, before rolling to hit, choose one model with <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel</link></u> in the target unit.
The chosen model replaces its rule <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (X)</link></u> with <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (X-1)</link></u>, with Duration: One Turn.

Name: Bough Of Wyscan
Description: Number of Shots is always 1, Str 3, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×5)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 6, AP 4, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (2)</link></u>).

Name: Hunter's Honour
Description:
+1 Str and +1 AP.
If the wielder causes any HP loss with this weapon, the wielder and all Rank-and-File models in its unit gain <u><link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting (1)</link></u>, with Duration: Round of Combat.

Name: Spirit of the Whirlwind
Description: +1 Att, +1 Str, and +1  AP.

Name: Oaken Might
Description: +3 Str.

Name: Shielding Bark
Description: +1 HP, Aegis (5+), Fearless, Tree Singing, and Weakness (Flaming Attacks). The Armour value is set to 4 and can never be improved beyond this.

Name: Banner of Deception
Description:
At the beginning of ‘Vanguard Units’ (Battle Setup, step 3.F), the owner may remove the bearer’s unit from the Battlefield and redeploy it in a new formation following the usual restrictions.
<u><link="rulebook-attached">Attached</link></u> models remain Attached.

Name: Banner of Silent Mist
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-magic_resistance">Magic Resistance(1)</link></u> and is always considered to be in Soft Cover.

Name: Predator Pennant
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting (1)</link></u>).

Name: Hail Shot
Description: One use only. Duration: One Phase. Can be activated during the Charge Phase or during the Shooting Phase. This is a Shooting Weapon with the following profile: Aim 2+, Range 30", Shots 3D6, Str 4, AP 1, Magical Attacks and Quick to Fire. Hail Shot cannot benefit from Forest's Thorns.

Name: Mist Walker's Mirror
Description:
One use only. May be activated at the end of any friendly Movement Phase if the bearer’s unit is Unengaged, consists entirely of Height 1 models, and is fully inside a Forest that is not in contact with enemy models. Apply the following rules:

1. Remove the bearer's unit from the Battlefield.

2. Immediately place it back using <u><link="rulebook-ambush">Ambush (centre of Forest)</link></u>.

If the unit cannot be placed, it is removed as a casualty where it was removed.

Name: Sacred Seeds
Description:
One use only. Duration: Permanent.
May be activated at the end of any friendly Movement Phase, if the bearer is Unengaged.
Place a Forest, in contact with the bearer and at least 1" away from enemy units and other <u><link="rulebook-terrain_features">Terrain Features</link></u>. This <u><link="rulebook-forests">Forest</link></u> has the dimensions of a 10"×6" rectangle. It follows the normal Forest rules, except it is <u><link="dangerous_terrain">Dangerous Terrain (6+)</link></u> instead of any other instance of Dangerous Terrain.

Name: Song of Cenyrn
Description:
One use only. Duration: One Phase.
May be activated when the bearer’s unit Declares a Charge.
The target of the Charge can only declare <u><link="rulebook-hold">Hold!</link></u> as its Charge Reaction, unless it is <u><link="rulebook-shaken">Shaken</link></u>.
The enemy unit may still declare Charge Reactions as normal if charged by other units.

Name: Horn of the Wild Hunt
Description: One use only. May be activated when a friendly unit within 8" fails a Charge Range roll. The Charge Range roll is rerolled.

Name: Glyph of Amryl
Description: The bearer gains +3 Def.

Name: Inside a Forest
Description: Half of the unit's models have the centre of their bases inside a Forest

Name: Dance of Bedevilments
Description: Fear, and enemy units in base contact with the model do not receive any Rank Bonus to their Combat Score

Name: Dance of Biting Wind
Description: +1 Armour Penetration and Lethal Strike.

Name: Dance of the Parting Mists
Description: Aegis (3+), −1 Strength, and −1 Armour Penetration.

Name: Dance of Whirling Blades
Description: +1 Attack Value.

Name: The World Tree
Description:
Ancient Dawael does not select his spells during list building. Instead, during <u><link="rulebook-pregame_selections">Pre-game Selections</link></u>, he must select one of the following model rules with duration: Permanent.
He also knows a forth spell, associated to the corresponding selected model rule:

• <u><link="se-colony_of_frogs">Colony of Frogs</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-corruption_of_tin">Corruption of Tin</link></u>
• <u><link="se-murder_of_crows">Murder of Crows</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-illusory_paths">Illusory Paths</link></u>
• <u><link="se-nest_of_vipers">Nest of Vipers</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-chorus_of_the_damned">Chorus of the Damned</link></u>.

Name: Colony of Frogs
Description:
Add the following Offensive Model Part to Ancient Dawael:

Frog (6): Att 1, Off 2, Str 2, AP 0, Agi 4, <u><link="rulebook-toxic_attacks">Toxic Attacks</link></u>

Ancient Dawael gains <u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-water_terrain">Water Terrain</link></u>).

One use only. Duration: One Turn. May be activated at the start of any Player Turn.
Friendly units entirely with Sylvan Spirit within 12" of Ancient Dawael gain <u><link="rulebook-immune">Immune</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Murder of Crows
Description:
Add the following Offensive Model Part to Ancient Dawael:

Crow (6): Att 1, Off 2, Str 2, AP 0, Agi 4, <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict</link></u> (−1 Combat Resolution).

Ancient Dawael gains <u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u> (against <u><link="rulebook-fly">Flying</link></u>) and <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict (-1 Def)</link></u>.

One use only. Duration: One Turn. May be activated at the start of any Player Turn.
Choose an enemy unit within 24" of Ancient Dawael. All models with <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u> in the chosen unit halve their Charge Range and Mobility, rounding fractions up.

Name: Nest of Vipers
Description: Add the following Offensive Model Part to Ancient Dawael: Viper (6): Att 1, Off 2, Str 2, AP 0, Agi 4, Poison Attacks. Ancient Dawael gains Immune (Poison Attacks). One use only. Duration: One Turn. May be activated at the start of any Player Turn. Friendly units entirely with Sylvan Spirit within 12" of Ancient Dawael gain: ‘Enemy units in contact with this unit lose Devastating Charge.

Name: The Unicorn’s Fury
Description:
Melee Weapon. Hand Weapon.
<u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge</link></u> (+1 Str, +1 AP, and+ X Att, where “X” is equal to the number of Ranks in a single enemy unit in contact, up to a maximum of 4) and <u><link="rulebook-divine_attacks">Divine Attacks</link></u>.

Name: The Unicorn’s Horn
Description: Melee Weapon. Spear. +1 Str, +1 AP.

Name: The Unicorn’s Path
Description: One use only. When initiating or ending a Move Manoeuvre in a friendly Movement Phase, Domethil can change a <u><link="rulebook-fields">Fields</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-ruins">Ruins</link></u>, or <u><link="rulebook-water_terrain">Water Terrain</link></u> Feature he is in contact with to a Forest of the same size.

Name: Extended Chassis
Description: The Dark Coach's base size is changed to 50×150mm, and gains one additional Phantom Host.

Name: Great Monstrous Revenant
Description: The Monstrous Revenant gains <u><link="rulebook-stomp_attack">Stomp Attacks</link></u>(D3) and its base size is changed to 60×100mm.

Name: Lich
Description:
If Height 1–4, the model gains <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u> (5+).
When the model casts Arise!, it may choose to set the spell’s Range to 6" and give it the Type: Aura (this choice is declared when selecting targets).
In addition, the model has access to Cosmology in addition to its normal Paths.

Name: The Dead Arise
Description: The model can cast The Dead Arise as a Bound Spell (5+): The Dead Arise: Range: 12", Type : Ground, Duration : Instant. Summon a Skeletons or Zombies unit. Declare which when selecting the target. The unit has a number of Health Points corresponding to the Rsr value of the unit. All upgrades except Command Group Options are allowed. Note: All models must be placed within the spell's Range, with at least one model touching the target point.

Name: Unliving Shield
Description: Enemy models cannot allocate Melee Attacks towards a Necromancer as long as they can allocate Attacks towards a model with Unliving Shield in the same unit as the Necromancer. This rule cannot be used if there are also models with Vampiric in the same unit as the Necromancer.

Name: Blood Powers
Description: Vampire Counts and Vampire Courtiers must purchase unique model rules called 'Blood Powers'.

Name: Sangreal
Description: The bearer gains +1 Arm and the model part with Vampire gains Fury.

Name: Vetala
Description: The bearer gains <u><link="vc-awaken">Awaken</link></u> (Bat Swarms, Dire Wolves, Great Bats, Zombies), <u><link="rulebook-disciplined">Disciplined</link></u>, <u><link="vc-unholy_conduit">Unholy Conduit</link></u>, and <u><link="vc-vampiric">Vampiric (4+)</link></u>.

Name: Lahmia
Description: The bearer’s Armour is set to 1, it gains Elven Finesse and loses Metal Armour. Additionally, if the model is of Height 1–2, it gains Distracting (1).

Name: Strigoi
Description: The bearer’s Armour is set to 0, its HP are set to 4, it gains First Strike (Hatred) and loses Metal Armour. Additionally, if it is without Mount, it gains Regeneration (4+).

Name: Crimson Rage
Description: The bearer gains Hatred, and its Vampiric rolls are Maximised.

Name: Storm Caller
Description: All units within 12" of the bearer's model gains <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>.

Name: Commandment
Description: The Defensive Skill and Offensive Skill of Rank-and-File models in the bearer's unit are set to 6.

Name: Ghoul Lord
Description: The bearer and all Rank-and-File models in the bearer's unit gain <u><link="rulebook-poison_attacks">Poison Attacks</link></u>.

Name: Arcane Knowledge
Description:
The bearer selects a second Path of Magic: it knows one spell from this Path, in addition to its other spells, selected from the Apprentice Spell or Adept Spells (#1 - #4), and is otherwise not allowed to choose spells from this Path.
Ignore this Path for the purpose of <u><link="vc-gates_of_the_netherworld">Gates of the Netherworld</link></u>.

Name: Eternal Duellist
Description: The bearer’s Melee Attacks ignore Parry, and must reroll natural to-hit and to-wound rolls of '1'.

Name: Monster Hunter
Description: The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link></u> (2, towards Height 4-5).

Name: Unbreakable Will
Description: During Combat Choices, select a single friendly unit Engaged in the same Combat as the bearer (this can be its own unit): this unit gains <u><link="rulebook-stubborn">Stubborn</link></u>, with Duration: End of Turn.

Name: Mesmerising Gaze
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict (-1 Att, -1 Off)</link></u>. Only Character models are affected by this instance of <u><link="rulebook-afflict">Afflict</link></u>.

Name: Bestial Bulk
Description: The model’s Height is changed to 3, its base size is changed to 40×40 mm, it gains <u><link="vc-unholy_appetite">Unholy Appetite</link></u>, and +1 Res.

Name: Flying Horror
Description: The model gains +2" Cha and +2" Mob, <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-swiftstride">Swiftstride</link></u>.

Name: Mysteries of the Night
Description: The bearer's Path Access is replaced with Shamanism and Witchcraft.

Name: Blood Magic
Description: The bearer cannot know the Hereditary Spell, or have it as a Bound Spell, in any way. Each time the bearer successfully casts a Learned Spell, you may discard one Magic Dice to successfully cast Arise!, targeting only the bearer's unit.

Name: Arise!
Description:
Choose one of the following effects, for each target:

• The Rank-and-File part of the target <u><link="rulebook-raise">Raises</link></u> HP equal to its Rsr value.
• One Attachable Model in the target <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recovers</link></u> HP equal to its Rsr value.

The following models cannot <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recover</link></u> more than 2 HP from this spell each Magic Phase:

• Height 4-5 models with <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u>
• Characters and models with <u><link="rulebook-war_platform">War Platform</link></u>.

Name: Reaper's Harvest
Description: Strength set to 10, Armour Penetration set to 10, Divine Attacks and Psychic Attacks.

Name: True Thirst
Description:
+1 Str, +1 AP, <u><link="vc-unholy_appetite">Unholy Appetite</link></u> and <u><link="vc-vampiric">Vampiric (3+)</link></u>.
If the wielder's model has Height 4 or more, the wielder gain <u><link="vc-vampiric">Vampiric (5+)</link></u> instead of <u><link="vc-vampiric">Vampiric (3+)</link></u>.

Name: Legend of the Black King
Description: +1 Arm, <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (4+)</link></u>.

Name: Black Standard of Zagvozd
Description: Melee Attacks made by Skeleton model parts without Mount in the bearer’s unit gain +1 to-hit.

Name: Banner of Eldritch Might
Description: Each turn, if the unit has been a target of at least one successfully cast friendly spell it gains Fight in Extra Rank, with Duration: One Turn. In addition, during your Magic Phase, all spells targeting only the bearer’s unit gain a +1 modifier to their Casting Rolls.

Name: Hypnotic Pendant
Description: The wearer and all Rank-and-File models with Height 1-2 in its unit gain <u><link="rulebook-parry">Parry</link></u>.

Name: Eternity Gem
Description:
The bearer's model gains <u><link="rulebook-immune">Immune</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u>).
When the model suffers a wound from an attack with <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (X)</link></u>, reduce the amount of wounds by 1, to a minimum of 1.

Name: Necromantic Staff
Description: The wielder gains Channel(1) and can cast Arise! (Hereditary Spell) as a Bound Spell (5+), with the following changes : Range is set to 6", and it gains Type: Aura.

Name: Night's Crown
Description: Attacks against the bearer suffer -1 to-wound.

Name: Cursed Medallion
Description:
During Pre-game Selections, choose a single model unit on the opponent's Army List. (Remember that all Characters are single model units).
The wearer gains <u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u> (chosen model) and <u><link="rulebook-zeal">Zeal</link></u> (chosen model).

Name: Ancient Blood Power
Description: Bloodline Vampire Counts can take the Ancient Blood Power of their Bloodline instead of taking a Blood Power. All Ancient Blood Powers are Legendary.

Name: Dance of Death
Description:
For every Health Point Lady Chryselie inflicts with a <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attack</link></u>:

• Immediately roll another Standard Melee Attack allocated at the same Health Pool as the initial attack.
• Resolve these attacks before removing any casualties.
• These new attacks do not generate any further attacks.

Name: Coven of Skulls
Description: When the Collective of Varyag casts Arise! (Hereditary Spell), they may choose to set the spell’s Range to 6" and give it the Type: Aura. This choice is declared when choosing targets.

Name: Ever Growing
Description: Whenever the Collective of Varyag is the target of <u><link="vc-arise">Arise!</link></u> (Hereditary Spell), they can <u><link="rulebook-raise">Raise</link></u> Health Points above their number of starting Health Points, to a maximum of twice their starting Health Points.

Name: Cacophony of Suffering
Description:
Shooting Weapon.
Aim X+, Range 12", Shots HP/2 *, Str **, AP 10

<u><link="rulebook-automatic_hits">Automatic Hits</link></u>, * Half of Varyag's HP (rounded up), ** To-wound-rolls are set to 5+, <u><link="rulebook-march_and_shoot">March and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u>

Name: Thirsty Rapiers
Description:
Paired Weapons. <u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u>.
For every Health Point loss dealt with this Weapon, immediately roll a D6: on 5+, Lady Chrysélie <u><link="rulebook-recover">Recovers</link></u> a single Health Point. However, all <u><link="vc-vampiric">Vampiric</link></u> rolls she makes automatically fail.

Name: Scales of Destiny
Description: The model gains <u><link="ud-hierophant">Hierophant</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-wizard_apprentice">Wizard Apprentice</link></u> with access to Cosmology, Divination, and Evocation.

Name: Soul Conduit
Description:
If the Death Cult Hierarch’s chosen Path of Magic is:

• Evocation: whenever the model casts a Spell of Type Augment or Universal on a friendly unit, you may activate <u><link="ud-death_is_only_the_beginning">Death is Only the Beginning</link></u> on any friendly unit within 18" of the model instead of one of the units the spell was cast on.

• Any other Path of Magic: the model knows <u><link="rulebook-whispers_of_the_veil">Whispers of the Veil</link></u> (Evocation) in addition to its other spells

Name: Deathless Noble
Description: The model gains <u><link="ud-undying_will">Undying Will</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-disciplined">Disciplined</link></u>.

Name: Tomb Architect
Description: At the beginning of 'Vanguard Units' (Battle Setup, step 3.F), and at the start of each friendly Player Turn, choose a friendly unit containing Statue within 18″: all models with Statue gain Regeneration (5+), with Duration: One Turn.

Name: Commander of the Terracotta Army
Description: The model gains Terracotta Army, and a Pharaoh must be the General. Other units in the Army List must be upgraded with Terracotta Army.

Name: Lord of the Barrow Legion
Description: The model gains Barrow Legion, and a Pharaoh must be the General. Other units in the Army List must be upgraded with Barrow Legion.

Name: Ghastly Swarm
Description: The model’s Resurrected value is set to 1, and it gains Aegis (3+ against non-Magical Attacks), Aegis (5+), Ghost Step, Magical Attacks, Spirit, and loses Hard Target (1) and Skirmisher.

Name: Chariot of Nephet-Râ
Description: The model’s base size is changed to 100×100 mm, it gains two additional ‘Skeletal Horse’ model parts, <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u> and loses <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive</link></u>.

Name: Legion Charioteers
Description: The model loses <u><link="rulebook-light_troops">Light Troops</link></u>.

Name: Barrow Legion
Description:
Unless the model has Height 5, or only has model parts with Beast and/or Statue, it gains +1 Arm, Metal Armour, and loses Light Armour (if it has it).
A model with Mount cannot benefit from this +1 Arm more than once.
If an army includes any model with <u><link="ud-barrow_legion">Barrow Legion</link></u>, then all models in the Army List must have <u><link="ud-barrow_legion">Barrow Legion</link></u>

Name: Terracotta Army
Description:
Models without Statue have their <u><link="rulebook-resurrect">Rsr</link></u> set to 1, gain +1 Res, Statue, Ensouled Statue, and lose <u><link="ud-dust_to_dust">Dust to Dust</link></u>.
If an army includes any model with <u><link="ud-terracotta_army">Terracotta Army</link></u>, then all models in the Army List must have <u><link="ud-terracotta_army">Terracotta Army</link></u>.

Name: Divine Light
Description: Enemy Casters  within 36" of one or more Caskets of Phatep suffer a -1 modifier to their Casting Rolls.

Name: Phatep's Curse
Description: The model can cast Soul Blight (Evocation) as a Bound Spell(6+). The spell's Range is set to 48".

Name: Well of Souls
Description: One use only. May be activated at the start of any of your Magic Phases. Until the start of your next Player Turn, whenever either player would draw a Flux Card, they draw the Well of Souls Flux Card instead (if either player does not draw a Flux Card, that player ignores this effect).		Well of SoulsFlux Card			5 Magic Diceboth players5 Veil TokensActive Player			When making a casting roll with 3 or more Magic Dice, all doubles count as triples. Note that a Caster can suffer multiple Miscast effects from a single casting roll. However, no Miscast effect can be applied more than once.

Name: Bound in Death
Description: Rank-and-File models in this unit must be fewer than 3 before hits can be distributed onto Characters with the same Type and Height as this unit.

Name: Colossal Kopesh
Description: Attacks made with this weapon gain +2 Strength, +2 Armour Penetration, and Multiple Wounds(D3, against ).

Name: Giant Aspis Bow
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 10, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×5)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-Direct Hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 6, <u><link="rulebook-Multiple Wounds (2)">Multiple Wounds (D3)</link></u>), <u><link="ud-aspis_arrows">Aspis Arrows</link></u>

Name: Duty is Eternal
Description: The target gains +1 Res.

Name: Godslayer
Description:
+1 Att, <u><link="rulebook-divine_attacks">Divine Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link></u> (2, towards <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (X+)*).

* Note that the latter also applies against models with <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> Saves with Conditional Applications.

Name: Scourge of Kings
Description: Attack Value is set to 6, Zeal (towards Characters).

Name: Jackal's Blessing
Description: +2 HP and <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration</link></u>(5+).

Name: Sun's Embrace
Description: <u><link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting (1)</link></u>.

Name: Banner of the Entombed
Description:
If taken by a Character, the bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-ambush">Ambush (Open Terrain)</link></u>.
If taken by a Rank-and-File model, the bearer’s unit gains <u><link="rulebook-ambush">Ambush (Open Terrain)</link></u>, and additional models cannot be added to the unit during Army List creation.

Name: Crown of the Pharaohs
Description:
At the start of every friendly Player Turn, the wearer may lose <u><link="ud-undying_will">Undying Will</link></u>.
If so, choose a friendly unit within 12": this unit gains <u><link="ud-undying_will">Undying Will</link></u>, with Duration: One Turn.

Name: Sacred Hourglass
Description: The first time each Magic Phase that the bearer fails a Casting Roll for a Learned Spell that was targeting a friendly unit, the bearer may reroll all Magic Dice for this Casting Roll.

Name: Book of the Dead
Description:
The bearer can cast a unique Bound Spell:
Unfinished Duty: Casting Value (4+), Range 12", Augment and Aura. Duration: Instant.
Choose one of the following effects for each target:

• The Rank-and-File part of the target Raises a number of HP equal to its Resurrected value.
• One model in the target Recovers a number of HP equal to its Resurrected value.

Name: Kherp Sceptre
Description:
The wielder gains <u><link="ud-hierophant">Hierophant</link></u>.
In addition, the wielder can cast <u><link="rulebook-danse_macabre">Danse Macabre</link></u> (Evocation) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spells">Bound Spell (3+)</link></u>.

Name: Blessed Wrappings
Description: The bearer gains +1 HP and loses one instance of <u><link="rulebook-weakness">Weakness</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Envoy’s Banner
Description: All models in the bearer's unit gain Autonomous. In addition: One use only. Duration: One Turn. During a friendly Movement Phase, the bearer’s unit’s Mob is set to 8.

Name: Sigil of the Closed Gates
Description: The bearer’s unit gains +1 Mob and <u><link="rulebook-ghost_step">Ghost Step</link></u>.

Name: Sandstorm Cloak
Description: The wearer’s Mobility is set to 8, and gains Autonomous, Fly, and Sweeping Attack (2D6 hits, Str 2, AP 1).

Name: Death Mask of Teput
Description: <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (5+)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-horror">Horror</link></u>.

Name: Scroll of Desiccation
Description:
One use only. Duration: Permanent.
During Pre-game Selections, choose a <u><link="rulebook-fields">Field</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-forests">Forest</link></u>, or <u><link="rulebook-water_terrain">Water Terrain</link></u>, that has not been placed during Pregame selections: it ceases to be the Terrain Feature it used to be and loses its Terrain Rules. It becomes a Desert Terrain Feature with <u><link="rulebook-dangerous_terrain">Dangerous Terrain (6+)</link></u> for all enemy units.

Name: Assailed Sanity
Description:
Ashotet is a Wizard that knows all 6 Spells from Evocation, cannot Hereditary Swap, and has <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (3)</link></u>.

• <u><link="rulebook-whispers_of_the_veil">Whispers of the Veil</link></u> (Evocation)
• <u><link="rulebook-danse_macabre">Danse Macabre</link></u> (Evocation)
• <u><link="rulebook-chorus_of_the_damned">Chorus of the Damned</link></u> (Evocation)
• <u><link="rulebook-touch_of_the_reaper">Touch of the Reaper</link></u> (Evocation)
• <u><link="rulebook-spectral_blades">Spectral Blades</link></u> (Evocation)
• <u><link="rulebook-soul_blight">Soul Blight</link></u> (Evocation)

Once per turn, if she fails a Casting Roll for a Learned Spell while using three or more Magic Dice, she can reroll the dice. If this reroll contains a double, she suffers a Miscast (equal to the Casting Roll as normal).
Note that this applies even if the spell fails or is Dispelled, and that she only suffers a single Miscast per casting.

Name: The Lost and Damned
Description:
In an Army List containing Ashotet, Skeleton Warriors and Skeleton Cavalry gain <u><link="ud-tormented_souls">Tormented Souls</link></u>.
In addition, neither of the following unit entries may be included: Death Cult Hierarch, Casket of Phatep, Rehnepeh the Undying Sun, nor any model with <u><link="ud-undying_will">Undying Will</link></u>.

Name: The Pyramidion
Description:
Spells cast by Ashotet gain +6" Range.
In addition, Ashotet can cast a unique <u><link="rulebook-bound_spell">Bound Spell (6+)</link></u>:
<u>Surge of Mad Spirits</u>: Range: 24"; Type: Hex, Damage; Duration: Instant.
The target must take a <u><link="rulebook-courage_test">Courage Test</link></u> rolling an additional D6. If failed, it suffers a number of hits equal to the amount by which the test was failed. Those hits wound automatically and have Armour Penetration 10.

Name: Tormented Souls
Description: The model gains Aegis (5+, against non-Magical Attacks), Exclusive (Tormented Souls), Ghost Step, Horror, Unruly and Spirit. The model’s Armour is set to 0, it loses Shield, and Skeleton and its Resurrected value is halved. All model parts gain +1 AP, Hatred and Magical Attacks, lose all their Weapons, and gain Innate Weapons.

Name: Charioteer of the Sun
Description: During ’Check Combat Formations’ (Round of Combat, 2.A), the Rehnepeh model part gains a bonus to its Att, Off, Str, AP, and Agi equal to half the number of Rank-and-File Skeleton Chariot models in his unit, rounding fractions up.

Name: Staff of Pi-Ankh Khahiroth
Description: A unit containing the Staff of Pi-Ankh Khahiroth benefits from Ghost Step and Strider. In addition, all attacks made by model parts with Mount benefit from Flaming Attacks and Magical Attacks.

Name: The Golden Chariot
Description:
Rehnepeh gains <u><link="rulebook-beacon_of_courage">Beacon of Courage (12")</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-distracting">Distracting</link></u>.
In addition, a unit containing <u>The Golden Chariot</u> can never benefit from Cover.

Name: In Your Name
Description: The model benefits from <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u> while a Pharaoh or Nomarch is joined to its unit.

Name: Underworld Beast
Description: The model gains Random Movement (3D6"). It loses the ‘Pitmaster’ model part, and its base size is changed to 60×100mm. The 'Arena Beast' model part's Attack Value is set to 4D3.

Name: Fire Rats
Description: The model gains Flaming Attacks, Weakness(Flaming Attacks), and its base size is changed to 25×50 mm. Immediately before the model is removed as a casualty as a result of any enemy Melee Attack, it inflicts 1 hit with Str 3, AP 0, and Flaming Attacks  on the Health Pool of the attacking model.

Name: Stygian Overseer
Description: Ambush (Terrain Feature with a friendly Tunnel Marker) and Tunnel Digger. In addition, each Stygian Overseer on the Army List increases the duplication limit of Legionary Drill Teams by 1.

Name: Tunnel Digger
Description:
Each Vermin Swarm army gains one Tunnel Marker, and an additional Tunnel Marker for each unit on the Army List with <u>Tunnel Digger</u>.
During Pre-game Selections, for each of your army's Tunnel Markers, mark a <u><link="rulebook-terrain_features">Terrain Feature</link></u> with a Tunnel Marker.
Only Terrain Features that are not in contact with the opponent's Deployment Zone can be marked. Note: <u><link="rulebook-impassable_terrain">Impassable Terrain</link></u> can be chosen.

Name: Rakachit Technocrat
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-engineer">Engineer</link></u> (Experimental Weapon Teams, Vermin Artillery).

Name: Skorchit Alchemist
Description:
Shooting Attacks from the model with a Pistol gain <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>.
In addition, Height 1 Rank-and-File models in the bearer’s unit benefits from <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-zeal">Zeal</link></u>).

Name: Plague Flail
Description: <u><link="rulebook-halberd">Halberd</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-grind_attack">Grind Attack</link></u> (1, <u><link="rulebook-toxic_attacks">Toxic Attacks</link></u>)

Name: Enlightened by Favana
Description:
The model replaces <u><link="rulebook-wizard_apprentice">Wizard Apprentice</link></u> with <u><link="rulebook-wizard_adept">Wizard Adept</link></u> and can choose Witchcraft, Thaumaturgy instead of Occultism.
The model cannot take <u><link="rulebook-great_eapon">Great Weapon</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-halberd">Halberd</link></u>, nor <u><link="rulebook-paired_weapons">Paired Weapons</link></u>.

Name: Fortified by Udius
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-regeneration">Regeneration (4+)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>.

Name: Pestilent Pulpit
Description: The model gains Diseased and Exclusive (Plague Cultists). The model's unit gains Poison Attacks. The Chassis model part's Agility is set to 4 and it gains Devastating Charge (+10 Agi) and Grind Attack (D3+1hits).

Name: Canister Launcher
Description:
Only one model per unit may use a <u>Canister Launcher</u> in any one Shooting Phase.
Increase the Aim of the Canister Launcher by 1 for each other model in the unit armed with a Canister Launcher.

Aim X+, Range 18", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 10, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (3×3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="vs-maniacal_enthusiasm">Maniacal Enthusiasm (To-hit roll)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-toxic_attacks">Toxic Attacks</link></u>

Name: Deepfire Thrower
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-weakness">Weakness</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>).
Only one model per unit may use a Deepfire Thrower in any one Shooting Phase.
Increase the Aim of the Deepfire Thrower by 1 for each other model in the unit armed with a Deepfire Thrower.

Aim X+, Range 18", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (3×5)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="vs-maniacal_enthusiasm">Maniacal Enthusiasm (To-hit roll)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>

Name: Rotary Gun
Description: Aim X+, Range 18", Shots D6, Str 4, AP 2, <u><link="vs-maniacal_enthusiasm">Maniacal Enthusiasm (To-hit roll)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>

Name: Plague Disciples
Description: The unit replaces its <u><link="vs-bloodpox_blades">Bloodpox Blades</link></u> with Plague Flail.

Name: I Am The Senate
Description: When calculating Combat Score for combats containing one or more friendly unit within 12" of the Ruinous Dictator, your side adds +1 to their Combat Score.

Name: Lord of the Legions
Description: The 'Ruinous Dictator' model part’s <u><link="rulebook-standard_melee_attacks">Standard Melee Attacks</link></u> gain <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3)</link></u>.

Name: Vox Populi
Description: The model gains Commanding Presence(6").

Name: Cult of Errahman
Description:
Whenever a natural ‘1’ is rolled to hit for an enemy Close Combat Attack allocated towards a model with Cult of Errahman, the model part inflicts 1 hit with Toxic Attacks on the attacking model's unit in the same Initiative Step, before any casualties are removed.
	 models with Cult of Errahman cannot be joined by models without Cult of Errahman.

Name: Swarm Master
Description: While using this weapon, the wielder gains <u><link="rulebook-grind_attack">Grind Attack</link></u> (X, Str 3, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u>), where 'X' is the number of Proper Ranks in the wielder's unit, up to a maximum of 10.

Name: Rodentium Bullets
Description: Range 18", Shots 3, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>.

Name: Secrets of the Doom Blade
Description:
+1 Att, +2 AP.
<u><link="vs-maniacal_enthusiasm">Maniacal Enthusiasm (To-wound roll)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3)</link></u>.
Rolls this model makes on the <u><link="vs-maniacal_enthusiasm">Maniacal Enthusiasm</link></u> chart gain a +2 modifier.

Name: Storm Rocket
Description:
Aim 3+, Range 24", Str 5, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="vs-maniacal_enthusiasm">Maniacal Enthusiasm (To-hit roll)</link></u>.

If the weapon hits, it causes D6 hits instead of 1.

Name: Bell of the Deep Roads
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-ambush">Ambush</link></u> (Terrain Feature with a friendly Tunnel Marker).

Name: Sacred Aquila
Description:
The bearer and Rank-and-File models in the bearer’s unit gain <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u>.
In addition, for each to-hit roll of ‘1’ with a <u><link="rulebook-melee_attacks">Melee Attack</link></u> made by the bearer or a Rank-and-File model in its unit, the bearer’s unit suffers 1 hit with Str 3, AP 0 and <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u> at the end of the Agility Step in which this effect is triggered.

Name: Plague-Hermit's Blessing
Description: The model's number of HP is set to 6, it gains the Cult of Errahman property, and automatically fails all its Armour Saves rolls.

Name: Orator's Toga
Description: The bearer gains Stand Behind.

Name: Scepter of the Usurper
Description: The bearer's unit gains Fearless. If the General is removed as a casualty, the bearer becomes the General. If the slain General was a Ruinous Dictator, the bearer also sets their Discipline to 9. Duration: Permanent.

Name: Tome of the Ratking
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-unstable">Unstable</link></u>.

Name: Crown of Hubris
Description: At the start of any friendly Magic Phase, the bearer may choose to inflict 3 HP losses on its unit. When doing so, the bearer gains Channel (2), with Duration: One Phase.

Name: Tarina's Lyre
Description: Any <u><link="rulebook-stomp_attack">Stomp Attacks</link></u> made by enemy units within 8" of the bearer suffer a -2 to-wound modifier.

Name: Darkstone Detonator
Description: At the end of any friendly Movement Phase after the first one, the bearer may remove all friendly Tunnel Markers placed on a single Terrain Feature within 24" of the bearer. When doing so, one Unengaged unit in contact with that Terrain Feature suffers 2D6 hits with Str 4, AP 1, and Unmodifiable.

Name: Favanite Powder
Description: One use only. Duration: One Phase. When casting a Hex spell, after seeing the result of the roll, the bearer may choose to gain Maniacal Enthusiasm (Casting Roll).

Name: Potion of Rat Form
Description:
The model replaces <u><link="rulebook-wizard_apprentice">Wizard Apprentice</link></u> with <u><link="rulebook-wizard_adept">Wizard Adept</link></u> and can choose Witchcraft, Thaumaturgy instead of Occultism.
The model cannot take <u><link="rulebook-great_eapon">Great Weapon</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-halberd">Halberd</link></u>, nor <u><link="rulebook-paired_weapons">Paired Weapons</link></u>.

Name: Inergon injection!
Description:
One use only. Duration: One Phase.
In the Movement Phase, before moving, Professor Mauss can gain <u><link="rulebook-random_movement">Random Movement (3D6")</link></u>.

Name: Superior Darkstone Power
Description: Professor Mauss can choose not to move despite having Random Movement. The model cannot choose to Pursue, unless it is its First Round of Combat and it is Charging. In that case it must Pursue (including Overrun).

Name: Prototype Mauss Rifle
Description:
Aim 4+, Range 36", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 2

<u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1x3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 10, AP 4, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3+1)</link></u>), <u><link="rulebook-lightning_attacks">Lightning Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="vs-maniacal_enthusiasm">Maniacal Enthusiasm</link></u> (To-hit roll).

Name: Disorienting Scent
Description: Afflict (-2 Off), against model parts with Beast or Magnasaur

Name: Mistress of Smoke
Description:
One use only.
When the Shadowslice Stalker would be removed as a casualty or flee while joined to a unit, remove her from the Battlefield: she becomes <u><link="rulebook-hidden">Hidden</link></u> again. If she uses this ability and hasn’t been removed as acasualty at the end of the game, the opponent still receives Victory Points as if she had been removed as a casualty.

Name: Shadowslice's Panoply
Description:
The Shadowslice Stalker is equipped with the most advanced selection of murderous weaponry known to any species.
Each time the Stalker is Deployed using <u><link="rulebook-hidden">Hidden</link></u>, she gains one of the following Magic Items. Duration: Permanent.

 • <u><link="vs-countless_daggers">Countless Daggers</link></u>: <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (+2 Att), <u><link="rulebook-paired_weapons"></link>Paired Weapons</u> and <u><link="rulebook-throwing_weapons"></link>Throwing Weapons</u> (2+).
 • <u><link="vs-darkstone_rod">Darkstone Rod</link></u>: +2 Str, <u><link="rulebook-lightning_attacks"></link>Lightning Attacks</u> and <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link> (2)</u>
 • <u><link="vs-senators_toga">Senator's Toga</link></u>: +2 Dis, <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> (6").

Name: Countless Daggers
Description: <u><link="rulebook-first_strike">First Strike</link></u> (+2 Att), <u><link="rulebook-paired_weapons"></link>Paired Weapons</u> and <u><link="rulebook-throwing_weapons"></link>Throwing Weapons</u> (2+).

Name: Darkstone Rod
Description: +2 Str, <u><link="rulebook-lightning_attacks"></link>Lightning Attacks</u> and <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link> (2)</u>.

Name: Senator's Toga
Description: +2 Dis, <u><link="rulebook-commanding_presence">Commanding Presence</link></u> (6").

Name: Monster Seeker
Description: The model gains Multiple Wounds (2, towards Height 3-5). In addition, when a unit containing this rule charges a unit containing a model with Height 3-5, its Charge Range roll is Maximised.

Name: Grim Resolve
Description: The model gains +1 Att for each enemy model in contact with it. In addition, when a unit containing this rule charges a unit containing a model with Height 0-2, its Charge Range roll is Maximised.

Name: Flaming Shot
Description: The model’s Shooting Attacks become <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>.

Name: Rune Crafted(X)
Description:
The model’s Shooting Weapon gains Magical Attacks and the effects within brackets:
   • Dwarf Ballista: +1 to hit towards Fly
   • Flame Cannon: +1 AP
   • Dwarf Catapult: +1 Str, +2 AP
   • Dwarf Cannon: <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u>(Str 10, AP 4, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3+2)</link></u>) towards Height 5
   • Organ Gun: +1 to wound

Name: Crag Warden
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-light_troops">Light Troops</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-skirmisher">Skirmisher</link></u>.

Name: Brothers of Vengeance
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-light_troops">Light Troops</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-skirmisher">Skirmisher</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-vanguard">Vanguard</link></u>.

Name: Shrapnel Bombs
Description: The model gains <u><link="rulebook-sweeping_attack">Sweeping Attack (2D6, Str 3, AP 1)</link></u>.

Name: Shield Wall
Description: Models of Height 1–3 using a Hand Weapon and a Shield simultaneously gain <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (6+, against Melee Attacks from models Engaged in their Front Facing)</link></u>, as well as <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis (5+, against Melee Attacks from Charging models Engaged in their Front Facing)</link></u>.

Name: Guild-Crafted Handgun
Description: Aim X+, Range 24", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stand_and_shoot">Stand and Shoot</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unwieldy">Unwieldy (1)</link></u>

Name: Dwarf Ballista
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 3, AP 10, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×5)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 6,<u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3)</link></u>)

Name: Flame Cannon
Description: Aim 2+, Range 24", Shots 1, Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (3×5)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>

Name: Dwarf Catapult
Description:
The model's Height is changed to 3.
Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 7, AP 3, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (2×2)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (2)</link></u>)

Name: Dwarf Cannon
Description: Aim 4+, Range 48", Shots 1, Str 5, AP 2, <u><link="rulebook-area_attack">Area Attack (1×3)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-artillery">Artillery</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-direct_hit">Direct Hit</link></u> (Str 10, AP 4, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3+1)</link></u>)

Name: Entrench
Description: All friendly Field Artillery units within 6″ of a model with Entrench benefit from <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target (1)</link></u>.

Name: Organ gun
Description: Aim 4+, Range 30", Shots 3D6, Str 5, AP 3

Name: Hewn Out of Mountains
Description: The player of this army has a +1 modifier on Dispel Rolls as long as at least one friendly model with <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (X)</link></u> is on the Battlefield.

Name: Runic Special Items
Description:
Dwarven Holds armies cannot pick from the list of Common or Shared Magic Items, except for Common Banner Enchantments.
Instead, they have their own version of Magic Items called 'Runic Items', which are items bearing 'Runic Enchantments' (also called 'Runes'). These follow the rules for Magic Items, with the exceptions listed under each type.

Name: Runic Weapon Enchantments
Description:
Runic Weapon Enchantments follow the rules for Weapon Enchantments, with the following differences:

• All Runic Weapon Enchantments are enchantments for Hand Weapons and Paired Weapons.
• Up to three Runic Weapon Enchantments can be applied to a single weapon.
• Each combination of Runic Weapon Enchantments is Legendary.
• Multiple instances of the same Runic Weapon Enchantment are cumulative, unless mentioned other wise.
• When noting Runes on the Army List, use the following format: Runic Weapon (Rune A, Rune B, Rune C).

Name: Rune of Destruction
Description: <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds (D3)</link></u>.

Name: Rune of Smashing
Description: Attacks allocated towards a model with Resilience 5 or more have both their Strength and their Armour Penetration set to 10

Name: Rune of Penetration
Description: +3 AP.

Name: Rune of Quickening
Description: +3 Agi.

Name: Rune of Might
Description: +1 Str, +1 AP.

Name: Rune of Precision
Description: +1 to hit.

Name: Rune of Craftsmanship
Description:
The weapon follows the rules for Great Weapon instead of its original Weapon Rules.
This does not prevent it from being engraved with additional Runic Weapon Enchantments.

Name: Rune of Anger
Description: +1 Att.

Name: Rune of Lightning
Description:
<u><link="rulebook-grind_attack">Grind Attack</link></u> (D3 hits, Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-lightning_attacks">Lightning Attacks</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unmodifiable">Unmodifiable</link></u>).
A model with two instances of this Rune increases the number of hits to 2D3.
Note that these hits are not affected by the effects of other Runic Weapon Enchantments.

Name: Rune of Returning
Description:
Can be used as a Shooting Weapon with the following profile:
Aim 2+, Range 8", Shots 1, Str User, AP User, <u><link="rulebook-quick_to_fire">Quick to Fire</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-accurate">Accurate</link></u>
The effects of other <u><link="dh-runic_weapon_enchantments">Runic Weapon Enchantments</link></u> apply to Shooting Attacks made with this weapon (even if the effects are normally restricted to Melee Attacks, including Special Attacks).

Name: Rune of Fire
Description: During Combat Choices, the wielder may gain <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>, with Duration: Round of Combat.

Name: Runic Armour Enchantments
Description:
Runic Armour Enchantments follow the rules for Armour Enchantments, with the following differences:

• Up to three Runic Armour Enchantments can be applied to a model.

• Each combination of Runic Armour Enchantments is Legendary.

• Multiple instances of the same Runic Armour Enchantment are cumulative, unless specifically mentioned other wise.• When noting Runes on the ArmyList, use the following format: Runic Armour (Rune A, Rune B, Rune C).

Name: Rune of Resistance
Description: <u><link="rulebook-resistance">Resistance</link></u>.

Name: Rune of Steel
Description: Must reroll failed Armour Save rolls.

Name: Rune of Iron
Description: +1 Arm.

Name: Rune of Retribution
Description: When a model successfully makes an <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis Save</link></u> from <u><link="dh-shield_wall">Shield Wall</link></u>, it immediately inflicts 1 hit towards the Health Pool of the model that caused the wound, using the same Strength and Armour Penetration as the saved attack with <u><link="rulebook-automatic_his">Automatic Hits</link></u>. This hit is resolved before any casualties are removed and does not benefit from Weapon Rules or <u><link="dh-runic_weapon_enchantments">Runic Weapon Enchantments</link></u>.

Name: Rune of the Forge
Description: <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (3+, against <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Rune of Denial
Description:
One use only.
The player can choose to use this Rune instead of performing a Dispelling Roll.
The spell is automatically dispelled.

Name: Rune of Devouring
Description: One use only. The player can choose to use this Rune instead of performing a Dispelling Roll. The spell is cast as normal, but the Caster may not cast it again for the rest of the game.

Name: Rune of Dragon's Breath
Description: <u><link="rulebook-breath_attack">Breath Attack</link></u> (Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>).

Name: Rune of Harnessing
Description: In each of your opponent’s Magic Phases, immediately after Excess Magic, they must discard 1 Magic Dice.

Name: Rune of the Courage
Description:
One use only. Duration: Round of Combat.
May be activated when Choosing Equipment and Abilities. The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-stubborn">Stubborn</link></u>.

Name: Rune of Channeling
Description:
<u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (1)</link></u>.
This Rune can only be used if the model’s army total combined value for <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel</link></u> is 3 or less (excluding <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel</link></u> from this Rune).

Name: Rune of Grounding
Description:
One use only. Can be activated during Combat Choices.
All spells with Duration: One Turn that affect any of the following units come to an end:

• The bearer’s unit.
• Enemy units in contact with the bearer’s unit.

Name: Rune of Readiness
Description:
One use only.
Can be activated at the end of the Charge Phase, immediately after all Charge Moves have been resolved.
If the bearer’s unit was successfully charged during this phase, it may perform a Combat Reform (following the normal rules for Combat Reforms).

Name: Rune of Storms
Description:
One use only. Can be activated at the start of the opponent’s Player Turn.
Choose a single enemy unit within 24" of the bearer.
The Charge Speed and Mobility of all models with <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u> in that unit are halved, rounding fractions up. Duration: End of Turn.

Name: Rune of Courage
Description:
One use only. Duration: Round of Combat.
Can be activated during Combat Choices.
The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-stubborn">Stubborn</link></u>.

Name: Rune of Shielding
Description: Aegis (+1, max. 4+), which can only stack with itself and Shield Wall.

Name: Rune of Channelling
Description:
<u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel (1)</link></u>.
This Rune can only be used if the model’s army total combined value for <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel</link></u> is 3 or less (excluding <u><link="rulebook-channel">Channel</link></u> from this Rune).

Name: Rune of Mining
Description: During Pre-game Selections, choose a Terrain Feature on the Battlefield. As long as the bearer is on the Battlefield, all friendly models may treat this Terrain Feature as Open Terrain when making a Move Manoeuvre (Reform, Advance or March Move), but must still follow the Unit Spacing rule at the end of their move.

Name: Rune of Kinship
Description: The bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-ambush">Ambush (Battlefield Edge)</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-scout">Scout</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-vanguard">Vanguard</link></u>.

Name: Runic Banner Enchantments
Description: Dwarven Holds armies may use Banner Enchantments from the list of Common Banner Enchantments as well as the Runic Banner Enchantments listed below.

Name: Runic Standard of Grudges
Description: <u><link="dh-ancient_grudge">Ancient Grudge (1)</link></u>.

Name: Runic Standard of Swiftness
Description: The bearer's unit gains <u><link="rulebook-vanguard">Vanguard</link></u>.

Name: Runic Standard of Dismay
Description: Charge Range rolls against the bearer's unit are Minimised.

Name: Runic Standard of Steadiness
Description:
One use only. Duration: End of Turn.
Can be activated at the start of any Movement Phase.
The bearer’s unit loses <u><link="rulebook-unwieldy">Unwieldy</link></u>.

Name: Runic Standard of the Anvil
Description: Whenever a friendly unit Charges an enemy unit already Engaged in Combat with the bearer’s unit and fails its Charge Range roll, it must reroll that roll.

Name: Runic Standard of Wisdom
Description:
Select a single Battle Rune and write it on your Army List.
This Battle Rune can be cast by the bearer as a Bound Spell.
It can only target the bearer’s own unit.

Name: Runic Standard of the Hold
Description:
All models in the bearer’s unit benefit from <u><link="rulebook-resolute">Resolute</link></u>.
If the unit contains a model that already has <u><link="rulebook-resolute">Resolute</link></u> from another source, the unit is considered to have two additional Proper Ranks instead of one.

Name: The Living Law
Description:
At the beginning of each friendly Melee Phase, select an enemy unit (as appearing on the Army List).
The selected unit becomes marked for the purpose of <u><link="dh-ancient_grudge">Ancient Grudge</link></u>. Duration: Permanent.

Name: Wonders of the Age
Description:
Duna Bregold’s Paired Weapons have the following Runic Enchantments: Rune of Anger, Rune of Might, Rune of Precision.
In addition, Duna Bregold has the following Runic Artefacts: Rune of Denial, Rune of Devouring, and Rune of Grounding. This is in addition to the usual limitation of Runic Items, however the Rune of Denial, Rune of Devouring, and Rune of Grounding cannot be activated by other friendly models.

Name: Master Brewer
Description:
During each friendly Magic Phase, at any time before ‘Casting and Dispelling Spells’ (Magic Phase,step 5), the Master Brewer may select a single of the following Ales to affect his unit. Duration: One Turn.

 • Stout Ale: <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stubborn">Stubborn</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>.
 • Bitter Ale: <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>.
 • Red Ale: <u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-zeal">Zeal</link></u>.

Name: Stout Ale
Description: <u><link="rulebook-fearless">Fearless</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-stubborn">Stubborn</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>.

Name: Bitter Ale
Description: <u><link="rulebook-fury">Fury</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-hatred">Hatred</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>.

Name: Red Ale
Description: : <u><link="rulebook-lethal_strike">Lethal Strike</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-unruly">Unruly</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-zeal">Zeal</link></u>.

Name: The Aleward Crew
Description: When Tador Berafrig is Deployed, all Rank-and-File models in his unit gains +1 Armour and <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (3+, against <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>). Duration: Permanent.

Name: Favours of the Dark Gods
Description:
A Character with a Favour cannot join a unit that contains any model with a different Favour.

• <u><link="wdg-envy">Favour of Kuulima, Goddess of Envy</link></u>
• <u><link="wdg-gluttony">Favour of Akaan, God of Gluttony</link></u>
• <u><link="wdg-greed">Favour of Sugulag, God of Greed</link></u>
• <u><link="wdg-lust">Favour of Cibaresh, God of Lust</link></u>
• <u><link="wdg-pride">Favour of Savar, God of Pride</link></u>
• <u><link="wdg-sloth">Favour of Nukuja, Goddess of Sloth</link></u>
• <u><link="wdg-wrath">Favour of Vanadra, Goddess of Wrath</link></u>

Name: Wings
Description: The model's Mob is set to 8" and it gains Fly.

Name: Skinning Lash
Description: <u><link="rulebook-sweeping_attack">Sweeping Attack (1)</link></u>.

Name: Damnation
Description:
The unit gains <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u>.
If it fails a Break Test, replace each model of the unit with a Wretched One model:
• The unit and its models are considered removed as a casualties.
• Each Wretched One model is placed in the same position and facing the same direction as the model it replaces (even if the replaced model was in contact with an enemy unit: in this case, the Wretched One model is placed in contact with the enemy unit, too).
• The Wretched One models form a new unit.
• The Wretched One unit follows the rules for <u><link="rulebook-summoned_units">Summoned Units</link></u>, except that it ignores the Unit Spacing rule when placed on the Battlefield, but can still not overlap other units or <u><link="rulebook-impassable_terrain">Impassable Terrain</link></u>.
• The Wretched One unit cannot perform any <u><link="rulebook-combat_reforms">Combat Reforms</link></u> in the Round of Combat during which it is <u><link="rulebook-summoned_units">Summoned</link></u>. Enemy units can do so as normal.
• Note that the following Round of Combat is not considered the First Round of Combat for the Wretched One unit, nor for the enemy units it is Engaged with.

Name: Big Brother (WDG)
Description: The model's HP are set to 9, its base size is changed to 75×100 mm, and its rolls for the number of hits for Stomp Attacks is Maximised.

Name: Monstrous Familiar
Description:
The model gains <u><link="rulebook-wizard_conclave">Wizard Conclave</link></u> (1), and chooses its spells from the following spells:

• <u><link="rulebook-living_steel">Living Steel</link></u> (Alchemy)
• <u><link="rulebook-corruption_of_tin">Corruption of Tin</link></u> (Alchemy)
• <u><link="rulebook-hellfire">Hellfire</link></u> (Hereditary Spell)

Name: Tribal Warspear
Description:
+1 Str, <u><link="rulebook-multiple_wounds">Multiple Wounds</link></u> (D3, towards Height 4–5).
The wielder is an <u><link="rulebook-attachable_models">Attachable Model</link></u>, gains <u><link="rulebook-exclusive">Exclusive (Barbarians)</link></u> and loses <u><link="rulebook-solitary">Solitary</link></u>.
No more than a single model with <u>Tribal Warspear</u> can ever be joined to the same unit.

Name: Additional Limbs
Description: The model's Mobility is set to 10" and its Armour is set to 3.

Name: Trophy Rack
Description:
The model may take a single <u><link="rulebook-banner_enchantments">Banner Enchantment</link></u> (using the bearer’s Special Item allowance as normal).
In addition, the first time an Enemy unit engaged with the bearer's unit is removed as a casualty, including all <u><link="rulebook-attached">Attached</link></u> Models, the bearer gains <u><link="rulebook-resolute">Resolute</link></u>.

Name: Spiked Shield
Description: When a Height 1-3 model is using a <u><link="rulebook-hand_weapon">Hand Weapon</link></u> and is using a <u>Spiked Shield</u> simultaneously, and the bearer successfully passes an <u><link="rulebook-armour_saves">Armour Save</link></u> roll of 4+ against a <u><link="rulebook-melee_attacks">Melee Attack</link></u> from an enemy model Engaged in its Front Facing, the bearer immediately inflicts 1 hit with the bearers Str and AP and <u><link="rulebook-automatic_hits">Automatic Hits</link></u> towards the Health Pool of the model that caused the wound, before any casualties are removed.

Name: Abiding Spirit
Description: <u><link="rulebook-hard_target">Hard Target</link></u> (1).

Name: Brand of the Dragon
Description: <u><link="rulebook-breath_attack">Breath Attack</link></u> (Str 4, AP 1, <u><link="rulebook-flaming_attacks">Flaming Attacks</link></u>), <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-swiftstride">Swiftstride</link></u>

Name: Emissary of Chaos
Description: <u><link="rulebook-courageous">Courageous</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-stomp_attack">Stomp Attacks</link></u> (D6 hits).

Name: Courageous
Description: A unit containing Courageous must reroll failed Courage Tests.

Name: Sorcerer Immortal
Description: <u><link="wdg-veil_walker">Veil Walker</link></u>

Name: Gifts of the Dark Gods
Description: <u>Gifts of the Dark Gods</u> follow the general rules of Magic Items including being Legendary.

Name: Unholy Avatar
Description: +1 Str, +1 AP, and <u><link="rulebook-divine_attacks">Divine Attacks</link></u>

Name: Daemonic Wings
Description: The bearer gains +3 Cha, +3 Mob, <u><link="rulebook-fly">Fly</link></u>, and <u><link="rulebook-swiftstride">Swiftstride</link></u>.

Name: Entropic Aura
Description: Ignore all the <u><link="rulebook-weapon_enchantments">Weapon Enchantments</link></u>, <u><link="rulebook-armour_enchantments">Armour Enchantments</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-shield_enchantments">Shield Enchantments</link></u> in units that are in contact with the bearer, including his own, for as long as the units remain in contact with the bearer.

Name: Luck of the Dark Gods
Description: The bearer's model gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u>(+1, max. 4+).

Name: Idol of Spite
Description: One use only. Can be activated during Combat Choices: the bearer gains +1 Att, +1 Str, and +1 AP, with Duration: Round of Combat.

Name: Dark Prelate
Description: The model can cast <u><link="rulebook-blood_curse">Blood Curse</link></u> (Occultism) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spell">Bound Spell (3+)</link></u> and <u><link="rulebook-pentagram_of_pain">Pentagram of Pain</link></u> (Occultism) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spell">Bound Spell (5+)</link></u>.

Name: Master of Destruction
Description: The model part can use a Shield or a Spiked Shield simultaneously with a Great Weapon or a Halberd. The model part counts as using a Hand Weapon while using simultaneously a Shield or a Spiked Shield with a Great Weapon or a Halberd.

Name: Prized Stallion
Description: The model's March Rate is set to 16".

Name: Master of Battle
Description:
The model's maximum number of Supporting
Attacks is set to 3.

Name: Greed
Description: Favour of Sugulag, God of Greed. The model part with Path of the Favoured gains Great Weapon, Halberd, Paired Weapons, and Weapon Master. A Chosen Lord with this Favour may take a second item from either the Artefacts category or the Potions and Scrolls category (but cannot take a second item from both categories).

Name: Lust
Description:
Favour of Cibaresh, God of Lust.

The model gains <u><link="rulebook-devastating_charge">Devastating Charge</link></u> (<u><link="rulebook-strider">Strider</link></u>) and <u><link="rulebook-feigned_flight">Feigned Flight</link></u>.

Name: Pride
Description: Favour of Savar, God of Pride. The model gains Disciplined. Courage Tests taken by units containing this Favour are Minimised.

Name: Sloth
Description:
Favour of Nukuja, Goddess of Sloth.

The model gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (6+).
In addition, if the model is Height 1-4 it gains <u><link="rulebook-aegis">Aegis</link></u> (+1, max. 4+, against no <u><link="rulebook-armour_saves">Armour Save</link></u> *).

* Can only be used for attacks against which the model cannot take or would automatically fail its <u><link="rulebook-armour_saves">Armour Saves</link></u>.

Name: Wrath
Description: Favour of Vanadra, Goddess of Wrath. Model parts with Path of the Favoured gain First Strike (Hatred).

Name: Hellfire
Description:
The target suffers 2D6 hits with Str 6, AP 0, and <u><link="rulebook-magical_attacks">Magical Attacks</link></u>.

*This spell can target units <u><link="rulebook-engaged_in_combat">Engaged in Combat</link></u> and in contact with the Caster's Front Facing.

Name: Burning Portent
Description: AP set to 10. Flaming Attacks and Multiple Wounds (D3).

Name: Symbol of Slaughter
Description: +2 Att, +2 Agi.

Name: Thrice-Forged
Description: Arm set to 6.

Name: Gladiator's Spirit
Description: +1 Arm, <u><link="rulebook-parry">Parry</link></u>.

Name: Icon of the Infinite
Description: The bearer can cast <u><link="rulebook-fellfire">Hellfire</link></u> (Hereditary Spell) as a <u><link="rulebook-bound_spell">Bound Spell (5+)</link></u>.

Name: Zealots' Banner
Description: Models in the bearer's unit gain <u><link="rulebook-extra_support">Extra Support (2)</link></u>.
